---
| |
_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That's why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z2ao3hlp3b99dkn1fj63io2d6gv3d6i9m7dgmfng_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob4c9h2bs "please, click here to support my efforts if you can.")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn

name: Ruben Gallego for AZ
subject: Humbly asking if you can make your first online donation before our mid-month drive ends.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We’ve fallen behind and the timing is less than ideal.
#

Peter -
When Ruben Gallego launched this campaign, he had no idea what to expect. He knew a lot of people would probably give to beat Senator Sinema, but it was a big question as to whether or not we’d have the huge outpouring of grassroots support we needed to win.
Within minutes, a teacher from Tucson chipped in.
Then a mechanic from Chandler.
Then a student in Tempe.
And we were off.
But today we’re asking: is there ANYTHING we can say to convince YOU to add your first online donation to Ruben’s Senate campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow? Our fundraising has slowed and the timing is not great.
So please — especially because August is notoriously tough for fundraising and we’ve fallen behind this month:
[**Can you please make your first online contribution to Ruben Gallego’s campaign today? We’ve fallen behind on our August fundraising goals and need your help to catch up before tomorrow at midnight.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230814-1-f&t=1&akid=923%2E734936%2EWhQKPK)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._

clean_body: We’ve fallen behind and the timing is less than ideal. Peter - When Ruben Gallego launched this campaign, he had no idea what to expect. He knew a lot of people would probably give to beat Senator Sinema, but it was a big question as to whether or not we’d have the huge outpouring of grassroots support we needed to win. Within minutes, a teacher from Tucson chipped in. Then a mechanic from Chandler. Then a student in Tempe. And we were off. But today we’re asking: is there ANYTHING we can say to convince YOU to add your first online donation to Ruben’s Senate campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow? Our fundraising has slowed and the timing is not great. So please — especially because August is notoriously tough for fundraising and we’ve fallen behind this month: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for all you’ve done and for giving today. name: Letitia James
subject: Today is the anniversary of Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
| | |
---
| | 88 years ago today, Social Security was signed into law – marking the official beginning of a program that has since served as a lifeline for millions of Americans.

**We must fight to ensure that future generations continue to have access to this lifeline.**
---
**[Add your name to my petition now to demand that Congress PROTECTS Social Security!>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68050049/421775847/-522013986?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1151-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTg0NDkzMC1hMzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdYTnWxg-yeU-Z1CQr81J4943pleS83MF7xUUmKmnTA=&emci=083054f2-9b37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39844930-a33a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
---
| | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68050050/421775848/-522013986?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1151-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTg0NDkzMC1hMzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdYTnWxg-yeU-Z1CQr81J4943pleS83MF7xUUmKmnTA=&emci=083054f2-9b37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39844930-a33a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)
---
Peter, this is urgent:

88 years after Social Security was signed into law, extremist Republicans are attempting to bring this vital program crumbling down – a move that would harm the almost 3.7 million New Yorkers __ who receive Social Security checks each month.

**Here’s everything you need to know about our fight to protect Social Security:**
**_FIRST_** , Florida Sen. Rick Scott championed a plan that would put Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security on the chopping block every FIVE years.

**_THEN_** , in a heated exchange during the State of the Union, President Biden pled with Republican lawmakers to NOT touch Social Security benefits in the next round of budget cuts.

**_NOW_** , I’m calling on 5,000 fearless fighters to join me in urging Congress to stay true to their word and _protect_ Social Security.
**I’ll be honest, Peter: I’ve seen Republican lawmakers go back on their word _dozens_ of times. **But, with nearly 67 MILLION Americans currently utilizing Social Security benefits, we CANNOT let them go back on their word now.

**This isn’t about politics, this is about _real people_ who could fall into poverty if Republicans gut Social Security. So I have to ask: [Will you sign my petition now to urge Congress to PROTECT Social Security? I need to collect 5,000 signatures before 11:59 p.m. tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68050051/421775849/-522013986?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1151-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTg0NDkzMC1hMzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdYTnWxg-yeU-Z1CQr81J4943pleS83MF7xUUmKmnTA=&emci=083054f2-9b37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39844930-a33a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)**
| | [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68050052/421775850/-522013986?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk1151-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTg0NDkzMC1hMzNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdYTnWxg-yeU-Z1CQr81J4943pleS83MF7xUUmKmnTA=&emci=083054f2-9b37-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=39844930-a33a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=25369504)

Thank you for standing with me.

\- Letitia

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqip91pf786c0g6naq87o43hagb34spj1mmrun2g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs5fsakvlovibtreh6uffl350bemaotlm34job20_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state—that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zovg10kppeu5imnbtndoijdvpmjnfu99ivm2a000_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs) [NO](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4qrdm90s6gli0t33ebj4uch48e6t9vlfkmt51fo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc6nc8egnt8bd71a34cqfo47i04n5m16o4nv22kg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. That is why I'm writing to you today. Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late. To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty? Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link: Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty! Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA 1600 Daily 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Sabina Matos
subject: I don’t “fit the mold”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Sabina for Rhode Island
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q22023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_welcome1_B1_mold_new&amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q22023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_welcome1_B1_mold_new&amount=10]
Hi there,
My name is Sabina Matos and while I think you'll really like hearing from me, the campaign we're building together is about YOU.
I'm running in the special election to fill Congressman Cicilline's seat for a simple reason: there's a lot at stake in Washington — the issues we all care about are on the line and we need someone who is ready for these fights on day one.
As an immigrant, I know what it's like to work hard and, at times, struggle to make ends meet.
As a Mom who ran for office as a single parent, I know what it's like to be cast aside because you don't “fit the mold.”
As a Rhode Islander, I know the stakes of our shared values – addressing climate change, protecting abortion access, stronger voting rights and gun safety legislation – because I fight for them every single day as Lieutenant Governor.
I'll say it again: this campaign is about YOU. And we will not be successful unless we're all in this together. It's going to be a sprint to the finish (just a few months 'til Election Day!) and we need all hands on deck.
Our movement is powered by folks like you giving what you can to emails like this one. And with our daily fundraising deadline coming up, I'm hoping you'll donate $10 or more today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q22023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_welcome1_B1_mold_new&amount=10]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

$250 » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q22023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_welcome1_mold_new&express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode2=EL250] Other » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_fr_matos_q22023?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_welcome1_B1_mold_new&refcode2=ELother]
Thank you for getting involved. I’m honored to have you on the team.
With you in this fight,
Sabina Matos

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Targeted. Stalked. Assaulted.
body:
The transgender mob doesn’t want me to be emailing you today. They would be reeling with anger if they knew I reached out.

| |
---
| | | _The transgender mob doesn’t want me to be emailing you today. They would be reeling with anger if they knew I reached out._

They’ve targeted me.

They’ve stalked my events and shouted me down.

They’ve even held me for ransom.

The mob wants me to be afraid and back down. _**[But here’s the thing, when it comes to protecting your daughters and granddaughters,_I will never surrender._](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664603%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sqmmhvFKMMh7RxioKdcRng&sysid=1 "But here’s the thing, when
it comes to protecting your daughters and granddaughters, I will never
surrender.")**_

My name is Riley Gaines.

I’m a 12-time All-American swimmer and a recent college graduate who dreamed of pursuing a dental career. However, my plans changed when I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I experienced firsthand the very thing Democrats and liberal activists want you to believe is an exaggeration. A major accomplishment was ripped from my grasp by a biological man.

Now, Democrats are unleashing woke athletes and violent activists to force me to bow down.

I’ve gone toe to toe with Megan Rapinoe, Brittney Griner, and Lia Thomas in defense of your daughters and granddaughters. I survived a brutal assault and ambush at my Saving Women’s Sports speech at San Francisco State University.

And yet, I continue my mission to protect fair play and competition for biological women.

What’s happening in women’s athletics is a threat to us all. Their woke agenda won’t just stop at sporting competitions. They won’t be satisfied until all female opportunities are fundamentally destroyed by including biological males.

I refuse to let this happen on my watch, and I hope you’ll join me. If you’re willing to proudly protect female opportunities from biological men, _**[please accept my call to action.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664604%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=XILqLA52kuVGjJidGUORpA&sysid=1 "please accept my call to
action.")**_

Thank you,

Riley

---
| |
_A Note For You, from Marsha Blackburn: _

Protecting our Conservative values from the Left is not an easy task. With a radical agenda focused on rising inflation, opening our borders, and censoring free speech, it has never been more important to defeat the radical Left.

That’s why your continued support is so appreciated. Your help has never been needed more, so **[please, click here to support my efforts if you can.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664617%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1%2fIXFFZqsi3sAlkv8aseWg&sysid=1 "please, click here to
support my efforts if you can. ")**

Thank you for being a dedicated supporter,

Marsha Blackburn

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: Ending this campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
body:
I’m not someone who EVER gives up.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zbg3sk9j56qqoiem583fcstgd3cpfmk2ffr0n7f8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs)
---

Friend --

My name is Morgan Luttrell.

I'm a combat veteran who served in multiple combat missions in defense of America.

I've seen things I wouldn't wish on my worst enemy. Things I will never be able to unsee.

In 2009, I survived a helicopter crash that should've taken my life but, by the grace of God, I was given a second chance.

No matter how tough or brave you are, nothing is fully in your control. That's why we put our faith in God.

**But -- there are some things we CAN control, and that 's why I'm running for Congress. **

I have to just say it: Biden and the Radical Democrats want me GONE, they want me DEFEATED, they want to END my campaign for good.

But unlike the spineless career politicians, **I 'm not someone who EVER gives up.**

You see, the career DC politicians are living each day by their own agenda -- not thinking about those suffering the consequences.

After my time in the military, I knew that each day that I woke up in America was a gift.

_**The land of the free and home of the brave.**_

But the Biden regime has stripped our nation of our core values and turned us down a path that is leading us toward a dark future.

**So, Friend, I want to humbly ask you right now if you 'll stand with me in my fight for the America we all once knew and loved. **

It is patriots like yourself that have helped change the direction of our country before, but we still need you. Maybe now more than ever.

Please, stand up for America's liberties and freedoms by chipping in just a few bucks today?

---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z6sdh1bdrj84vkq16gctefak7h8dka67thc52p7o_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1j64ob2chh2bs)
---

Together, we can bring America back to her greatness before the Democrats send us further down the dark path we're currently on.

Thank you,

Morgan Luttrell

---
|
---

| Paid for by Texans for Morgan Luttrell
---
PO Box 1245
Magnolia, TX 77353

name: GIFFORDS
subject: Some facts for you
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
If more guns in more places made us safer, the United States would be the safest country in the world
#

The United States has more guns, weaker gun laws, and higher rates of gun violence than any other developed country in the world.
That’s a fact.
Many right wing politicians say that the answer to this problem is more guns. They’ll tell you that a “good guy with a gun” can defeat a “bad guy with a gun.”
But that’s just not the case. If more guns in more places made us safer, the United States would be the safest country in the world.
It’s up to all of us to work to create a future in our nation with commonsense gun laws. That’s the _real_ way we can keep our communities safe from gun violence.
Tomorrow night, we’ll be facing our August mid-month fundraising deadline. As you may know, it’s been a slow few months of fundraising for us. In order for us to have the resources we need to do our lifesaving work, we really need to pick up the pace this month.
[**So please, will you make a contribution of $3 --or any amount that makes sense for you--to GIFFORDS PAC before tomorrow at midnight?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-aug23.8Y_0mi&refcode=em230814-1-15&t=1&akid=6334%2E3935704%2E6ssxg1)

name: Jon Tester
subject: quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Hey—

I’ll keep this quick.

I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And
I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month
fundraising deadline in ONE day.

National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on
their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19017?t=1001&akid=3494%2E346206%2ESzF-HJ ]That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $25 between my campaign and
Charles Booker to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the
number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money
we raise. Can you chip in today?

CHIP IN →

Thanks for everything you do.

—Jon Tester

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/19017?t=1002&akid=3494%2E346206%2ESzF-HJ ][IMG]

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

name: Your America
subject: Our country is facing a constitutional crisis
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20493%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lUCrJGMayRjmkUnrivNZvQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20494%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Pvk3Kzw%2bAqayAmysidFzKg&sysid=1).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20405%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TjY9IG6%2f1wnkynLuPofHqw&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20406%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=chQ38m%2f8XXL7ayYo%2f6nL9w&sysid=1) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It’s a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of “We the People” is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can’t just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION --to DO SOMETHING about it, while there’s still time to save our country. **

That is why I’m writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of “We the People”--before it’s too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c20407%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gdLPQ5%2bqmu8sB5dSwC%2bkjA&sysid=1)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8255%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=tJ0P0BDLwNxbhXmZi3IASw&sysid=1)

clean_body: | | | Peter, There are 449 days until Election Day. I know what you’re thinking - that’s a really long time. And you’re right, it is quite a while. But that doesn’t mean we can hold off preparing. You may not have elections at the forefront of your mind right now, and that’s okay. It only takes a couple of minutes to make a difference in our upcoming benchmark, and then you can go back to the rest of your summer. We’ve got just over 24 hours until our deadline, and we need you help to meet this goal! And with Tim Kaine raking in MAJOR money, we can’t afford to miss a single goal. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) Please mail checks made out to "Hung Cao for Virginia" to this address: PO Box 652 Purcellville VA 20134 | | Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia | | Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: Thanks DeSantis! We got another one 🙌

body:
The numbers here are insane — there’s absolutely no denying this.| | | **BREAKING NEWS!** **GOVERNOR RON DESANTIS BOOTS ORLANDO’S RADICAL SOROS PROSECUTOR MONIQUE WORRELL OUT OF OFFICE****⬇**** _LET’S KEEP GOING_****⬇**
---
[**SUPPORT THE STOP SOROS FUND**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=476826bf222643c79e1de02db7136057&_e=JKwG3G9mWH90JDH9fXKtT4vhC0pvD_MNoeiL0phmflixI_VjhrTiNPlLOQljQN3b9wMqaJdfuIbu9m89ha3XLCXYV-ZOF0At0hKhTYooOYBT6nWNK49vO1gLHBrS319wNA3JjuIfFGzcOwGQZM57EhDrwRRpBXiVceSNhkcnXtxGffh_dfCqEPySoRjTE2CaaedEc-v3inLEghd_KU1QRjobMRrBdpbhR9zG6NoorMo7eCEzgCIDltjTXKH7kaoe2CzuZyacQs4HXERb1hhI4Nr8cX7jO4mRHlKMwxpJITWJUNBcpV_yNvlsJ19VqAMp1u_9tTk0ztVw643U2IZa_8VgFSZB1pDBR8Y8GH22SB-By2e2yfbq0ag21chiW9tL)
---
| | Peter, Monique Worrell ran for prosecutor on a promise to _“change the culture of prosecution,”_ — and she delivered by **simply NOT prosecuting criminals.** _I’d say that’s a pretty big culture change!_ It’s no wonder Governor DeSantis removed her from office for _**[dereliction of duty and incompetence.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=476826bf222643c79e1de02db7136057&_e=JKwG3G9mWH90JDH9fXKtT4vhC0pvD_MNoeiL0phmflixI_VjhrTiNPlLOQljQN3b9wMqaJdfuIbu9m89ha3XLCXYV-ZOF0At0hKhTYooOYBT6nWNK49vO1gLHBrS319wNA3JjuIfFGzcOwGQZM57EhDrwRRpBXiVceSNhkcnXtxGffh_dfCqEPySoRjTE2CaaedEc-v3inLEghd_KU1QRjobMRrBdpbhR9zG6NoorMrAD27aYZ-8L4Twb4My2rbLbObmn5DUyXDYP2XIeXlyPsadK9NuMx6yByfFo37qzMQFu4-jc5v7r3-PiQC4hzEF5rz5AWghRSTN241E-kHcZLp3qh9fzDWYRtZJzIn9NlSycSzx1bXbReBl8KHFt59g)**_ Just how bad was she? Let’s look at the numbers:
* Of **83 gun crime arrests** , including robberies, carjackings, and home invasions, she secured **only 2 mandatory minimum sentences.**
* Of the **130 cases** involving possession of a firearm by a convicted felon, she secured **only 5 mandatory minimum sentences.**
* And of the **64 drug trafficking cases** referred to her, she got a whopping **ZERO mandatory minimum sentences.**

She refused to do even the bare minimum job as a prosecutor. And what did some of those violent, repeat offenders go on to do with their second or third chances?
* _One murdered his pregnant girlfriend. _
* _One shot two Orlando police officers. _
* _And too many others simply resumed their lives of crime afterward._

**Peter, this is beyond “soft on crime.” This is flat-out making crime legal.** **Monique Worrell is the second Soros prosecutor to be removed in Florida.****That’s great news, but we can’t stop there.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=476826bf222643c79e1de02db7136057&_e=JKwG3G9mWH90JDH9fXKtT4vhC0pvD_MNoeiL0phmflixI_VjhrTiNPlLOQljQN3b9wMqaJdfuIbu9m89ha3XLCXYV-ZOF0At0hKhTYooOYBT6nWNK49vO1gLHBrS319wNA3JjuIfFGzcOwGQZM57EhDrwRRpBXiVceSNhkcnXtxGffh_dfCqEPySoRjTE2CaaedEc-v3inLEghd_KU1QRjobMRrBdpbhR9zG6NoorMqtAV9I5vnXy4Y-yQfKVpcPVpBF4Oj8eQcFPW-9KkVdT_3pryXUlvqRYkMN-NLuLO58WWAOihddMf_kUexYMSFw8GGgsWbCyBM6HGHV6f_ZWwbVtOntRufBKfdH2oUqR59owge-lx8xyPyeOZ6MTRDq)

clean_body: The numbers here are insane — there’s absolutely no denying this.| | | BREAKING NEWS! GOVERNOR RON DESANTIS BOOTS ORLANDO’S RADICAL SOROS PROSECUTOR MONIQUE WORRELL OUT OF OFFICE⬇ LET’S KEEP GOING⬇ | | Peter, Monique Worrell ran for prosecutor on a promise to “change the culture of prosecution,” — and she delivered by simply NOT prosecuting criminals. I’d say that’s a pretty big culture change! It’s no wonder Governor DeSantis removed her from office for Just how bad was she? Let’s look at the numbers: Of 83 gun crime arrests , including robberies, carjackings, and home invasions, she secured only 2 mandatory minimum sentences. Of the 130 cases involving possession of a firearm by a convicted felon, she secured only 5 mandatory minimum sentences. And of the 64 drug trafficking cases referred to her, she got a whopping ZERO mandatory minimum sentences. She refused to do even the bare minimum job as a prosecutor. And what did some of those violent, repeat offenders go on to do with their second or third chances? One murdered his pregnant girlfriend. One shot two Orlando police officers. And too many others simply resumed their lives of crime afterward. Peter, this is beyond “soft on crime.” This is flat-out making crime legal. Monique Worrell is the second Soros prosecutor to be removed in Florida.That’s great news, but we can’t stop there. 1 in 5 Americans lives in territory controlled by a Soros prosecutor. We want to remove these radicals from office in every state. Fair Courts America is the nation’s premier organization taking a direct stand against Soros’ prosecutors. We are taking on his dark money head-to-head. But, Peter, we can’t do it alone. We need your help. Tracking these judicial races is a massive undertaking — but it is critical to protecting our republic. In Justice,Andrew Wynne | Fair Courts America | | | | | | | Paid for by Fair Courts America | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

clean_body: It's a habit from my days at military school and in the Army: I cannot stand clutter. | = Teammates, It's a habit from my days at military school and in the Army: I cannot stand clutter. So when I popped by the office the other day and saw we had dozens of Team Moore t-shirts, hoodies, buttons, and yard signs filling up the closets, I said, "Y'all this has GOT to go." As a special incentive to help clear things out I asked the team to mark everything 10% off through midnight tomorrow. | Whether you want a piece of history or simply are planning your Maryland Barbie costume for Halloween, I much prefer to see this stuff out in the wild rather than in boxes at HQ. Looking forward to seeing you with your t-shirts, hoodies, buttons, totes, and stickers! | | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

How much do you think you know about the Inflation Reduction Act? There’s one way to find out: | | |
---

But that’s not the only thing the _Inflation Reduction Act_ did. Do you know how this law impacts the cost of insulin for seniors on Medicare? name: Perry Johnson
subject: Tell Pollsters: Perry Johnson
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vs_1--SD3N

I believe we live in the best country the world has ever known,
and I want to keep it that way.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os_1--SD3N

Friend,

My name is Perry Johnson, I'm anti-abortion, pro-second
amendment, anti-China, and anti-woke. I believe we live in the
best country the world has ever known, and I want to keep it that
way.

Friend, we recently hit the 50,000 donation benchmark -
10k more than the mark set by the RNC to be on the debate stage,
a benchmark to keep ordinary people like us out of politics, but
we did it. Now the media and the crooks in Washington are scared
of our movement by rigging polls.

That's why I need your help. Pollsters are corrupting the
RNC debate process by picking and choosing which candidates to
include. So when pollsters call or text you - tell them you're
supporting Perry Johnson to make sure we meet the polling
threshold to make the debates.

Millions of Conservatives nationwide are standing with us
because I have proposed several compelling ideas that I believe
will make our country even stronger:

The 2 Cent Plan: America is going down a path of
destruction by debt. We are drowning in it, spending more than we
have, and making decisions that would bankrupt any family. The 2
Cent Plan, a tax cut that reduces federal spending by 2 cents per
dollar, aims to reduce our debt burden by putting the government
on a diet.

Disbanding the Department of Education: Education is
a fundamental cornerstone of our society, but we need to
reevaluate the role of the federal government in it. Disbanding
the Department of Education will allow states, local communities,
and parents to have greater control over their educational
systems, empowering them to tailor education to each child's
unique needs.

Abolishing the FBI: The safety and security of our
citizens are paramount, but we must also ensure that our law
enforcement agencies operate with the utmost transparency and
accountability. Right now, the FBI has the lowest trust level in
history due to corruption at the DOJ, and it's time to replace it
with a culture of accountability and integrity. AMERICA DOES NOT
NEED A POLITICAL POLICE!

CHECK OUT MY LATEST AD HERE >>>

These proposals are just the beginning of the visions I
have for this great country. As President, I will be committed to
addressing a wide range of issues, including healthcare reform,
immigration, national security, and job creation. My ultimate
goal is to keep America the greatest nation on Earth and work
tirelessly for the betterment of all its citizens.
Please share my message with your friends, family,
congregation, colleagues, and anyone else who is tired of the
political games in Washington; AND TELL POLLSTERS THAT YOU
SUPPORT PERRY JOHNSON!

-Perry Johnson
Candidate for President

P.S. To learn more about my campaign, go to
PerryJohnson.com

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.

Peter,

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Reverse ‘money machines’ popping up across America
body:
If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing.

| **Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America** Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b08f4284439841bc8c8792ebd94101a8&_e=0H1g8HYgRcNfgntoS0zuS2FVOkDsFj9REjsROngFXijHTVIQ9oinbBOE_cbQJO4YzEMLpYIgjO9z7GsQIBvHvQm0aMuxa8YtdsVGl34znY7JSWAJfepwhlwInTdsVX_VovX1oLYSg46RNW3H8RwpPHkNxqb2jiOOE6dZZ3e-yXT8iF5ZXy9dY38KfkjJSwOPZrtpGWZhBXwUV8rvwJML2yAudCbQalUS0PtKsLw-ws5NUi7kNOiKfqXpGEPHKUhehm-qPXd3gNcYi4e9e5ltiqNI8wZ8NtbF3NqFluxOkys%3D) If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a **'Reverse ATM'** They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, **[Dr. Prins explained these strange'reverse ATMs.'](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b08f4284439841bc8c8792ebd94101a8&_e=0H1g8HYgRcNfgntoS0zuS2FVOkDsFj9REjsROngFXijHTVIQ9oinbBOE_cbQJO4YzEMLpYIgjO9z7GsQIBvHvQm0aMuxa8YtdsVGl34znY7JSWAJfepwhlwInTdsVX_VovX1oLYSg46RNW3H8RwpPE9TadS3BQ14PanyPPj2L6Ms7oYmqRyiNNIVyDVPxQ4hIf7GhosINqEzSKmwFk19CBR5XrLU6UcI1h43qMjfB8AKcoL4tnI7fnJLTWx6nZwFZ2QzzYox1AA5nawh8w4dPR07e3_O9cNbi-nx14T3Uyc%3D)** And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. clean_body: If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. | Reverse 'money machines' popping up across America Machines like the ones in this picture are popping up all across America. If you've been to a concert venue, stadium, or airport, you've almost certainly walked by one without knowing. The experts are calling it a 'Reverse ATM' They've been installed at places like Citizen's Bank Ballpark in Philadelphia... They've even been used at the Super Bowl. Why are these machines suddenly appearing out of nowhere? And what does it mean for your money? We've recently arranged an interview with former Goldman Sachs managing director, Dr. Nomi Prins, to get her take. There's nobody in America who's more aware of the inner workings of the banking system. In the interview, And she said she expects them to play a key role this Summer as our nation's financial system is overhauled for the first time since 1971. According to her research, many Americans will be blindsided by what's to come. BUT, folks who understand the 'Reverse ATM' phenomenon before it becomes obvious to the average American could actually profit in the weeks ahead. To help folks prepare, she's recorded a briefing that explains exactly what she sees coming, how it will play out, and how much time you have to prepare. Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: David Hogg, Leaders We Deserve
subject: Unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | Hey — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives.

The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain.

But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans.

**That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve** — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future.

**_[We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Their Future PAC today?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yWqaAipSuLnSvVaNc1k1n-L5Q7FL_A_rYYIYrPP6hZKSpM1FZVLvn_mipnF5n7KFp2YvYg6f4c5FACJPfOHYMTA58ExPAtvtw9YEPLJOC_2Jhu2oyvRzA0OHx269ct5MQ-KpyU6RdKdE0NHFbpdz86zCAguYIktkaXe7GlIB51__6VqFh_k0nYYLHIuobdblT1ruiFQvGlMEDMBDV5e7xdwo5Kq_xHT85-a31t6UkkyO75xc6CuCbDEF86XbaO9WJAY76WPRbZj9udA_DJ0gsg0Zy8tccr8Fz_SZAtuue__0yONgvNtvV1Il5sw_UmcXZR2-LtjYK5wE2iE25LWl_piSlWLR5xHxejPkkDy_A57N3yEyc5Dvh1ZFmvdH5L4i-nRDsEkaz0kh3QNU9paZMw/3yq/Ar4CLgZQQRq8x87Pz4w20w/h0/8Vb9S0rP7k3g3Qn-4j96zmfOCiFjxOY2cFziqAnsFmo)_**

I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.

It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats.

Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office.

**Let’s prove them wrong.**

Let's do this,

David Hogg
Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve

clean_body: | | | Hey — it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong. Let's do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Our focus areas are: → Climate action → Quality education → Affordable healthcare → Sensible gun legislation → Ending child hunger and poverty → Strengthening democracy by protecting voting rights We’re powered by grassroots donations from people like you, so ** | | Paid for by Their Future PAC | | Sent via . | | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. name: Andrei Cherny
subject: It’s time to enshrine abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andrei for Arizona
body:
Arizona is one of 21 states that bans abortion.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68069262/421828312/1272516037?refcode=em_XX_XXXX.XX.XX_XX_XX_header_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU1NTVkMmEtYjczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYiNw4kkdq1xKMgfjvIGsW2w6M7vLL0Z0R-DpLmEz6s=) Team –

This month, abortion rights groups kicked off an effort to enshrine abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution. **[I hope you’ll join me in the fight to protect this fundamental freedom.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68069263/421828313/-1902212844?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.14_b1_ac_all&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU1NTVkMmEtYjczYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=iYiNw4kkdq1xKMgfjvIGsW2w6M7vLL0Z0R-DpLmEz6s=)

Arizona is now one of 21 states with an abortion ban – a fact we cannot allow to remain.**

My opponent, David Schweikert, has made opposition to reproductive rights a core crusade during his time in Congress. He is pushing a bill to ban abortion nationwide with no exceptions, voted against the right to contraception, and even voted to allow states to prosecute women traveling out of state to receive an abortion.

**We must fight back.** If elected to serve in Congress, I’ll take immediate action to enshrine the right to reproductive health care into law once and for all. But, I cannot protect abortion access alone. I need your support.

[**Will you join me in the fight to protect access to abortion in Arizona and around the country? clean_body: Arizona is one of 21 states that bans abortion. = Team – This month, abortion rights groups kicked off an effort to enshrine abortion protections into the Arizona Constitution. = Arizona is now one of 21 states with an abortion ban – a fact we cannot allow to remain. My opponent, David Schweikert, has made opposition to reproductive rights a core crusade during his time in Congress. He is pushing a bill to ban abortion nationwide with no exceptions, voted against the right to contraception, and even voted to allow states to prosecute women traveling out of state to receive an abortion. We must fight back. If elected to serve in Congress, I’ll take immediate action to enshrine the right to reproductive health care into law once and for all. But, I cannot protect abortion access alone. If you’re tired of empty promises in Washington about securing our southern border, then I need you to read this email immediately. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_s=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_t=62LKBX-0nHDXEMrGQZkzPGz_j_X-q1DzcoAdqPxkMu8hUmRYgCC3opytk5UD4_HCeBdGJdTfa-fQYiaAr9pf0Kt5Cd7vq3-Q93Pe01BwxVo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_s=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_t=62LKBX-0nHDXEMrGQZkzPGz_j_X-q1DzcoAdqPxkMu8hUmRYgCC3opytk5UD4_HCeBdGJdTfa-fQYiaAr9pf0Kt5Cd7vq3-Q93Pe01BwxVo%3D)

[](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_e=2F4sEpEY_C5cqfJ8W07QqQadgVK8bauAdRxF6pDigmPf10UvQKJISrrGeJulSEl-MWMjkBQC6WHtuXIbLd7RwNrEQidikg8SCMvXRBgILfXCTtZxz-pU_-fr9KSTDsesdQky-inUAHQL2dyFN5bHSgc4F1CujIbf8dQvmVgiYCNRG1y6rvrjVYEet_KQG9xBu2sBEivYegtt8KZnCLbVFSDhtEMmbns2WFtRpquTQ9nQbJbHvoLOfI62i6ev5OHWBzf-iWfVcJccz7vHEgAT4AHfjUy2ipqrkCe2OmDEj-EEWuLoPo0M32nxBppWhnoMwWqurefDSYqyUNaJS7A47PrZj08ZHrn5aAwbCIofTeFADavXOk48DTSB1G_o-5b2uBVPGPVlUk5wvKeXf_D7CA%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

**There is a full-fledged crisis** at our southern border and Democrats in Congress don't seem to care at all.

The number of illegal immigrants crossing in a single month is often the size of a small city's population. Within those numbers are illegal aliens affiliated with criminal cartels, free to roam our neighborhoods. Previously arrested or convicted criminal illegal aliens are free to commit serious criminal offenses _again._ **We are at a breaking point.**

**Your safety is at risk every single day because of the reckless policies upheld by Democrats. We need strong patriots who are TOUGH on border security, and I'm the man for the job. Will you chip in any amount today to send me to Congress and secure the border?**

[ **DONATE TO SECURE THE BORDER**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_e=2F4sEpEY_C5cqfJ8W07QqQadgVK8bauAdRxF6pDigmPf10UvQKJISrrGeJulSEl-MWMjkBQC6WHtuXIbLd7RwNrEQidikg8SCMvXRBgILfXCTtZxz-pU_-fr9KSTDsesdQky-inUAHQL2dyFN5bHSgc4F1CujIbf8dQvmVgiYCNRG1y6rvrjVYEet_KQG9xBu2sBEivYegtt8KZnCLbVFSDhtEMmbns2WFtRpquTQ9mBlhRv4QJNhB4eAUGgwG8L-jQCYQ8-GNaDTx5dUnacHwDSaZcNRHoEghHCA5-FtKpPWGTADn71HGOGPro_aAhWzUaWJ211ORdcK8UjVkXeItCzmn8deDD3CK9d2-DJLvy3FMi-MLpZMkWMuvdmdOgRzsN-uK1Fe5JNV7Ar-2_mNg%3D%3D)

_I'm not a man full of empty promises,_ I actually have a plan to combat the humanitarian crisis ignored by the liberals in charge. We must:

* **_Finish building the wall._** Secure our open borders and take real action on illegal immigration. Withhold taxpayer-funded grants from sanctuary cities, and require deportation for illegal immigrants caught committing VIOLENT crimes.
* **_Focus on drug and anti-crime policies on today's challenges._** Hire and retain more law enforcement officers – including funding for U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) – focused on drug and gang corridors that move drugs and lead to human trafficking.

**_And I've actually done it:_ I wrote the law that expanded the required use of E-Verify, protecting American jobs and wages. And I've voted to get tough on so-called Sanctuary Cities.**

[**We can no longer sit on the sidelines while Democrats let criminals pour into our country – _enough is enough!_ I need your immediate donation to ensure we CLOSE the border and secure our country.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_e=2F4sEpEY_C5cqfJ8W07QqQadgVK8bauAdRxF6pDigmPf10UvQKJISrrGeJulSEl-MWMjkBQC6WHtuXIbLd7RwNrEQidikg8SCMvXRBgILfXCTtZxz-pU_-fr9KSTDsesdQky-inUAHQL2dyFN5bHSgc4F1CujIbf8dQvmVgiYCNRG1y6rvrjVYEet_KQG9xBu2sBEivYegtt8KZnCLbVFSDhtEMmbns2WFtRpquTQ9mIi4SSqx2WoCzrrC1xYcIWJ4-c-s6wCfZmAgxv2JmdRvci0-Wqh08GzO-pHlFQApErJwV0jrae3cWx-_tFyFTm4wDtsW-pu1fOY4CB7uyrmEBFXnREW9lKJIqO4MJPSSIhVsVnJJfPHEH9QMieo9EbfSDHqBp64Bjcu7vkOHIrpg%3D%3D)

[ **SEND RYAN MACKENZIE TO FIX THE BORDER**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_e=2F4sEpEY_C5cqfJ8W07QqQadgVK8bauAdRxF6pDigmPf10UvQKJISrrGeJulSEl-MWMjkBQC6WHtuXIbLd7RwNrEQidikg8SCMvXRBgILfXCTtZxz-pU_-fr9KSTDsesdQky-inUAHQL2dyFN5bHSgc4F1CujIbf8dQvmVgiYCNRG1y6rvrjVYEet_KQG9xBu2sBEivYegtt8KZnCLbVFSDhtEMmbns2WFtRpquTQ9lsMZR_wLp3b4-49tvcp_kRHN_sS4L_sT8KuQvDez8cRiYXN81TqVLfeKnqVJYpgkwPvBV066Gf9-0p_jr21_NUq--wm1CjWo-xkjlLgmQ9cDtTRPIViD7H-KohuImlrRvXBjKkCbo5CM4tVi4KD5C-0CcqU9Db4JNLedY-JX79BQ%3D%3D)

President Biden has refused to address the border crisis – _he's too busy vacationing at the beach._

We need decisive leadership to actually **get the job done** of securing the border – **_and I'm the man for that job._** We need to stop the criminals and narcotics from coming into our country, period!

I'm tired of a do-nothing Washington, _and I'm sure you are too._ It's time for action, [**which is why I'm looking for your support of any amount to send me to Washington and secure the border.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_e=2F4sEpEY_C5cqfJ8W07QqQadgVK8bauAdRxF6pDigmPf10UvQKJISrrGeJulSEl-MWMjkBQC6WHtuXIbLd7RwNrEQidikg8SCMvXRBgILfXCTtZxz-pU_-fr9KSTDsesdQky-inUAHQL2dyFN5bHSgc4F1CujIbf8dQvmVgiYCNRG1y6rvrjVYEet_KQG9xBu2sBEivYegtt8KZnCLbVFSDhtEMmbns2WFtRpquTQ9kE4qLAcczgbOZav7CQ2aT2MebsFl2tNASt_4P2RBFTGEtjg3aZvagIxcNB1heTouPpdrVDyIQfusOU1ZEJdKct8UWH4bMCHNYjQcnS6iO3VO4rk4EKpC4buKHtsGQy1uc5tDLIydiONS5QQGBNj91CgUqczxxkK4G-0ObRd0RYbg%3D%3D)

[**Please, I can't do this alone.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=09a23ac1252e4c68be2992ae54d8277a&_e=2F4sEpEY_C5cqfJ8W07QqQadgVK8bauAdRxF6pDigmPf10UvQKJISrrGeJulSEl-MWMjkBQC6WHtuXIbLd7RwNrEQidikg8SCMvXRBgILfXCTtZxz-pU_-fr9KSTDsesdQky-inUAHQL2dyFN5bHSgc4F1CujIbf8dQvmVgiYCNRG1y6rvrjVYEet_KQG9xBu2sBEivYegtt8KZnCLbVFSDhtEMmbns2WFtRpquTQ9lG-vjHDhKMioMr6K7RAwBfgFA95wxot6L0CbwFed2pwX4wcoSXXRX4Nt-Z0JwZVjawl7jA0wxufUbqF8LXhXw3tDaaK-uMQjD4S0TzKxdBjL-ye0R4QuOaAPFtoKOUr84BMnbGblDs5-CmacZtl1WtZDoqyRpH4PBTqcPXc2bNhA%3D%3D)

clean_body: If you’re tired of empty promises in Washington about securing our southern border, then I need you to read this email immediately. | | Fellow American, There is a full-fledged crisis at our southern border and Democrats in Congress don't seem to care at all. The number of illegal immigrants crossing in a single month is often the size of a small city's population. Within those numbers are illegal aliens affiliated with criminal cartels, free to roam our neighborhoods. Previously arrested or convicted criminal illegal aliens are free to commit serious criminal offenses again. We are at a breaking point. Your safety is at risk every single day because of the reckless policies upheld by Democrats. We need strong patriots who are TOUGH on border security, and I'm the man for the job. Will you chip in any amount today to send me to Congress and secure the border? I'm not a man full of empty promises, I actually have a plan to combat the humanitarian crisis ignored by the liberals in charge. We must: Finish building the wall. Secure our open borders and take real action on illegal immigration. Withhold taxpayer-funded grants from sanctuary cities, and require deportation for illegal immigrants caught committing VIOLENT crimes. Focus on drug and anti-crime policies on today's challenges. Hire and retain more law enforcement officers – including funding for U.S. Customs and Border Protection (CBP) and Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) – focused on drug and gang corridors that move drugs and lead to human trafficking. And I've actually done it: I wrote the law that expanded the required use of E-Verify, protecting American jobs and wages. And I've voted to get tough on so-called Sanctuary Cities. President Biden has refused to address the border crisis – he's too busy vacationing at the beach. We need decisive leadership to actually get the job done of securing the border – and I'm the man for that job. We need to stop the criminals and narcotics from coming into our country, period! I'm tired of a do-nothing Washington, and I'm sure you are too. clean_body: | | Did you see Darcy’s message? Extremist groups like Moms for Liberty are pouring money into our NJ school board races to expand their influence across the state. These MAGA-aligned groups have the funding, but most voters agree with our anti-censorship message. If we want to protect our children’s education and keep partisan culture wars out of our public schools, we need to make sure they hear that message. = | | = Read Darcy’s Message Below: Here at Districts for Democracy, we currently are monitoring almost 100 school board candidates across nearly as many races. If we can raise $50k, we can immediately donate $500 to each candidate and get them the starter resources they need to win their races. The NJ school board filing deadline was last month, which means our work heats up now. Protecting our children’s education from extremist culture wars and censorship starts right here with our school board elections. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = These candidates need resources right away if they want to win – which means lawn signs, letters, postcards, door hangers, websites, media ads, and MORE. I know this seems like a lot, but MAGA-aligned groups are going to be flooding money in these school board races, and we need the resources to fight back. Public schools teaching history, civics, science, and critical thinking are vital to preserving democracy in America, which is why we can’t afford to let culture wars win. = Thank you for standing with us, Darcy Draeger Executive Director | Districts for Democracy will work one school board, legislative, and congressional district at a time to recruit and support candidates committed to freedom of inquiry, thought, and speech for everyone. We want to keep the culture wars out of our schools, return school board elections to their nonpartisan roots, and keep our schools and universities focused on their central mission: helping our kids become educated and engaged citizens of these United States. = = Paid for by Districts for Democracy Districts for Democracy P.O. |

Chris Christie, former Republican Joe Scarborough, and Mika Brzezinski all had a lot to say about me and this movement we're creating.

Fellow American, they can preach to their far-left audiences all they want, it's not going to stop me from speaking the TRUTH the D.C. Establishment doesn't want you to hear.

**Their name-calling won't stop me.**

_**[Will you stand with me, Fellow American?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=b6ea9ba68e494a5db42abada47554fa3&_e=JYrHaMRRZToCD6QN4jBUBaHc1jBOc1Ps1M4IGP57vfdiTIjktmZXKqYtrl7UrKVh8ydvZzQCKuAbZQb5CNVMC7WkcQK-a1Zu-uUk3QWJSBLIVfEIWm60jneH_nXDYXxIYuc4-STtdC0gWNRGfXiDNFYqZyLYOm7dYn2qypFnULMrrdfN_TN8Nj0-Axqz9flxEg6ewzmwhvYyEvo6HOiqbbnWFbYWNkAyPdXeOa2BDvsb_wR7-8LXZl7qFpM2504Nsz992CYTXGhQcfl6qukp6ktd37gzFAwclViOtz3PiWsrzjd_L3fTFxqUBfNdXJC-R7Aw2X0fhyxGYPAlh8AHVBkIwgvIuhI9p81rSHatWUs6RGWrw-RTBoRAbewU1f5bwrm0NKatchD2jTTYRC7deH7m-5v-iQz3PeWR42Pjz8A%3D)**_

Chris Christie's interview on MSNBC made one thing clear: It doesn't matter if you have an R or a D next to your name, the “New Establishment” all share the same things:
* Pro-war in Ukraine
* Fine with political opponents getting arrested
* Anti-free speech
* Bought & paid for by Super PACs
* Pretends to be anti-establishment

It's laughable that MSNBC will trot out someone like Chris Christie to bash me so they can feign “bipartisanship” while still totally hiding from direct debate with me.

I won't ever back down from speaking the TRUTH, even if it's not popular with the mainstream media. That's why I am looking forward to the first Republican Presidential Debate later this month, but I need your help to secure a center spot on stage.

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Will you renew your membership for the 4th consecutive year?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This is your LAST chance.

|
---
| | | |
---

**Are you there? I still haven 't heard back from you...**

Friend,

It's Kevin McCarthy. Because you are one of our _**TOP**_ patriots, I am giving you _**one last chance**_ to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership and confirm you are a patriot willing to fight for the future of our country. **[Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zce2n729oca76kdcdp35f16tbfg51bjbg6s9ntk0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm8ob4cdh2bs "Will you please confirm before the deadline passes?")**

---
**Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a Republican Member for the 4th consecutive year, or have we lost your support for good?**
Thank you,

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Your input is needed
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=556a7fa2a1f04a608b3b8f70107251d7&_e=Dh-naUyO4XA4Wj0zzCWGxEwyM574_FuD0jhK4ADg7xN3cLW1G7_k3dvb3weNWzNSzx4qQB4Izkh-bJbuvD4BaOsyUzpNiC-fuCEFzWxkWmGdQOpFbc_CB2DcZLQZWEAhnK9l1dBNxuisN-Qhnz9sxULiMCe639xtcWOKi4ylfBM5D_TeJN4JLzclhGpdc7xs14yzLwBuoaY_NXBRt650q3CRBWNzwONS_TC8P0aaLx8gEOQnHLCVEFVWjCoPqKu3QdNJ8_IWZpIJVNEC_Bwa45_LXAQjvVbqJjmGLSxSWS8W-7_ip6oncB-kOHQS4PLvsSAMeC5m1qv1oeDtejvoFqe5THSpA3jD0IGODLYQ0b71RfxEOGZAyB5h0-R3EGZ3WWiDAVEFoI7z8GCyHHYqsUb88PgGhW4Sc_ySdwAGXZ8%3D)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=556a7fa2a1f04a608b3b8f70107251d7&_e=Dh-naUyO4XA4Wj0zzCWGxEwyM574_FuD0jhK4ADg7xN3cLW1G7_k3dvb3weNWzNSzx4qQB4Izkh-bJbuvD4BaOsyUzpNiC-fuCEFzWxkWmGdQOpFbc_CB2DcZLQZWEAhnK9l1dBNxuisN-Qhnz9sxULiMCe639xtcWOKi4ylfBM5D_TeJN4JLzclhGpdc7xs14yzLwBuoaY_NXBRt650q3CRBWNzwONS_TC8P0aaLx8gEOQnHLCVEFVWjCoPqKu3QdNJ8_IWZpIJVNEC_Bwa4wM4WBfQDfxrYC81NyJYQ6ydDmAlLCWFmxIsi591bO5v6Ifejgg9KdX3eZAR72qc9apfqHrGcgsWOrfcU5SAoqhB1uGk9HN6z2Y2Y7vPDRLU4hdC0moe3M3bl6vmE45EdgbHAtv_ru1czQxQ_jXKmtc%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=556a7fa2a1f04a608b3b8f70107251d7&_e=Dh-naUyO4XA4Wj0zzCWGxEwyM574_FuD0jhK4ADg7xN3cLW1G7_k3dvb3weNWzNSzx4qQB4Izkh-bJbuvD4BaOsyUzpNiC-fuCEFzWxkWmGdQOpFbc_CB2DcZLQZWEAhnK9l1dBNxuisN-Qhnz9sxULiMCe639xtcWOKi4ylfBM5D_TeJN4JLzclhGpdc7xs14yzLwBuoaY_NXBRt650q3CRBWNzwONS_TC8P0aaLx8gEOQnHLCVEFVWjCoPqKu3QdNJ8_IWZpIJVNEC_Bwa44e-0QXGefw-Mw91KC5kiOTCUd1iLYGNlqD8Sl5KM_l7sCtrXaDIcdJpVBqbGshZEHyqWvb5CK-B_G-YYqDBE4Df3vnWkBv_jmuBuJnMsKbaiMl0omFgql_Xc4e1qLU9xL-khw0GKe5XAyzSwA-3UuI%3D) [NO](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=556a7fa2a1f04a608b3b8f70107251d7&_e=Dh-naUyO4XA4Wj0zzCWGxEwyM574_FuD0jhK4ADg7xN3cLW1G7_k3dvb3weNWzNSzx4qQB4Izkh-bJbuvD4BaOsyUzpNiC-fuCEFzWxkWmGdQOpFbc_CB2DcZLQZWEAhnK9l1dBNxuisN-Qhnz9sxULiMCe639xtcWOKi4ylfBM5D_TeJN4JLzclhGpdc7xs14yzLwBuoaY_NXBRt650q3CRBWNzwONS_TC8P0aaLx8gEOQnHLCVEFVWjCoPqKu3QdNJ8_IWZpIJVNEC_Bwa43zEyJBQCqQ2rmVUlbhe2yxv5msHM6OGGxPFcV_lFrSr6u5U9jeXrOcR0Xxa4nSWr3NRt1oXgZjyLuOTwNsGVEk4-50MWjbQR1xRcfnJjOsBpexreqY8hLcf8tVD7p9vVUON_91mXSz0r-hAFLDpNhE%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=556a7fa2a1f04a608b3b8f70107251d7&_e=Dh-naUyO4XA4Wj0zzCWGxEwyM574_FuD0jhK4ADg7xN3cLW1G7_k3dvb3weNWzNSzx4qQB4Izkh-bJbuvD4BaOsyUzpNiC-fuCEFzWxkWmGdQOpFbc_CB2DcZLQZWEAhnK9l1dBNxuisN-Qhnz9sxULiMCe639xtcWOKi4ylfBM5D_TeJN4JLzclhGpdc7xs14yzLwBuoaY_NXBRt650q3CRBWNzwONS_TC8P0aaLx8gEOQnHLCVEFVWjCoPqKu3QdNJ8_IWZpIJVNEC_Bwa44ByAIv-JLCHU0Q9Rl9AgIVzjG03i9Mxe_4yYrR1aUG9wOusdoylCDEcirpRGa3X1x7hfcIDdNPsfmSs96F0z6AYIl0LBJsNL_FYWpf9R52vLoGinZN1jxGTVfG4mcfmgenywwaZLygRiV_AnxyP92E%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60a87ea9c22f4541ace73c44a5684aee&_e=IPUqLigcLquO6QZ-vlvYg94vcDvg1dvp1_WdhS3IhtXaxxg4cfIgtMdGQxdQ30eiciqoJHXTRrbOLPvGjnIFcQMYq7dmXoMVt3veZi6p3ZFOZsuJVr9-dohbziXZglqJ1CZ5HSH5DemNVRBnrd5j0y4Uk76Ul_M46ccXPQknevCXcyG6NgHVBgk6vH8_dSp9ziCnqpIZo8ULp4JgreNMpxNrUtQlEvtiaWTSeEBIAp-tRxt2rOqsQECDieCiZrT4Rk5OP-2UA_wHzICtALDBak_P6UsgWW0AiAk6-SCc3umnCE3BBWUj7PU5lS5K2UcCZsKvtUkLZHTdZVEy8QDgTCL3-tEIiD62lbFHzlXE9TT0eygGJS_7HtkICMO-_pGz9QPCkLa8yecc0vfYgI-hWxLE17vwc0-lencJuyglgG0%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60a87ea9c22f4541ace73c44a5684aee&_e=IPUqLigcLquO6QZ-vlvYg94vcDvg1dvp1_WdhS3IhtXaxxg4cfIgtMdGQxdQ30eiciqoJHXTRrbOLPvGjnIFcQMYq7dmXoMVt3veZi6p3ZFOZsuJVr9-dohbziXZglqJ1CZ5HSH5DemNVRBnrd5j0y4Uk76Ul_M46ccXPQknevCXcyG6NgHVBgk6vH8_dSp9ziCnqpIZo8ULp4JgreNMpxNrUtQlEvtiaWTSeEBIAp-tRxt2rOqsQECDieCiZrT4Rk5OP-2UA_wHzICtALDBaovPT9c_THlA8jsKDsYahkLzTG5xVZYg8i8OIodfDX8shLA21Br09TTbEhMXKXFac2NX_J4KDdifFBo-Zy3pJbzuyq2rBtMbiFOB1zGQB7pptEL0A3vFroe_o9si5xpD_wfpUa1styOaHEQ416KTF4o%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60a87ea9c22f4541ace73c44a5684aee&_e=IPUqLigcLquO6QZ-vlvYg94vcDvg1dvp1_WdhS3IhtXaxxg4cfIgtMdGQxdQ30eiciqoJHXTRrbOLPvGjnIFcQMYq7dmXoMVt3veZi6p3ZFOZsuJVr9-dohbziXZglqJ1CZ5HSH5DemNVRBnrd5j0y4Uk76Ul_M46ccXPQknevCXcyG6NgHVBgk6vH8_dSp9ziCnqpIZo8ULp4JgreNMpxNrUtQlEvtiaWTSeEBIAp-tRxt2rOqsQECDieCiZrT4Rk5OP-2UA_wHzICtALDBasbRZrV0L_fum1S5jBqoogwyRNRugwWnjoDhxtK6p3uJDw9-tZbHruaChYXWYTAyw_VbzCKkympwpgtH6ZqwSXPkmCQGvlOzZVZj0wfhWHz5EWpkTQG7O0itQ9pb8veTvUI39kTZChEGY4cLD6t7lAI%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=60a87ea9c22f4541ace73c44a5684aee&_e=IPUqLigcLquO6QZ-vlvYg94vcDvg1dvp1_WdhS3IhtXaxxg4cfIgtMdGQxdQ30eiciqoJHXTRrbOLPvGjnIFcQMYq7dmXoMVt3veZi6p3ZFOZsuJVr9-dohbziXZglqJ1CZ5HSH5DemNVRBnrd5j0y4Uk76Ul_M46ccXPQknevCXcyG6NgHVBgk6vH8_dSp9ziCnqpIZo8ULp4JgreNMpxNrUtQlEvtiaWTSeEBIAp-tRxt2rOqsQECDieCiZrT4Rk5OP-2UA_wHzICtALDBaqmusjCeCNSL1-ABXRGvP0YjNvFjdiMICem7E4Ujiflrx2RBIebk2vu3rbx_P15O5X3rklVFB6IV-gVJwV57RwNvNDRc5_HvbeFhlpFO7E6QgADXAYYOK7mtAKnz-hnCH6Ls8kyvh7xpPfIsAfL5Ws4%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College

| | **_LAUNCHING: Donor Drive to keep Georgia BLUE**_ So far this year, just over 6,000 grassroots supporters have chipped in to support our work to keep Georgia blue next year. That’s a LOT of support – **_but that’s HALF as many supporters as this time last year!** [**_If you know you’re with us, pitch in right now to help us grow our grassroots team!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68070467/421833325/710125701?refcode=20230814.1_GADems_8T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU1NmEzYy1iYjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZxSEYYrnOeboKh7S1soJbylVd_WqhWgzRD3Da2ICLU=)**__

We get it – the 2024 election feels like it’s ages away. **But the reality is, it’s here right now.**

What we do in the next six months will determine what happens on election day.

Will we be able to build the volunteer network across Georgia that will reach out to voters in critical swing districts?

Will we be able to fund outreach and Get Out The Vote ads to make sure voters are ready to head to the polls to vote for Joe Biden?

And will we be able to protect the voting rights of millions of Georgians with the best voter protection team in the entire country?

[**_The answers to all these questions depend on what we do NOW. So please, don’t wait. Pitch in right now to our Donor Drive to keep Georgia BLUE in 2024.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68070468/421833326/710125701?refcode=20230814.1_GADems_8T&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NmU1NmEzYy1iYjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AZxSEYYrnOeboKh7S1soJbylVd_WqhWgzRD3Da2ICLU=)**_

Thank you,

GA Dems
