name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: ALERT: Gov. Pritzker Buys Time with Gun Ban as He Builds Case for DNC Nomination
body:
As Gov. Pritzker positions himself as an alternative to Pres. Biden, the IL Supreme Court's ruling against IL State Rep. Caulkins was perfect timing.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/8337f519b65d/alert-gov-pritzker-buys-time-with-gun-ban-as-he-builds-case-for-dnc-nomination?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Gov. JB Pritzker Buys Time with Defeat over Caulkins' Assault Weapons Ban Challenge, but DeVore's TRO and Challenge Against the Ban Continues (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/gov-jb-pritzker-buys-time-with-defeat-over-caulkins-assault-weapons-ban-challenge-but-devores-tro-and-challenge-against-the-ban-continues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/gov-jb-pritzker-buys-time-with-defeat-over-caulkins-assault-weapons-ban-challenge-but-devores-tro-and-challenge-against-the-ban-continues.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Ill. State Rep. Dan Caulkins holds a news conference at the Illinois State Fair Friday after the state Supreme Court sided against him by ruling that the state's assault weapons ban did not violate the state constitution. (Source: Blueroomstream.com)

Friday’s Illinois Supreme Court ruling (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/08/breaking-illinois-supreme-court-rules-4-3-against-dan-caulkins-assault-weapons-ban-case-says-ban-doesnt-violate-state-constitution-in-another-blow-to-gun-advocates.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) against Illinois State Rep. Dan Caulkins’ challenge of the Assault Weapons Ban undoubtedly was a victory for Gov. JB Pritzker, who touted just last week that Illinois has become the Most Progressive State (https://www.chicagomag.com/news/illinois-is-the-most-progressive-state/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) under his watch. While the Caulkins’ defeat kicked off a weekend of celebration for Gov. Pritzker, even including an appearance (https://abc7chicago.com/kamala-harris-chicago-schedule-today-vice-president-joe-biden/13632871/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) by Vice President Kamala Harris in Chicago, the fight against the Assault Weapons Ban is far from over.

The Illinois Supreme Court’s ruling comes just three weeks after the Court gave Gov. Pritzker a huge win by finding his controversial
SAFE-T Act constitutional (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/07/illinois-supreme-court-rules-in-favor-of-eliminating-cash-bail-says-its-constitutional-dealing-a-blow-to-safe-t-act-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . And it was only a few weeks before then that Gov. Pritzker won his bid for Chicago to host the 2024 Democratic National Convention (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/05/chicago-police-department-issues-carjacking-alerts-as-city-prepares-to-host-2024-democratic-national-convention-amid-police-officer-shortage.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) . As Gov. Pritzker continues to position himself as the common-sense alternative (https://thehill.com/homenews/campaign/3957378-pritzker-stirs-white-house-speculation-as-chicago-gears-up-for-democratic-convention/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to embattled President Biden for the 2024 Democratic presidential nomination, the Caulkins’ defeat could not come at a better time for Gov. Pritzker.

But even as Caulkins’ case has been snuffed out, with the Illinois Supreme Court even going so far as to say that Caulkins has
waived (https://ilcourtsaudio.blob.core.windows.net/antilles-resources/resources/3ada0367-2637-42d9-b823-cfa97ae14924/Caulkins%20v.%20Pritzker,%202023%20IL%20129453.pdf?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) all other challenges to the Assault Weapons Ban, the ruling leaves open the door for the series of consolidated cases against the gun ban brought by former Republican Attorney General candidate Thomas DeVore, who went on record (https://www.facebook.com/thomas.devore.92/videos/6519926304710662?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) Friday night to defend the merits of his cases.

On January 20th, a week-and-a-half after the Assault Weapons Ban went into effect, Gov. Pritzker was caught flat-footed when an Effingham County judge entered a
Temporary Restraining Order (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-judge-rules-in-favor-of-former-ag-candidate-tom-devore-and-over-860-plaintiffs-halts-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (TRO) against his gun ban.

Since that early win, DeVore secured additional TROs across Illinois, with additional plaintiffs joining his consolidated litigation (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/illinois-supreme-court-denies-consolidation-of-state-rep-caulkins-lawsuit-against-gov-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-with-the-devore-cases.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Effingham County that covers more than 7000 Illinoisans, including nearly 200 gun shops.

When Effingham County judge Joshua Morrison entered the TRO, his
order (https://drive.google.com/file/d/1MvVjOOuD-kcN4flDyv8evltvfM0cDU3a/view?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) found that DeVore was likely to prevail on the Equal Protection grounds. That was not an invitation to take the matter directly to the Illinois Supreme Court. Rather, it was the judge signaling to the parties that if the case is developed and brought to trial, DeVore is likely to win.

DeVore’s Equal Protection argument is based on seemingly arbitrary
exemptions (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/second-effingham-county-judge-enters-restraining-order-against-pritzkers-assault-weapons-ban-cites-appellate-court-ruling-and-equal-protection-clause.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the gun ban that allow for certain people to purchase or own banned weapons.

For instance, active and retired law enforcement are excluded from the ban, as are active military, prison guards, and employees in private security.

Not excluded, however, are retired members of the military.

In other words, a
mall cop (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r1BST11qzl8&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) is exempt from the assault weapons ban and is free to buy an AR-15, but a retired member of SEAL Team Six is not.

To prevail on this argument, though, DeVore would have to show that the State cannot satisfy its legal burden to justify the constitutional violation – that is, at a minimum there must be some rational basis justifying these exemptions.

And DeVore has been doing just that: he served discovery requests on the defendants including requests for admission that the gun ban legislation provides no justification whatsoever for these exemptions, and he has been seeking emails from state legislators sent in the eleventh hour before the Assault Weapons Ban suddenly became law.

Then entered Rep. Caulkins, who
filed (https://www.decaturtribune.com/2023/01/27/state-representative-dan-caulkins-files-lawsuit-to-defend-second-amendment-rights/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) his separate stand-alone complaint that largely copied DeVore’s complaints, including the same Equal Protection violations.

Without developing any record before the trial court, Caulkins filed a direct appeal (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/macon-county-judge-grants-rep-caulkins-summary-judgment-motion-fast-tracks-case-to-illinois-supreme-court.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to the Illinois Supreme Court on the ultimate issue of the Equal Protection issue.

Caulkins’ failure is no surprise to Illinois Review, who
previously reported (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/state-rep-dan-caulkins-jumps-the-gun-on-pritzker-lawsuit-seeks-summary-judgment-on-equal-protection-violations.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) that Caulkins’ direct appeal was likely to fail because his case was devoid of any record.

In fact, Illinois Review publisher Scott Kaspar wrote an op-ed speculating that Caulkins’ behavior was so odd, that he must have
cut a deal (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/kaspar-caulkins-sprint-to-the-il-supreme-court-jeopardizes-rights-of-thousands-of-illinoisans-and-livelihoods-of-hundreds-of-small-business-owners-and-their-employees.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with Gov. Pritzker. As Kaspar stated on One America Network (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gg_Zmd-CDww&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (OAN), Caulkins drew public scorn by adding constituents to his case in exchange for a $200 campaign donation.

DeVore’s consolidated litigation now moves forward with discovery regarding the basis of the exemptions and how they came to be. DeVore has served requests to admit on the Democratic House and Senate leadership to confirm that there was no basis in the legislation for the exemptions.

DeVore also is seeking production of Democratic legislators’ emails relating to the passage of the Assault Weapons Ban. DeVore believes that these documents will shed light on why these exemptions were placed in the ban and will demonstrate that the exemptions were necessary to secure the votes to pass the legislation.

But because these documents also will show which legislators and special interests control Springfield, attorneys from the AG’s Office representing Gov. Pritzker, AG Raoul, and the House and Senate leadership have not produced any documents and so far have refused to comply with the discovery requests.

DeVore’s consolidated litigation also challenges the Assault Weapons Ban based on the “Three Readings” rule and other procedural grounds that were not before the Illinois Supreme Court.

While the Caulkins’ and DeVore litigations were brought in Illinois state court as violations of the Illinois Constitution, the Assault Weapons Ban also has been challenged in federal court as violating the Second Amendment of the US Constitution.

Illinois State Rifle Association (https://isra.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) (ISRA), which brought one such federal lawsuit released this statement (https://www.facebook.com/photo?fbid=659721809526741&set=a.469822858516638&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) on Friday:

“[G]un advocates across the state should not lose hope because our federal case—the ISRA case—which we expect to go before the U.S. Supreme Court, will prove to be a victory not just for law-abiding gun owners in Illinois—but across the country. And the ISRA and the Second Amendment Foundation are proud to stand up for gunowners as we take our case to the highest court in the land.”

Please continue to follow Illinois Review and
DeVore Law Offices (https://devorelawoffices.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for more updates as they become available.
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=f4db02529c-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_08_14_03_40&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-f4db02529c-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

subject: Who rules whom?
body:
The Constitution established a limited government in which the people ruled through their elected officials.

| | |

| | This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dafc632c68f4426b81f4a0870cd567e&_e=_wEY22OogmtUYXQg1Uc2UjWjn_2nkmxmHIlrlSYL53OlO_oAaTxIEoPrbFD4bcIjayL-NjZjThFth6-yfLanKiGzahdxgFgsO7bNQr7n2FRhgPUXk31m7BeF-hMMS1Si1esnIRGOoNd1RO39YhZj_Cy_XiDde5DVr5gEDd-Iw0kb6xd6kepqpg2naF7CWrtFVvHTui1gW2lTfwQBweJO45hjChsKqvtQQTep39_msAmVFz_Cujg0gtVRHcZ29BONIsKDSPaNbLD2w7yQF8mGO7ElOHemuEV-x5bwe0X1lJipT_66E5CytOXhgE_urbvsPDRWUGVD_Hw5RtFoEN6BeTJ6Vl6MhGkQcA7kcqAzmTcdXtzBdIkZsGW2a75d8BAEuW0bT5UA23CH_KOZDOcGtCc0hAfVbCuxOSRLcWzOdnQ%3D)

| | | Dear Fellow American, Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its [**National Referendum on the Administrative State**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dafc632c68f4426b81f4a0870cd567e&_e=_wEY22OogmtUYXQg1Uc2UjWjn_2nkmxmHIlrlSYL53OlO_oAaTxIEoPrbFD4bcIjayL-NjZjThFth6-yfLanKiGzahdxgFgsO7bNQr7n2FRhgPUXk31m7BeF-hMMS1Si1esnIRGOoNd1RO39YhZj_Cy_XiDde5DVr5gEDd-Iw0kb6xd6kepqpg2naF7CWrtFVvHTui1gW2lTfwQBweJO45hjChsKqvtQQTep39_msAmVFz_Cujg0gtVRHcZ29BONIsKDSPaNbLD2w7yQF8mGO8tCty1IgOojev8c1EbELyutEtVNTMMXg6l2l3y4M3bcsUWtCi82Mq-0_72GVamqinCPRdSRjhntHs6hYYVDsP1kPdxxtr7mwUeQj7SNGskfKkmhfhMS0Jqdk9PSj8EW49Kg1gFXdoFcR8T0r0EIZjU%3D).
## Do you agree that there is a double standard for members of the administrative state--that the ruling elite is not required to follow the same rules as other Americans?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dafc632c68f4426b81f4a0870cd567e&_e=_wEY22OogmtUYXQg1Uc2UjWjn_2nkmxmHIlrlSYL53OlO_oAaTxIEoPrbFD4bcIjayL-NjZjThFth6-yfLanKiGzahdxgFgsO7bNQr7n2FRhgPUXk31m7BeF-hMMS1Si1esnIRGOoNd1RO39YhZj_Cy_XiDde5DVr5gEDd-Iw0kb6xd6kepqpg2naF7CWrtFVvHTui1gW2lTfwQBweJO45hjChsKqvtQQTep39_msAmVFz_Cujg0gtVRHcZ29BONIsKDSPaNbLD2w7yQF8mGOxZOtyiExyKXp0vkfWO18uzYYZVOmxWJjKgfImc28UgOtvWAuKuvkXsMap1c8BaM2UFKJtFqQ97Bn3U07NMy7AM0PIOfkHnx36Xb4ftKAYFu5ALLpEUCrfgwr6opRU98YHBGwb-zA7B9kdYQAOE2_QM%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dafc632c68f4426b81f4a0870cd567e&_e=_wEY22OogmtUYXQg1Uc2UjWjn_2nkmxmHIlrlSYL53OlO_oAaTxIEoPrbFD4bcIjayL-NjZjThFth6-yfLanKiGzahdxgFgsO7bNQr7n2FRhgPUXk31m7BeF-hMMS1Si1esnIRGOoNd1RO39YhZj_Cy_XiDde5DVr5gEDd-Iw0kb6xd6kepqpg2naF7CWrtFVvHTui1gW2lTfwQBweJO45hjChsKqvtQQTep39_msAmVFz_Cujg0gtVRHcZ29BONIsKDSPaNbLD2w7yQF8mGOwak3ezQfzZVsUh0UgEi3dqeovNFa-2oK5e7CasKpPEQQxEuzGERrhFsbSU83UgftMkwPvfi6GaZzlzbGzuat3TWV9PtkN8J131orbfw6ruzHy8cLSqGzdwh-2oRdWb7pX9OaCWLu5yCqbr88ehssnY%3D) Responding will only take a few minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right away...because **our country is facing a constitutional crisis**.

It's a crisis that involves a fundamental political question: **who rules whom?**

The Constitution established a limited government in which the **people** ruled through their elected officials. Under this form of government, America became the freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional system is one that increasingly exists in name only. **The Constitution of "We the People" is being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable administrative state that rules without the consent of American citizens.** This means we live in an era of growing bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers, and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

**But we can 't just TALK about the problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION--to DO SOMETHING about it, while there's still time to save our country. **

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to returning to the Constitution of "We the People"--before it's too late.

To do that, I need your input. What are your opinions on this topic--knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS that will restore liberty?

**Please let me know your thoughts today by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/administrative-state-survey/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8dafc632c68f4426b81f4a0870cd567e&_e=_wEY22OogmtUYXQg1Uc2UjWjn_2nkmxmHIlrlSYL53OlO_oAaTxIEoPrbFD4bcIjayL-NjZjThFth6-yfLanKiGzahdxgFgsO7bNQr7n2FRhgPUXk31m7BeF-hMMS1Si1esnIRGOoNd1RO39YhZj_Cy_XiDde5DVr5gEDd-Iw0kb6xd6kepqpg2naF7CWrtFVvHTui1gW2lTfwQBweJO45hjChsKqvtQQTep39_msAmVFz_Cujg0gtVRHcZ29BONIsKDSPaNbLD2w7yQF8mGOwQ7xSRrNSxKHgMRvF-ZhRqx6ndd5SIKPgdaL-hpwtYteKGXYn0SZ94qXHyRMEvXR0XzMegquKfsrJ_q7Mx2prlvTzJmWate3zFUHVAuetSx9lMA-5k1EMmBaCFm93kZc684Dby7BTB7SqzEyBMjaac%3D)**

Thank you for being on the side of the Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

subject: We’re not the enemy the NRCC wants to have…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68070922/421835182/-1289659762?amount=20&contactdata=03IJyhn+qKNpY69x6cXkjE4YiYR5t6wNOHlmJPtnlFHeuSdscaygXI7u5R5n/lqRZJvU1p+oq+HVTpeAcjr7RQBeSSYgOo+CaqdZrbNXMVJvOiGEQVr/qT7jGpg2EtJ+/iSeXcL6OASeXagiDSiJUw==&source=EM_NBI_SD_202308_FR_1.1_0_6MO_candidate_NA_NA_MMFR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZWEyOWFhNy1iYjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SzBLs58Ivo_WSKruqnM87WonTsTZoEWMP1vfVtZm03o=) It’s no secret: I am a top target in this race. The National Journal just came out with the shortlist of “all-star clashes that might decide the House” and I’m on it. The NRCC is putting money behind one of my opponents and has laid out their strategy to try to defeat me in 2024.

name: United We Dream
subject: Demand Governor Greg Abbott be held accountable and impeached!
body:
Send a message to Greg Abbott
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f52eafa-a30b-4c6c-a2c8-5430c5ed29ab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Peter, [**Tell Governor Greg Abbott: Don’t mess with Texans!**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0890b2cd-9f8e-43ac-8cfc-314562fe3d31/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) In his nine years as Governor of Texas, Greg Abbott has continuously failed our communities by putting his political stunts and thirst for power above the well-being of our people. Just this month, horrific details were revealed about his inhumane treatment of migrants at the border. He ordered Texas troopers to deny water to migrants and push children back into the Rio Grande River. Human beings should be treated with dignity and respect, but as long as Greg Abbott continues to be in power, this complete disregard to human rights will continue. We cannot allow Abbott to continue targeting our communities and putting his self-interests above the dignity of Texans. Texas leaders need to hold Governor Greg Abbott accountable for his cruel and inhumane actions and initiate impeachment NOW. Otherwise, Abbott will continue using his political power to cause division in our state and inflict hate and violence upon immigrants and communities of color. [ADD YOUR NAME and demand Governor Greg Abbott be held accountable and impeached! Let’s give Gov Abbott the boot!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdc46021a-e057-45c1-bbf9-eba3ac575fab/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta06250a7-952d-4e24-aec5-064e8f098f66/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |

|

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/baa_90do_rental_unitedwedream230808_215_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1257bfd9-afb8-4895-a58c-59a57fb9d7b5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

subject: Test your IRA IQ 🎓
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN COLLABORATIVE
body:

| | | | | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/3139?t=2&akid=13618%2E53494%2E3dnGE2)
---
| | Friend, It's been one year since we passed the most important climate legislation in US history. And the **Inflation Reduction Act (IRA)** is already growing clean energy economies from coast to coast.

You've heard us talk a lot about this bill. You helped get this bill passed. And you've seen the bill in action—creating good-paying jobs, boosting clean energy manufacturing, and investing in communities that need it the most.
---
| | **But how much do you**** _really_****know about the biggest piece of climate legislation in U.S. history?**

| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4983?t=9&akid=13618%2E53494%2E3dnGE2)

[Find out now: Test your IRA IQ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/4984?t=11&akid=13618%2E53494%2E3dnGE2)

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: “We’ll have a mugshot ready for you”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
An indictment is looming.

An indictment is looming.
| | Friend,
---
It's been reported that if I am unjustly indicted and arrested in the Atlanta Witch Hunt, a mugshot will be taken of me:
**_Georgia sheriff on Trump probe: "We'll have a mugshot ready for you_ "** [SOURCE: _Axios_]
Atlanta has already begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene.
_All signs indicate that a FOURTH SHAM INDICTMENT is on its way._
**The Left is trying their hardest to turn me - an innocent man - into a criminal, all while _they_ are the true criminals, violating our rights and weaponizing the legal system to imprison their leading opposition.**
These are the same thugs who attempted to _**FRAME**_ me as an agent of the Russian government.
Keep in mind - they've had access to just about every single piece of paper I've ever laid a finger on... and yet, they still can't find a crime to pin me down for.
If they can't find anything real after looking at my entire life under a microscope, then I must be one of the most honest people alive!
_The truth is: My only offense is opposing the Washington ruling class and standing up for the hardworking citizens of our country._
And in the eyes of the Deep State, there is no greater offense than that...
As a possible fourth sham indictment hangs over my head, I will continue our campaign to drain the corrupt Washington swamp and restore power to YOU, the American people.
_If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day._

clean_body: An indictment is looming. An indictment is looming. | | Friend, It's been reported that if I am unjustly indicted and arrested in the Atlanta Witch Hunt, a mugshot will be taken of me: Georgia sheriff on Trump probe: "We'll have a mugshot ready for you " [SOURCE: Axios] Atlanta has already begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that a FOURTH SHAM INDICTMENT is on its way. The Left is trying their hardest to turn me - an innocent man - into a criminal, all while they are the true criminals, violating our rights and weaponizing the legal system to imprison their leading opposition. These are the same thugs who attempted to FRAME me as an agent of the Russian government. Keep in mind - they've had access to just about every single piece of paper I've ever laid a finger on... and yet, they still can't find a crime to pin me down for. If they can't find anything real after looking at my entire life under a microscope, then I must be one of the most honest people alive! The truth is: My only offense is opposing the Washington ruling class and standing up for the hardworking citizens of our country. And in the eyes of the Deep State, there is no greater offense than that... As a possible fourth sham indictment hangs over my head, I will continue our campaign to drain the corrupt Washington swamp and restore power to YOU, the American people. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. But if not, I don't have to tell you that the stakes of this election have never been greater. Our Republic is hanging by a thread, and America needs you right now. | Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: Tue, August 8, 2023 Subject: BARRICADES AND ROAD CLOSURES To: /cdn-cgi/l/email-protection | Friend, I've been briefed on reports that Atlanta has begun setting up security barricades, shutting down roads surrounding the courthouse, and the Grand Jury is expected to reconvene. All signs indicate that your favorite president - whose only offense is challenging the political ruling class - may be INDICTED yet again as an innocent man. | [SOURCE: WSB-TV Atlanta] The prosecutor leading the witch hunt is so corrupt that even CNN (!!!) has called her out after she "intermixed her political fortunes with this case." Her bias was so terrible that she was REMOVED from one part of this witch hunt because of a "political conflict of interest" of her own creation. Do you think she's going to treat me fairly and put aside her extreme political biases? Not a chance! This is yet another political persecution of the ONLY candidate who can beat Crooked Joe and restore power to YOU, the American people. As I 've always said, they're not after me. They're after YOU. I'm only standing in the way. And even as a possible fourth indictment hangs over my head, I will continue to stand in their way, because the fate of our nation hangs in the balance in the 2024 election. It 's not just my freedom on the line, but yours as well - and I will NEVER let them take it from you. If you 're doing poorly due to the evil and corrupt people in Washington, D.C. who are destroying our country right now, then just hit the back button and go about your day. **Now, he’s up for re-election, and I’ve dedicated myself to doing everything I can to help him WIN in 2024.**
Rick doesn’t beat around the bush. He’s not afraid to ruffle some feathers on BOTH sides of the aisle if it means doing what’s right for America. He tells it like it is, and he comes armed with solutions to get our country back on track.

**But what stands out most about Rick Scott is that he is a WINNER.**

He tells it like it is, and he comes armed with solutions to get our country back on track. But what stands out most about Rick Scott is that he is a WINNER. Unfortunately, Rick’s Democrat challenger is apparently already raising millions, and right now, I need conservatives like you to step up. name: Gabe Amo
subject: #TeamGabe’s Travels Recap
body:
https://www.gabeamo.com/ [https://www.gabeamo.com/]

Friend,

This election will be over in just 22 days.

Our campaign recognizes how little time there is to talk to voters, and we are out – all day, every day – talking to voters all across the First District. To show you what we mean, I wanted to recap our day this past Saturday.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/105455/images/F3Xr3NvWsAAbVcR.jpeg]

📍The day started in Bristol, where I went to the Mount Hope Farmers Market and then to the Flea Market before knocking on doors in the area.
📍Next, we went from Bristol to East Providence for the Loof: East Providence Arts Festival.
📍From there, we traveled to Providence for the 30th African Summer Bash hosted by Oasis International.
📍Then, to Barrington we went for a 25+ person meet-and-greet, our 5th just last week.
📍 I finished my evening back in Providence at the Our Lady of the Rosary feast where I had some incredible bifana and chicken.

Ultimately, this campaign is about the people of Rhode Island’s First Congressional District. I spend so much time traveling across the entire district (don’t worry, I was in the Blackstone Valley on Friday!) because I believe that voters deserve to meet their candidates for Congress.

To help us continue our campaign’s aggressive efforts to be successful on September 5th, we need your help.

Can you chip in $15, $20, or as much as you’re able now to help us power this campaign.

DONATE $15 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=express_lane_15]
DONATE $20 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane=true&amount=20&refcode=express_lane_20]
DONATE $50 NOW >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane=true&amount=%2050&refcode=express_lane_%2050]
DONATE OTHER >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-aug?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.

With gratitude

Gabe Amo

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Targeted. Stalked. Assaulted.
body:
The transgender mob doesn't want me to be emailing you today. They would be reeling with anger if they knew I reached out.

| |
---
| | | _The transgender mob doesn 't want me to be emailing you today. They would be reeling with anger if they knew I reached out._

They've targeted me.

They've stalked my events and shouted me down.

They've even held me for ransom.

The mob wants me to be afraid and back down. _**[But here's the thing, when it comes to protecting your daughters and granddaughters, _I will never surrender._](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e46911004b44d45b895c085f298a47d&_e=3BXxBqRg4XAmm69wCkS66elRqVDk4KULv41fXyozWulcafnJVIdzFETqKozPiyZOXu3rCeADp__QGiN0JHcUc2sKGdpPUgyfhooe3sV2GpkqIPLvj3yWZISEtbMA9JAUETQT6H0Hj86V_FoSsTxq8-LgdnSXhLa40kbgpHA8sKUgMPfpVB-N44ObPO7PTDLon_I_gA_kMCoNvG5ggdFyqIZnCgoPlyi9p0AF7OiboR2srAoHXYAtZWWy_g-wXt-7c0KbIAQhIC5ITa8BKeZxzxbqpdz9ss4ueDrZOz8q-UTNhg2Frgt0dMF4_L2w1SwVQgzkn2KaY5mSjFiOjcAEFyRCooxpmza2T52j_aBN0jntGBSOnAH8Vw5CZHKig2xFXzFeqz0T8hmLuISPndyvLwTQQ1PlrPdqxJGs2kU7luXOf7OPJDGDuyXvxzju1duy "But here’s the thing, when it comes to protecting your daughters and granddaughters, I will never surrender.")**_

My name is Riley Gaines.

I'm a 12-time All-American swimmer and a recent college graduate who dreamed of pursuing a dental career. However, my plans changed when I was forced to share a podium with Lia Thomas, a biological male, at the NCAA championship.

I experienced firsthand the very thing Democrats and liberal activists want you to believe is an exaggeration. A major accomplishment was ripped from my grasp by a biological man.

Now, Democrats are unleashing woke athletes and violent activists to force me to bow down.

I've gone toe to toe with Megan Rapinoe, Brittney Griner, and Lia Thomas in defense of your daughters and granddaughters. I survived a brutal assault and ambush at my Saving Women's Sports speech at San Francisco State University.

And yet, I continue my mission to protect fair play and competition for biological women.

What's happening in women's athletics is a threat to us all. Their woke agenda won't just stop at sporting competitions. They won't be satisfied until all female opportunities are fundamentally destroyed by including biological males.

I refuse to let this happen on my watch, and I hope you'll join me. If you're willing to proudly protect female opportunities from biological men, _**[please accept my call to action.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=8e46911004b44d45b895c085f298a47d&_e=3BXxBqRg4XAmm69wCkS66elRqVDk4KULv41fXyozWulcafnJVIdzFETqKozPiyZOXu3rCeADp__QGiN0JHcUc2sKGdpPUgyfhooe3sV2GpkqIPLvj3yWZISEtbMA9JAUETQT6H0Hj86V_FoSsTxq8-LgdnSXhLa40kbgpHA8sKUgMPfpVB-N44ObPO7PTDLon_I_gA_kMCoNvG5ggdFyqIZnCgoPlyi9p0AF7OiboR2srAoHXYAtZWWy_g-wXt-7c0KbIAQhIC5ITa8BKeZxzxbqpdz9ss4ueDrZOz8q-US72npNxH7gzWyak3Ez5f0y_jankg-KdFLjOXzsDP22xacPzeJMef49EFUWZbIPZT0Jzv6kUbXXyLgTEFM_4hRt3p0UScFcSKuDVcWuaIRinCL8qgnBznh4ov3rNgUM2AnBXhbyE-_6uu-uxXpe_pu1 "please accept my call to action.")**_

Thank you,

Riley

body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWa8gKSDIN

Senate Republican leaders want your input via the Nationwide
Census

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWa8gKSDIN

Did you see this, Friend?

Senate Republicans asked me to reach out to some of our
most trusted supporters across the country to take the Official
Nationwide Census.

My team needed help locating your response, so we
attached the original email at the bottom just for you.

I was even told other top Republican surrogates like
Kellyanne Conway, Governor Kristi Noem, and Senators like Chuck
Grassley and Marco Rubio even asked you to take the Nationwide
Census.

We ALL KNOW that Republicans need input from dedicated
grassroots supporters like YOU to formulate our campaign strategy
and plan of attack to WIN in 2024. Can you spare a few minutes to
take the Official Nationwide Census? Your input is the KEY
difference maker.

Follow this unique link RIGHT NOW to complete the
Official 2023 NRSC Census to ensure your response is recorded. >>

Thank you,

Mike Pompeo
Former Secretary of State and CIA Director

P.S. Your response ensures Republicans have the BEST data
available to defeat the radical Democrats and save our country
next year. Take the Census as soon as possible! >>

TAKE THE CENSUS NOW >>

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mike Pompeo
Date: 07/14/2023
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

THE OFFICIAL 2023 NRSC CENSUS
COMPLETE NOW >>

Friend,

We're already 223 DAYS into 2023, and we need your help.

The National Republican Senatorial Committee has launched
a nationwide census to gather critical intel from our nation's
strongest Republicans, like YOU, to determine our annual agenda.

Unsurprisingly, YOU are the top Republican in YOUR STATE,
so I'm reaching out to you before anyone else to confirm your
information by taking the Official 2023 NRSC Census.

Friend, we can defend our country from Joe Biden and his
radical Left-wing handlers by securing the most up-to-date
information from patriots like YOU via the Official 2023 NRSC
Census.

The results from this census will be sent to the NRSC
Data Team in the NEXT HOUR, so please hurry.

Verify your information HERE, and you'll instantly be
redirected to the Official 2023 NRSC Census. >>

THE OFFICIAL 2023 NRSC CENSUS

DID YOU VOTE IN THE LAST PRESIDENTIAL ELECTION IN 2020?

YES >>

NO >>

TAKE THE 2023 CENSUS NOW >>

Friend, this is your LAST CHANCE to help Republican

name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Life in prison for doing his job?
body:
I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6g7je564p232km42qveurhbnl9r98shq89bchmo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr3oruhr58tls1coqvebljp6u8aoed49shs3bea8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbapj1mfmvivd1cgaus7sil2nmhe4t7oeteepo40_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z48vh1sb5c9oa78ntqk6elep5e2pc5bvmlr533l8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjocka9s5g9oacb7v9n289k23mv00cpm8mr41g40_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" \- and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8qs924ige6nndg2s6g9gbi4out66aut1enacuqo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvcttsv2o66ea74nth0b148okr1a9os1gn1duc8g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfbtkmm36bh9ll8ji90uc7r1m5o9kkd9g5jo5kkg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu3af8e8vtbag2epuq8s5ji0jervr82ig1u716qo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)
_That 's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zla87qtqksve4bpc3e7oh02u6lehjdmtlsnnc9q8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt878qk6qsp6u1iuc7hdnbd21ssfg9h9rtt3joa0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp34cli6ap70s8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11g1844rrpjsjjifpttm2hl7m7rr0mlvfk9ahs8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmao32chh2bs)_

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0uvsdthj31i4jaj2mure92hu7bb3dghf2q7stoo_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or4s9g62pb0c9i649fg)

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: August Recess Call to Action – Impeach Biden
body:
| | | [](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtOTcxMzA3Y2I5NWM2NGQ4ZThkYmJmMzJjOGE2NjZhMjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vbGlua3RyLmVlL2plbm55YmV0aG0_bWlkPTQ2NDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/ELG5yZa5jU0Orwf45Xhfow)
---
| | |
---
---
As we mentioned last week, Congress is in recess during August, and the call to action for the next two weeks is to urge our representatives to launch an impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden’s alleged crimes and corruption. We will do this in a few different ways, and details are below. Also, **join us tonight for a very special Spaces (live audio chats) tonight, Monday, August 14 at 8:00 PM ET** for a LIVE discussion on the possible impeachment of President Biden. [**You can join through this link,**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) whether or not you have an X/Twitter account.
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._LcEDgA)
---
|
---
# **AUGUST RECESS ACTIONS**
---
We need to pressure Congress to begin the inquiry, because although the evidence is clear that an inquiry should be launched at the very least, we are always dealing with human beings who are scared to rock the boat. They need courage, and courage for elected officials comes from knowing their constituents stand with them and support them. Or in some cases, it comes from being afraid they will lose their next election if they don’t accurately represent their constituents!
---
# **#1** **Deliver a Letter to Your Representative**
---
We’ve written a letter that you can customize with your name and your elected official’s name, print, sign, and deliver to your representative’s local office. The letter makes the argument as to why the representative should support an impeachment inquiry into Joe Biden’s alleged criminal conduct and corruption. We also have a [**one-pager**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) you can print that has guidance about how to meet with your elected official or a member of his or her staff. This one-pager lists out the steps you should follow to set the meeting, prepare for it, what to do during the meeting, and what to do afterward. _Note that you can also simply deliver the letter without having a formal meeting._ [Insert link to the one-pager from page 23 of the latest toolkit] Please take a minute to [**fill out this commitment form**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtOTcxMzA3Y2I5NWM2NGQ4ZThkYmJmMzJjOGE2NjZhMjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRoZXBhdHJpb3RjZW50ZXIub3JnL3Rha2UtYWN0aW9uLWF1Z3VzdC8_bWlkPTQ2NDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/NMOXvgo1YhtEfem_GFtwDA)**** to let us know that you will deliver this letter sometime in the next two weeks. You can download the letter there too. **The truth is, if you want Joe Biden impeached, you will have to help push Congress to do it! Please**[**commit**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtOTcxMzA3Y2I5NWM2NGQ4ZThkYmJmMzJjOGE2NjZhMjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiNSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vd3d3LnRoZXBhdHJpb3RjZW50ZXIub3JnL3Rha2UtYWN0aW9uLWF1Z3VzdC8_bWlkPTQ2NDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/gJ0wWYvxSS28zFjqTyoQXw)**to delivering the letter and get it done!**
---
[DELIVER LETTER](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
# **#2** **Complete the Align Act Campaign Again**
---
Complete our [**Impeach Biden Align Act campaign**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)**** for the first time or do it again! You can do it multiple times for greater impact. The more we contact our representatives, the more likely they will have the courage to actually impeach Joe Biden. Right now, we aren’t even sure they have the courage to open the impeachment inquiry at all. Phone calls are especially important, and you can call more than once! Call every day or once a week, whatever works for you. Just know that your efforts are crucial to the effort to hold the Biden Crime Family accountable.
---
[TAKE ACTION](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._5McAcV-w)
---
|
---
# **#3 Post on Social Media**
---
If you are on any social media platforms, share links to our RSVP form and the Align Act campaign. You can also amplify the message of “Impeach Joe Biden” by tagging your congressman and urging him or her to support the impeachment inquiry when the session begins in September.
---
|
---
| | [CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
---
|
---
[](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6NDkxMDk0ODksImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFRIiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtOTcxMzA3Y2I5NWM2NGQ4ZThkYmJmMzJjOGE2NjZhMjYiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMTAiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy50ZWFwYXJ0eXBhdHJpb3RzLm9yZy8_bWlkPTQ2NDgyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUSJ9/i6uAcITyQFMjQxKr1uTdxA)

name: The Collective PAC
subject: a search warrant for his TWITTER, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collective PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe [click here.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnl7NBjmTZL5F5oqdT0MFW4GJFfovgZaqyhL6oVedQTvxqf62j1-674ssdeYZmJRYBzWSHitiKSzbPsrpv-_hwFxmusDClMi_fBQryOBnrEe8R-nQg_-sIz51cE8FSDKrFYiKGqcLUxji41ilVDPlLIW2S6fBVLCIehwAtjqIRIgWlE4LXKflU4cTS_AlL6KAr10Trw2NvZ7OmcVSW1RVGWZjSJtIFjPT6FYDc_8rj6kyFlTxatdtT5gU-jFhJmZf7xLJ_iW6_nfQps7Db4g3pl5gZL28vFMKGo4sqWI86fpAKBgMcD2OtCQelGJCU8Qab-sp0RsG-nxPRVi845RbI5Pu-t4PjjlZ-gmle_Rz16HS1dYC9IpxKRLl2eMppXlM93T2sj_iCL54-Ij4tiRSpuaT_VXKt1xRwlO2BlhJsbdDpcv94eLQgJH5Tpr-8JOuHs/3yq/aZeoYtZWT0GH8kEwGA2kgg/h0/C1lLnt8cEb2DgkQGd658W1ghxFsQgW0tPsuPhsFs6Zc)
| | | Special Counsel Jack Smith is leaving no stone unturned in securing indictments against Donald Trump.

It’s been revealed that he even secured a search warrant for Donald Trump’s _TWITTER ACCOUNT_ back in January.

WE LOVE TO SEE IT. [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkMOfZquQRQxie7kYnycRNSiiugx9fPCOPSEhxoW2JVEDAFHXvkm2qhiTLd2o1gMAvHF01Qm6Tf98ZLaKSr5G91ucCpX1CG_u1l_x4txBr1QWbAxwxbYq0QCy_932jAOxAE1cCgCN5N1FzQJmnIcWo36nooLKgqu55JuOTCROWkMcUS2CLlSot8-3WG3zU-qv9nugrx92OfKR8fm6SUm5fM_bE6r6G_TaSiUAoPBY93jt_sfiWE4UTs29ieOX0Uz5BsqUBJPPJWwnyDw59RJR0sREP3NexYzPF6H47_G0-BEJfK-8bRNSVp8sFuXV5d58GrCDDi3pkTUol3094Hg2ekaMOFoDPb66sk2CEG5myYidC4p0-Hf1mBrHeihQWPmYU/3yq/aZeoYtZWT0GH8kEwGA2kgg/h1/I5WkqXZoztcQFyEILDL5exdZAyp3jEsIJfscah8xE6s) Nobody is above the law, Peter, not even a former U.S. president.

[But we want to know what you think, Peter. How would you rate Special Counsel Jack Smith’s performance when it comes to nailing Donald Trump for each charge? ](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkMOfZquQRQxie7kYnycRNSiiugx9fPCOPSEhxoW2JVEDAFHXvkm2qhiTLd2o1gMAvHF01Qm6Tf98ZLaKSr5G91ucCpX1CG_u1l_x4txBr1QWbAxwxbYq0QCy_932jAOxAE1cCgCN5N1FzQJmnIcWo3-M6-TrKOjuUm1x1xQPJ2MFdXL-FaMeE8ze8mQvWABwMd-ZjGWH0Ha9CqRnJxY3dZzR8VS602V8qvxbH7AySATlfuv-T9-fEd5cJ2_M1SjYEzOtgxv6mmh_02y0Wu7Rfbhul_wm_HaKxm2V-KTg0R5waa1EaCZkihB0zspqo1QC6LlP2kYODPTwgFkIoQzoQGUfhYPVmA6HnlfJhkK6nz_4cZYutpjcPbRJAHi50gFVY/3yq/aZeoYtZWT0GH8kEwGA2kgg/h2/xvrUI8NeIASi_Wj-LNsPuyhkGSBP5wYA3pHanQcIjq0) | | [RATE HIS PERFORMANCE](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkMOfZquQRQxie7kYnycRNSiiugx9fPCOPSEhxoW2JVEDAFHXvkm2qhiTLd2o1gMAvHF01Qm6Tf98ZLaKSr5G91ucCpX1CG_u1l_x4txBr1QWbAxwxbYq0QCy_932jAOxAE1cCgCN5N1FzQJmnIcWo3dfavNZc2mjTbkLA8rgPvqiiIH9D2RzUyZX6lqweyIqYUZiae_kFEhgWo-9tMM2ELzCnogt9Cqw7DTpr5b425j8tSn3iYgRyS-od_Wm4tkcEENo2P-iwAKI6PJm6OtQUI7YSnWG0RgPjWs5MkdBv340zsYCdIb3YRYNeyVgpc6_Vg-6ID_ZMdGuJzRKXQDno-vAf18Zp042HZJr5WJvXiOiHI6aGm6zCa4ANhtRIjEuc/3yq/aZeoYtZWT0GH8kEwGA2kgg/h3/GBpI8ioNxuhXuBnhOxm7dnv2yw6kULLCdh0xXgJ6sok)
---
* * *

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLiOChfxaDJ94l5oFYt2vKvcrqgo10SMJZjSJa0vDj-7fqutVLdBDfcYA8EwKxN0G_dI5-_greWatb8Y0-BoqUHQ0cWmMieuRMg8cjlEDe7BMwfUKhVGNJi7ZUefFuCgrwkEAAh2JyF-64o2tzfEtZ25HI3IbKb2uZpVKMjtKZTvloTBAyokBs59GycCEqo46wW3b9YHef5TKBECEd2D47WSFy5MMabuvuvoBwTh6BKYiwoRwud6Laz5J4eyfId_jno0wXZeTZqLoztlqajsaZLmMtGkANyjp_NF_ql_hQbjC-LwrNwQrg4DquAapBxS4KE/3yq/aZeoYtZWT0GH8kEwGA2kgg/h4/YTp8HJrIPKeA9SoRPPJkiQMjnsZ66X5JAO437LsR46M) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. body:
It’s our job to protect our children from these “woke” policies.
| [](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=694c22a23daf4e7885c1ddccbbee4442&_e=eXqTXt2OZIZvEEeWdTXEyBFyFgw1nLOMWjBDSEfBfrLxlKCvxKqTlxWAmYDpKDuXzgn0t2vVdLOUIUZfGUYJ9vNhuUKO85QmfKi25nM8iOYz8u9v1Gcl_kCTtdXeRs63EYAWDDMlDsOJpY7L2ZLn6wp7Jb0GcSPaorRuLGaamYoAXKngv4bhg_F81qVLl5Fsca9kLFeykv-9C1kA_I6mfztbM7za2AVC1ngekuF_yVexg3Xnv-cfap_hjEf2yMaOgYvhMjT1heEvutC_I03ZGhRpAKW-UpIas7dfKkMqZ2TENkjmcJBNGt57MpaPGpsyFGeZXyvKjeSG5VMxK0SG7zbk3aC6mrI-ZvQxO-NjMMv8QoPl0pAgk8C8kYWjGgKcWFHB7ce1_HKv7u4aA4-CuJnFhyFq0a0WdAh6LzFi_8KZxj_72W3ppKDW5vgWCePiCJ5H8wSln232RrflrC4UlA%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
In my days as a combat veteran, I was fighting for the right for “you as an adult” to have the freedom to make your own decisions.
---
While in Congress, I continue to fight for that right.
---
_But when it comes to children, it becomes our obligation and responsibility to protect them and ensure we are creating the safest and best environment we can for all future generations._
---
**That’s why I will continue to do everything in my power to protect our children and young women from the insanity of the Left’s radical “woke” ideologies.**
---
Democrats have vilified me for recently speaking out against these dangerous ideologies and policies coming from the radical Left but if they think I’m wrong, I am not the problem – I can assure you:
---
[](https://links.wesleyhuntfortexas.com/u/click?_t=a8d68b28a7304093af83aba8f7fea4dc&_m=694c22a23daf4e7885c1ddccbbee4442&_e=eXqTXt2OZIZvEEeWdTXEyBFyFgw1nLOMWjBDSEfBfrLxlKCvxKqTlxWAmYDpKDuXzgn0t2vVdLOUIUZfGUYJ9vNhuUKO85QmfKi25nM8iOYz8u9v1Gcl_kCTtdXeRs63EYAWDDMlDsOJpY7L2ZLn6wp7Jb0GcSPaorRuLGaamYoAXKngv4bhg_F81qVLl5Fsca9kLFeykv-9C1kA_I6mfztbM7za2AVC1ngekuF_yVexg3Xnv-cfap_hjEf2yMaOgYvhMjT1heEvutC_I03ZGhRpAKW-UpIas7dfKkMqZ2TENkjmcJBNGt57MpaPGpsy2dFhUSiQ-ugbh6zgXpMcEkfgeAMbuX2zLVbMCFOJZwTnBALBMbRsd8I_VE0KjTmMrdR8glkG-dg6ApxhbBOh0YaPN5nVCKstd6Q-JEWb2m22HL1lqCfDH3mf3VLvZjHqNKZl6Z-c9euzjsIl-dgGyw%3D%3D)
---
_-The Daily Wire_
---
_The protection and future of our children depends on us never giving up this critical fight but with the entirety of the radical Left fighting back, I am counting on you for help._
---

While in Congress, I continue to fight for that right. But when it comes to children, it becomes our obligation and responsibility to protect them and ensure we are creating the safest and best environment we can for all future generations. That’s why I will continue to do everything in my power to protect our children and young women from the insanity of the Left’s radical “woke” ideologies. Democrats have vilified me for recently speaking out against these dangerous ideologies and policies coming from the radical Left but if they think I’m wrong, I am not the problem – I can assure you: -The Daily Wire The protection and future of our children depends on us never giving up this critical fight but with the entirety of the radical Left fighting back, I am counting on you for help. | | Firstly, I believe the work the DNC is doing is important, it is just not enough. I believe in Shasti Conrad and I think that Senator Murray is wonderful. Any actions I call into question, are more accurately the result of a flawed system. I believe that rural America must act as an independent agent and take responsibility to lift itself up.
---
| | |
---
| | Declining Democratic visibility and voice in rural areas has left us vulnerable to the far right’s incursion. Republicans have used this opportunity to fill the void with their brand of rhetoric based on lies, denial of science, historical revision, evangelical zealotry and restoring legal prejudice against minorities. Except for a few strongholds of local Democrats defending the counties and legislative districts, Democrats are, by and large, silent in rural communities. The national Democrats and national Democratic organizations have continued to focus on shrinking islands of cash and Democrat dense urban areas. We see this mirrored here at home in the last election cycle when Senator Murray’s campaign canceled their election stops in Central Washington. The campaign had the time and had the money, but they knew we weren’t going to bring more votes or money and so, in campaign logic, it is not worth the time. The negative impact on down-ballot candidates and Democratic morale was significant. The Washington State Democrats have an election year operating budget of over $7 million, but the amount spent in Central and Eastern Washington is in the 10s of thousands. Washington State is the 10th largest contributor to political races with two-thirds going to Democratic races. But in Washington State, virtually zero dollars went to Democratic races east of the Cascades. In fact, more money went to Republican races. This concept of measuring the value of constituents by the money or votes they can produce is antithetical to Democratic values and, if changes are not made, will cost us our democracy. Chasing sure wins, with the exception of all else, has resulted in GenZ, Latinx and union members in rural areas trending red. White voters in rural areas have shifted 19% toward the red. Two-thirds of all state Houses hold Republican majorities and we are watching in real-time the Republicans dismantling the rule of law and destroying the faith of many in this great nation. A staggering 80% of the people inCentral Washington have not heard apro-Democratic message! We in rural America know that the “truths” we hear in the progressive media are not always the whole truth. But they say the best lie has a bit of truth in it.
* GenZ will save Democrats. If you look only at Democrat dense urban areas and college towns, this seems to be true. But in rural areas like ours where 80% have never heard a pro-Democratic message, our future voters and GenZ are trending red.

* Latinx voters represent a large voting block for Democrats, which is true, except that this voting block is trending red and we can see the day when it will be majority Republican.

* Our city councils, school boards and community organizations are increasingly led by the far right, which makes it possible to shape policy that reflects their ideology and imposes it on us.

* Democrats are college educated and smarter and so, if more people are college educated, then Democrats will win. Our people are not dumb. We do noble work such as feed the nation, generate energy, build housing, care for the elderly and so many important roles. Making the statement that college education creates Democrats is spurious at best. 80% of the people in Central Washington have not heard a pro-Democratic message. Our schools are not teaching civics, banning books and many live in actual fear of MAGA violence. A college education doesn't fix that.

---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/0fOdc0WuV/c?w=qDgZdu6qCbwhzXxly4vdSmxNn7V27R9iFAOVtTODCw4.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL3JhdSIsInIiOiI1M2Y4MTU4NS00YWFhLTQzNmMtMDU2Ni0wOWI1NDZlMTQyYmQiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | We know that geography, more than any other factor, separates Democrats from Republicans. Despite the win, the recent vote on Issue 1 in Ohio proved geographic importance. A precinct level look at the voting pattern showed that it was only the densely populated urban areas that voted “No”. The rural areas and even the suburbs voted “Yes”, showing the Republican's hold on rural America and further encroachment on our Democratic urban areas. We can look in our own backyard to see the same results. Central Washington voted for Loren Culp over Governor Inslee and Senator Murray’s loss in Central Washington was greater in 2022 than in 2016.
---
| |
---
| | All politics is local and it is where policy starts which is the Republican's greatest strength. Nowhere in the country is the power of local and state politics clearer than in Florida, where a despotic tyrant has made a mockery of our constitution and political system by willfully and easily bending it to his whim without the mandate of the people. This is the path that Donald Trump wants for our country and unless we turn the tide in rural America toward Democratic ideals, we could see a repeat of 2016. Urban centers are increasingly insufficient to hold back the tide of red coming from rural areas. The National Democrats' mission is to elect Democrats and that necessarily excludes deep red rural areas. Failing to act is cruel because it leaves so many to live diminished lives under far-right rule and unwise because believing that we can maintain supremacy and control rules of a few islands of democrats in this ocean of a nation all while we can see the water rising around us is absurd.
---
| | What we are doing Rural Americans United is committed to investing $350,000 to deliver over 20,000 pro-Democratic messages during a 14 month period across Central Washington using radio, TV and streaming services -- a first for Central Washington.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/0fOdc0WuV/c?w=4BrIcQtG19h3FeP4IbRc-RUOHFuAP2Nm_k5QeTvjAME.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL2NvcHktb2YtYWJvdXQvZGVtbWVkaWFjYW1wYWlnbiIsInIiOiJjM2IxNDM4Mi1hZjQzLTRmZWYtYWRlMy1iMzgwMWRlMTI2YmYiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)

| | |

| | Tri-Pride was a huge success! Reaction from the Tri-Cities Diversity and Inclusion Council (TCDIC) was disappointing and a stark reminder of how the far right can manipulate the world we live in in cruel and dramatic ways. The TCDIC refused to communicate with us, or use their resources to promote or advocate for us. I spoke to one of the board members who, frighteningly, owns a diversity consultancy, told me that she was very influential on the board and personally would be doing nothing to support Tri-Pride. No member of TCDIC showed up for the event. However, we had great fun!
* Our fundraising was 500% over previous years.
* Doubled vendor participation
* Set attendance records
* Ran a Tri-City wide TV and radio advertising campaign
* At the end of August we will present the Tri-Cities Pride Festival with a check

Check out the pictures by clicking the button below.

name: Dick Durbin
subject: I take my role seriously
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
As Senators, we have a responsibility.
#
Peter,
As Senators, we have a responsibility to do our part to uphold the promise of the American dream. There’s no denying that the dream has evolved over the years, but much has remained constant: the opportunity for upward mobility, freedom, and equality for all people who work hard and have the will to succeed.
That’s what brought my grandmother and mother to America from Lithuania, and they’re the same goals I work towards every day in the Senate.
It’s why I spend my time in Washington leading the way on legislation that I know will have a real impact on people’s lives—like gun safety, reducing health care costs, and immigration reform—instead of meddling in party politics or other obstacles.
I take my role as Senator seriously because I have firsthand experience with the American dream. I understand what working families need to get ahead and keep moving forward.
I’m proud of this work, but all of this is only possible with your support. Your donations are crucial to keeping the Senate blue, putting progress first, and doing what we can to keep the American Dream accessible to as many people as possible.
**[Please, donate $5 towards our August goal now to help me keep working for a better future for all.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68073746/421845796/1955349951?refcode=dd_em_230814_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzdhZGY1Yi1jMjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JU9hga_ENN7mwA-94hHB7vRc-KXItUQYbDTs7K2KKYg=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

********[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68073747/421845797/1955349951?refcode=dd_em_230814_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzdhZGY1Yi1jMjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JU9hga_ENN7mwA-94hHB7vRc-KXItUQYbDTs7K2KKYg=)********

body:
Our work to take back the majority must start now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68073804/421846070/-344990004?refcode=BLU-VFC-20230814-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MDNlMjdhNC1jMjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0rzxZuBzRgoD5hNP3tFqYnyMhkufO00yWpsvNzhBluk=)
---
| Peter,

We’re well into August, and with our monthly deadline rapidly approaching, we want to make sure we stay on top of our fundraising efforts.

With the Republicans' regressive voter ID law being implemented right now restricting access to the ballot box, we have to work harder than ever to build our campaign momentum. Valerie is working tirelessly to protect and expand voting rights, but the Republicans’ attacks on our voting rights will make it that much harder to take back the House next year.

| | Eighty-eight years ago today, Social Security was enshrined into law, becoming a guaranteed, earned benefit that has helped support millions of seniors in retirement. For decades, American workers have paid into the program with the promise that they'll be able to enter into retirement with the resources they need. **But the clock is ticking. Unless Congress acts soon, Social Security will run out by 2035.** Republicans have repeatedly made it clear that they're all in to do whatever it takes to rip away your hard-earned Social Security and Medicare benefits. Instead of working across party lines to safeguard these lifelines for seniors, Republicans are up to their same old tricks to rip away your hard-earned benefits so they can pay for their tax handouts to big corporations and the mega-wealthy. Just a few years ago, Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell moved mountains to blow a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to the wealthy and well-connected. Now, Republicans have made it clear that if they retake the Senate and White House in 2024, they're going to prioritize cutting Social Security and Medicare to pay for their handouts to the ultra-rich. **[We must invest in these lifelines so that seniors can rely on them for generations to come. Sign my petition. Tell Congress: Protect my Social Security!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68073948/421846704/200513750?contactdata=bkNoXop4UmWwbYEJyqc/78jmGMqkFzlhXrMTMO8x2FXmTiobiC4O+Z/zDQMcuRx4dDIX6uhJ9dHeAFmITsUxsyMT2IQkBtvmYSoLJ0VEcek=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVhNWVlZS1jMjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_I4qx7pHMM3SsmYbuBmb_N-aq4xeeKMqyBUcU7J3A=&emci=5c45f83e-a837-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a2ea5eee-c23a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)** [Sign Here Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68073949/421846705/200513750?contactdata=bkNoXop4UmWwbYEJyqc/78jmGMqkFzlhXrMTMO8x2FXmTiobiC4O+Z/zDQMcuRx4dDIX6uhJ9dHeAFmITsUxsyMT2IQkBtvmYSoLJ0VEcek=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmVhNWVlZS1jMjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw_I4qx7pHMM3SsmYbuBmb_N-aq4xeeKMqyBUcU7J3A=&emci=5c45f83e-a837-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=a2ea5eee-c23a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) **Instead of protecting your Social Security benefits, Republicans want to rip them away.** This is not some handout. clean_body: | | | | Eighty-eight years ago today, Social Security was enshrined into law, becoming a guaranteed, earned benefit that has helped support millions of seniors in retirement. For decades, American workers have paid into the program with the promise that they'll be able to enter into retirement with the resources they need. But the clock is ticking. Unless Congress acts soon, Social Security will run out by 2035. Republicans have repeatedly made it clear that they're all in to do whatever it takes to rip away your hard-earned Social Security and Medicare benefits. Instead of working across party lines to safeguard these lifelines for seniors, Republicans are up to their same old tricks to rip away your hard-earned benefits so they can pay for their tax handouts to big corporations and the mega-wealthy. Just a few years ago, Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell moved mountains to blow a $2 trillion hole in the deficit to give a tax handout to the wealthy and well-connected. Now, Republicans have made it clear that if they retake the Senate and White House in 2024, they're going to prioritize cutting Social Security and Medicare to pay for their handouts to the ultra-rich. Instead of protecting your Social Security benefits, Republicans want to rip them away. This is not some handout. Our nation's seniors have worked decades to ensure that they can retire with dignity, not so Republicans can create a slush fund for special interests and billionaires to plunder. clean_body: This is a team effort, and Shawn is counting on YOU. = Hey Peter. It’s James Carville. We’re just a few months out from a make-or-break election in Louisiana, and I’m proud to back Shawn Wilson’s bid for governor. But listen up: Shawn’s opponent is a Trump-endorsed MAGA clown who will run Louisiana into the ground — this joker’s got absolutely ZERO plans to address the state’s toughest challenges. So here’s the deal: Shawn tells me he needs to raise $20,000 before midnight tomorrow as part of his campaign’s Fight Back Fund, but as of right now, they’re falling behind with just over 24 hours to go. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = After a few decades in politics, I know the real deal when I see it, and Shawn’s got everything we could want from Louisiana’s next governor: Homegrown Louisianan? Check. A whopping 25 years of public service? Check. A stellar record in his previous role? Check. Experience cutting through the noise to deliver results? Check! I could talk all day about why Shawn Wilson is the no-brainer choice for governor in Louisiana, but our top priority is to BEAT THE GOP and make sure they can't come anywhere near the governor’s mansion. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Let’s Geaux! James Carville = = | | PAID FOR BY WILSON FOR LOUISIANA Wilson for Louisiana P.O. name: Mark Walker
subject: Praying for our country
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Walker4NC

It’s clear: we’ve steered away from our core values as Conservatives. We need a leader who is driven by family values, fights with integrity, and leads with conviction.
