Peter -

I came to Winston Salem North Carolina 32 years ago with a few bucks to my name and the hope for better days ahead. Through God’s blessing and my wife Kelly’s support, I was blessed to be a pastor for sixteen years. So, I know firsthand the despair that haunts so many.

But just like when I was a struggling young man, I have hope that there are **better days ahead.** I’m proud to act on that hope and pave the path forward for all North Carolinians.

**My name is Mark Walker, and I’m running to be the next Governor of the great state of North Carolina** [**because we desperately need a pastor to be part of the solution to the government’s greatest problems.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=4ec4946794f04263b83c735d8b6c0bbb&_e=ckbqFV7qyiMjT7B1MvrseL0NNwYBQ894KL0uVzW75E490C1WvdjXXtu8V_m1wRBEQEHSLYVLFG5wNdIGMLIK7ItdBFkh1GzefuDL1wwAOKvCJsS_IS7mTVmfUA7wYsB_JOz-_OmlD-E6xrnhF8Z9oDPVLv79SdUu8gK5ohFqVw8VRTj9CMzRCN7dnUF-UygqazGDMT128P9p3JSxWj_WMOFeNJYSjFDNQuLkjeCwDH5-mw-diAYXJxz7eBAvvbyJP7nITuBLx-jsqDo2_djM20rfIMm46YBBeeuu7JwrTw31vUXMYq9FNbgM3qHu3N1SjSy8oNvZ4Aaxl03YDnJzngAcwWxtJ-4m33F6p1iDt0pmj6kiTqXhCPQZZZfC2IMs)

[** SEND A PASTOR TO FIX THE GOVERNMENT **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=4ec4946794f04263b83c735d8b6c0bbb&_e=ckbqFV7qyiMjT7B1MvrseL0NNwYBQ894KL0uVzW75E490C1WvdjXXtu8V_m1wRBEQEHSLYVLFG5wNdIGMLIK7ItdBFkh1GzefuDL1wwAOKvCJsS_IS7mTVmfUA7wYsB_JOz-_OmlD-E6xrnhF8Z9oDPVLv79SdUu8gK5ohFqVw8VRTj9CMzRCN7dnUF-UygqazGDMT128P9p3JSxWj_WMOFeNJYSjFDNQuLkjeCwDH5GIU1OkjlMBeA5jxKPql3W0w5bGPkbq_cwM84kbve-0WhoWfleQVefVBbbUaU5rDkz6q9BLbK_aNzbITClLjJrxDrc4Xb4o4Q7NosTXx5DMroTwiHv89jZAW3Q4-4TNNDHVgFIVISJ1pSDyLZLl8ny)

_It’s clear: we’ve steered away from our core values as Conservatives._ We need a leader who is driven by family values, fights with integrity, and leads with conviction. That’s what I bring to the table.

But here’s the thing, Peter, being unapologetically conservative doesn’t have to mean wavering on your commitment to faith and leading with compassion. That’s exactly the kind of attitude we need in the Governor’s mansion. [**That’s why I’m in this fight.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=4ec4946794f04263b83c735d8b6c0bbb&_e=ckbqFV7qyiMjT7B1MvrseL0NNwYBQ894KL0uVzW75E490C1WvdjXXtu8V_m1wRBEQEHSLYVLFG5wNdIGMLIK7ItdBFkh1GzefuDL1wwAOKvCJsS_IS7mTVmfUA7wYsB_JOz-_OmlD-E6xrnhF8Z9oDPVLv79SdUu8gK5ohFqVw8VRTj9CMzRCN7dnUF-UygqazGDMT128P9p3JSxWj_WMOFeNJYSjFDNQuLkjeCwDH5ynam_AA2aoMGQO-WkCaM30dLesocTl72xuWCINRPzNxWgJtbS-tLbva9B4XogoM3PXels0JGXpU_MXPK4frw271_kTFf6QYJRnEKtw-m1MWNeOTAKUEU0H0EZCxbp8HiJ7hyXFTKxAyN99sRhSuBT)

You have my commitment that I will bring the lessons I learned as a pastor and utilize them to create solutions for the American people. [**But I need your help to stay in this race. Can I count on your commitment of any amount today?**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=4ec4946794f04263b83c735d8b6c0bbb&_e=ckbqFV7qyiMjT7B1MvrseL0NNwYBQ894KL0uVzW75E490C1WvdjXXtu8V_m1wRBEQEHSLYVLFG5wNdIGMLIK7ItdBFkh1GzefuDL1wwAOKvCJsS_IS7mTVmfUA7wYsB_JOz-_OmlD-E6xrnhF8Z9oDPVLv79SdUu8gK5ohFqVw8VRTj9CMzRCN7dnUF-UygqazGDMT128P9p3JSxWj_WMOFeNJYSjFDNQuLkjeCwDH7m8U0m3OxRG3KeO46X_cOJQ6rPNB9B4ItDACh8iNnwAGwwlKQrWz1q4oWGmNgHCNaid6vBjjSH9NYAjhfcO9U-4YFK8tgA6ONuUjpKMiCIwF4Kk-npzoXirNZbsb3IG0s7TvqWIs5XRg1UqRmBAu0I)

[** INVEST IN MARK **](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=4ec4946794f04263b83c735d8b6c0bbb&_e=ckbqFV7qyiMjT7B1MvrseL0NNwYBQ894KL0uVzW75E490C1WvdjXXtu8V_m1wRBEQEHSLYVLFG5wNdIGMLIK7ItdBFkh1GzefuDL1wwAOKvCJsS_IS7mTVmfUA7wYsB_JOz-_OmlD-E6xrnhF8Z9oDPVLv79SdUu8gK5ohFqVw8VRTj9CMzRCN7dnUF-UygqazGDMT128P9p3JSxWj_WMOFeNJYSjFDNQuLkjeCwDH5aLDPf-LuAPjTHFm-eXnwIf4GkdQDZHI5QuMB_bO65PFL6G99nbBoe8scgYzbK8BwKiAw3OpAyA3aWrxAkWHjh8RK1dcWnYAojt8ggf_TX5-oRGkccgCgDRdQKisisnifLGJs8gyKsddRnWp_CqkXW)

We are at a tipping point in America and North Carolina. This election is all about a battle for the hearts and minds of our children and grandchildren.

As long as I have the Lord's guidance and with Kelly next to me, I’ll take the fight to both the radicals and the political elites... but I need you with me.

[**I hope I can count on you today.**](https://click.walker4nc.com/u/click?_t=ddf9d2682c1146b5a5fa5e9b2b9c6ab5&_m=4ec4946794f04263b83c735d8b6c0bbb&_e=ckbqFV7qyiMjT7B1MvrseL0NNwYBQ894KL0uVzW75E490C1WvdjXXtu8V_m1wRBEQEHSLYVLFG5wNdIGMLIK7ItdBFkh1GzefuDL1wwAOKvCJsS_IS7mTVmfUA7wYsB_JOz-_OmlD-E6xrnhF8Z9oDPVLv79SdUu8gK5ohFqVw8VRTj9CMzRCN7dnUF-UygqazGDMT128P9p3JSxWj_WMOFeNJYSjFDNQuLkjeCwDH7-1YJz8z0O-frSgloIuMQresmDrr7PbEa4BNfrKB4_yKagOkPXWvU7DeoAdgDOuBsQ2cEBD10O9E-koM9p9_atio5hzCpp7inVlGOmVgczxHsSc9DwqvGJrmyjl2k17twUplboAw6wvJuBHHHa7hUB)

God bless,

Mark Walker

| Meet **Mark Walker**

Congressman Mark Walker started his career in finance and, after earning his theology degree, Walker served 16 years as a pastor. In 2014, Walker stepped away from ministry and made a successful run for the U.S. Congress defeating a host of elected politicians. In 2015, Congressman Walker became the first member in an inaugural term to be elected Chair of the Republican Study Committee (RSC) - the largest caucus in Congress with 160 members and a position previously held by Vice President Pence and Congressman Jim Jordan.

In 2018, Walker was elected as Vice Chair of the entire conference, becoming the highest rated conservative to serve in the top four leadership positions in Congress. Walker is also the last member of Congress to secure a floor vote on a balanced budget amendment and led the House on HBCU initiatives winning the United Negro College Fund President’s list award. Congressman Walker served on multiple committees and in 2019, Walker was appointed to ranking member on the Committee on Homeland Security’s Intelligence and Counter-Terrorism’s subcommittee. Walker was co-chair of the bicameral prayer caucus for five years and also won the GOP MVP award as the starting pitcher on the Republican baseball team for the annual charity game.

Congressman Walker was redistricted out of his seat and stepped away from Congress in 2021. Walker ran for U.S. Senate in 2022 and was endorsed by Senators Tim Scott and James Lankford, Gov. Mike Huckabee, Hall of Fame Coach Tony Dungy and more than 200 pastors across North Carolina. Walker is currently the president of a political consulting business called Advancing Hope USA, and advocated for the two North Carolina Supreme Court candidates and 4 North Carolina Court of Appeals candidates through his independent expenditure organization, Win the Courts during this past general election. Congressman Walker and his wife Kelly, a Family Nurse Practitioner and flight trauma specialist, have been married for thirty years and have three children.

* * *

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**

She’s stood against the Woke “Squad,” stood up for my father during the unlawful persecutions levied against him , and never wavered in her commitment to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren. Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America. | "DEFEND LAUREN BOEBERT" | My father and I are counting on you. Thanks, Donald Trump Jr. | | PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS | | | | Copyright © 2023 , All rights reserved. Trump Train News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Kevin Schilling
subject: It's no secret
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Derek is fighting to make our economy – and our Congress – work better for the people.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68075326/421851757/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3NWI3YmEtYzQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pmk6licEqh-FVA98J8dwP44wlFdNoZd1sS0_DAfwVns=&emci=219fd314-aa3a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=9b75b7ba-c43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

Peter – It's no secret the future of the House majority and the future of our very democracy is on the ballot next November.

It may seem far away, but the reality is that we know it's going to be an uphill battle to win back the People's House and continue making progress together. Donald Trump's third indictment and the GOP's support of him is a testament of things to come.

Derek and his Democratic colleagues are more than ready to put their constituents first, but with the threat of extremism present in our elections — the time to act is now.

That's why our campaign needs to hit every single goal we set, from now until the election.

Derek is fighting to make our economy – and our Congress – work better for the people, and our grassroots supporters are critical to keeping him in this fight. Every dollar you chip in will go directly toward ensuring success in November.

I will never say that the sky is going to fall if we don't meet our fundraising goals, but early investments are what helped us defend Derek's seat in 2022, and it's how we plan to take back the House majority in 2024.

**[With our mid-month fundraising deadline being tomorrow at midnight, can Derek count on you to chip in $10 or whatever you can?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68075327/421851758/688272239?refcode=em23_230815_Mm1_fnd_gq_act___KSDK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230815_Mm1_fnd_gq_act___KSDK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=9b75b7ba-c43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3NWI3YmEtYzQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pmk6licEqh-FVA98J8dwP44wlFdNoZd1sS0_DAfwVns=)**

Thanks for all that you do!

Kevin Schilling
Political Director
Derek Kilmer for Congress

Derek Kilmer is leading the efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support his grassroots campaign.
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68075328/421851759/688272239?refcode=em23_230815_Mm1_fnd_gq_act___KSDK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230815_Mm1_fnd_gq_act___KSDK_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&refcode2=9b75b7ba-c43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&amounts=5,10,25,50,100&recurring=auto&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWI3NWI3YmEtYzQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=pmk6licEqh-FVA98J8dwP44wlFdNoZd1sS0_DAfwVns=)

name: The Long Run PAC
subject: 48 hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
#
Team -
We need to give you an honest update today:
Tomorrow, we will reach the mid-point of August and of the quarter, and our fundraising is not where we would like it to be.
August is known to be one of the toughest months for political fundraising — kids are returning to school, and folks are embracing the last few moments of summer — so we planned ahead, knowing this month would be difficult.
But truthfully, the results are much worse than we expected.
[**So we are reaching out today to kindly ask: Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford right now to our movement to continue electing changemaking candidates across the country? We truly would not ask if it weren't absolutely necessary.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.iWpG7e&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=1&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
At this point in the month, we should be about 38% to our mid-quarter goal, but truthfully, we are only 27% there.
We know that making up that 11% is possible, but if we are going to cross that finish line, we need to have a big day today.
So will you help us close the gap? We have less than 48 hours to make up lost ground. Every single dollar will count. Whatever amount you donate — $5, $30, or $100 — will put us one step closer to reaching our goal.
[**Can you please contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to our movement today?**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.iWpG7e&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=2&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Express Donate: $3](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1272?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.d6bb1s&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=21&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
[Express Donate: $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.IcpmTL&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=22&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
[Express Donate: $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.QeAMjL&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=23&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
[Express Donate: $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.41fhpF&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=24&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
[Express Donate: $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.WGb92R&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=25&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
[Or donate another amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.iWpG7e&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=26&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
Our goals are fairly modest — but these goals are important in order to keep our movement up and running so we can continue helping Democrats across the country. When you donate today, you are paving our path to electing Democrats up and down the ballot. Please add your contribution today.
With gratitude,
The team at the Long Run
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-aug23.iWpG7e&refcode=em230814-1-t1&t=27&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=28&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=29&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=30&refcode2=4734_196590_H8GxmX&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=31&akid=4734%2E196590%2EH8GxmX)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

subject: Trump attacks Georgia DA. Tell Fani Willis you stand with her
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: Stand with Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis against Trump’s attacks](https://default.salsalabs.org/T41d90498-4667-4cdc-a6b3-30ddeffaedc5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T49bc83af-3e88-4eae-a88c-43c5e4ad7c16/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | With Trump’s 4th indictment on the horizon in Georgia, he’s lashing out against Fulton County District Attorney Fani Willis and her investigation on social media. Trump called her a “phoney” and said she “wants desperately to indict me on the ridiculous grounds of tampering with the 2020 presidential election.” The walls are closing in on Trump and he’s terrified that this highly qualified District Attorney could hold him accountable for trying to steal the 2020 election. These insults are outrageous and unwarranted. And these attacks are on top of vile and racist attacks from Trump’s followers. We want DA Fani Willis to know that we stand with her against Trump’s attacks, and that we fully support her investigation into Trump’s scheme to destroy our democracy. [Add your name and tell Fani Willis you stand with her against Trump’s attacks >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc3e61a3b-203f-4709-afe6-3bb5edaf6966/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

| August 14, 2023
---
| Dear Kentucky Republicans,
We want to remind you to sign up as soon as you can to assist us in volunteering at the Cameron for Governor booth at the Kentucky State Fair!
The dates are August 17 - August 27 and we still have some time slots available during the weekdays and weekends. (All volunteers will receive free admission to the fair.)
Please sign up using the link below if you are available. See you at the fair!
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 prisoners sing!
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi85ljgd62ua2anbhb1pfpfj04uukmreu1v4ha48_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It's an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn25hih8j6t8t71bl46kd8plvc02tetoj4tmhfk8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfmc9oshibjknr6g6ggucpmckvl3jshgsitfuns0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _" deadly insurrection."_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It's time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

**Click below to show your support today!**

**Support the January 6th Families**

**Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**Donor Status: MISSING
Goal: **1,000 Donors

[** _Donate Now >>_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrklb5nvdcmf8v4ago7too6gav4g5k5fsvjdgnjg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

**[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z39d87m78d20oedfo56o1ivrtfuqgtj8i8qd3uug_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $25 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zk68c38kvkrh2u21usrtqpp8r3b3piv7l23n5dtg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2mrubn6e3s53tssss667u7n6j2j3pa4sakdv4ko_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zpc0cdodc3qsjbauvu5g4uko9r35dpeu97k56208_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3trhhpqvnb7274dt3lqd4glc1svedp7a8mq2h58_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zipgpp99l7bqlvnjtfdhs0ln22u8hq2gtmm5hdfo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfpsc1ta36br7mt22938oj765at4sj80gl65g4ag_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)**
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znofk4pt2dpfq1d43jpcvjean5dfmuqj876141po_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)
[**_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdiubfmcg295qn1gcj67tr66lrjcm3tmb38ap1g8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

**I launched the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First families like the ones from the Jan 6th witch hunts. **

I know what it's like. I've been the target of the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump.

The FBI used innocent protestors to push their agenda. Now they are doing everything they can to hide any evidence that they tried to provoke the protesters. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, _I will do everything in my power to help out_.

**Friend, I 'm humbly asking you to help us get justice for the Jan 6th detainees and set them free. **

[_**Will you be one of the 1,000 patriots brave enough to fight for some of the Jan 6th detainees and their families? You can show your support by donating $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today. Click here to step up >>>**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4o3o0kmvrlc30e56iifam5odf7p7o048kv778so_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

Please hurry.

And as moving as it is to hear them sing every night from their prison cells, it will sound so much sweeter when they can sing our national anthem underneath the stars with their freedom restored.

[_**You can rush your urgent donation by clicking here.**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp7i0n6vof7u82r6kaecemtu5cc6fmec47n3r980_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gmepr0cjh2bs)

For Freedom,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

GOP Presidential

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
| | | [](http://trk.tedcruz.)
---
Hey Fellow Conservative, Did you see our email Saturday? We wanted to follow up ASAP because we just ran the numbers. It’s bad news. **Despite active involvement from top grassroots supporters in recent weeks, we’re behind pace to reach our August fundraising goal at just the wrong time.** This is a close 5-point race today and Colin Allred is _raking in MILLIONS from leftists across America_! It’s vital that we reach our mid-month goal and there are a few ways to help.
---
1\. If you are able to make a financial contribution at this time, even just $5, $10, or $25, tap or click here: **[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/august-midmonth](http://trk.tedcruz.-RvBwtkynWIESpbQ)** 2\. Another way to help is by buying items from our **[Official Team Cruz Merch Shop](http://trk.tedcruz.-gLx3Hws56i0fahD7TwduQ)**. We have t-shirts, hats, coffee mugs – buy something for you and a friend too! 3. A third way to help is by sharing this email with your common-sense, conservative, liberty-loving family members and friends. Invite them to join the team by texting “**TEXAS** ” to **24005**
---
We’re grateful for your involvement and support. It means so much to Ted. Let’s fight with all we’ve got to defeat the left and PROTECT THIS SEAT next November! **Follow this link to make a secure online donation >>>[https://secure.winred.com/ted-cruz/august-midmonth](http://trk.tedcruz._F8FfTCRdw)** **-** Team Cruz

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: All thanks to YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
We’ve *already* proven a fourth unjust indictment would backfire. | | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=2118b51f5cdb42e2b7b58a3dd82cb675&_e=TIyw08WILWMfsQLbIwa3jEzXyfCqYsb-igFKmnjWc_buJUNVTD440py_lhLi1EA5bjpCE66sCPEzmBpOhVrMlGZVzvuPzZIYVkZnNQCkeKD8CHDzZi6R41IyR-o3DLM1GQ_-aBPug975ekJ1v4g2mPDJuVjH-i2GiXtYCHiZg1ODX3Is6N9GUbxnz8Ul5UdujRpZyZ0pvTDO8aOxSYUb0zLMbFHTfPBUY-iGBex2Gx2SN7W2Cw1zHQBfVn1bYwzreuQKWANpKb8Fp1SRe3RQz5w8rWcgtjO_PmhYVhSc2-dWVMnyt5nk8Zg2awMT_S5QB21mHPwlPW7BP65Wsgq5WDbJm3IGfUYIVv3RS_f9LNxuuv1O6bZR_nQyTPYtIju5M6mymiYIiwpVj0hCkHshYwfaJ0Xg3y5ny4X5BJPheO_L0a8f0cu0Eg6RqKMgDs4CtjPkQAlViL3ts7h2bzLHv1Hgyqi8xtKdUEoUxegGtqWZTg9ZZcswZzLwAr8JPzWK)
---
| | Friend,

---
With news reports this morning indicating that any day now I could be wrongfully indicted as an innocent man for the *_fourth*_ time, I thought this was an especially important message to share with you...

---
__...Because it shows why despite all their nefarious attempts to_** _INTERFERE_** _in the election, the Left WILL NOT win in 2024._
_
---
It’s no secret why Crooked Joe and his accomplices are doing this to me, dragging me through one unlawful witch hunt after the next.
---
Our movement is the _single_ _greatest threat_ to their grip on power, to their Marxist regime in Washington, and to exposing the true extent of Biden’s corruption.

---
**_In fact, Crooked Joe admitted just after I announced my candidacy that he was angered that his “Justice” Department wasn’t doing enough to prosecute me._**

---
**And what do you know, less than a year later, the radical Democrats are trying to throw me in JAIL for _6 lifetimes!_**_
_
---
But the truth is, while these crooks and thugs believed no campaign could ever survive their unprecedented and disgusting attacks, _YOU_ proved something they never expected.

---
Alongside your fellow patriots, you showed them that with each passing witch hunt, we only grew STRONGER and that much more _UNITED_. _
_
---
You showed them that they can try to cancel out your vote, they can even weaponize the DOJ to try and jail yours truly for life, but they can _NEVER_ strip the American people’s desire to be **FREE**!

---
And the polls prove it, Friend. We’re surging like never before! _
_
---
__That’s why just like the last three phony indictments, a FOURTH would BACKFIRE all the same_.__
_
---
Freedom loving patriots like YOU – and the more than 74 MILLION Americans who make up our movement – will **NEVER** **SURRENDER** our country to the radical Left. _
_
---
**[With a fourth unjust indictment looming, please make a contribution of any amount – _truly, even just $1_ – to peacefully DEFEND our movement from the never-ending witch hunts as Crooked Joe and his accomplices seek to JAIL me for life as an innocent man. ](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=2118b51f5cdb42e2b7b58a3dd82cb675&_e=TIyw08WILWMfsQLbIwa3jEzXyfCqYsb-igFKmnjWc_buJUNVTD440py_lhLi1EA5bjpCE66sCPEzmBpOhVrMlGZVzvuPzZIYVkZnNQCkeKD8CHDzZi6R41IyR-o3DLM1GQ_-aBPug975ekJ1v4g2mPDJuVjH-i2GiXtYCHiZg1ODX3Is6N9GUbxnz8Ul5UdujRpZyZ0pvTDO8aOxSYUb0zLMbFHTfPBUY-iGBex2Gx2SN7W2Cw1zHQBfVn1bYwzreuQKWANpKb8Fp1SRe3RQz5w8rWcgtjO_PmhYVhSc2-dWVMnyt5nk8Zg2awMT_S5QB21mHPwlPW7BP65Wsgq5WM8frG5aOY3LMJvqZykLoabxw7DINi-jx45LMAzImmd-T7TmfDdtJMamIhoDm9Vl8wtDxE81M0l7HverHo8OOXrauzcSOnMIs8WBqIAwqXgJTpI9UefipI0rP4eOCND3Sk7usYTSOMRZDwLyI42DjM_Cnh3yqz5AizaJzss99Kze)**

clean_body: We’ve already proven a fourth unjust indictment would backfire. | | | | | Friend, With news reports this morning indicating that any day now I could be wrongfully indicted as an innocent man for the fourth time, I thought this was an especially important message to share with you... ...Because it shows why despite all their nefarious attempts to INTERFERE in the election, the Left WILL NOT win in 2024. It’s no secret why Crooked Joe and his accomplices are doing this to me, dragging me through one unlawful witch hunt after the next. Our movement is the single greatest threat to their grip on power, to their Marxist regime in Washington, and to exposing the true extent of Biden’s corruption. In fact, Crooked Joe admitted just after I announced my candidacy that he was angered that his “Justice” Department wasn’t doing enough to prosecute me. And what do you know, less than a year later, the radical Democrats are trying to throw me in JAIL for 6 lifetimes! But the truth is, while these crooks and thugs believed no campaign could ever survive their unprecedented and disgusting attacks, YOU proved something they never expected. Alongside your fellow patriots, you showed them that with each passing witch hunt, we only grew STRONGER and that much more UNITED. You showed them that they can try to cancel out your vote, they can even weaponize the DOJ to try and jail yours truly for life, but they can NEVER strip the American people’s desire to be FREE! And the polls prove it, Friend. We’re surging like never before! That’s why just like the last three phony indictments, a FOURTH would BACKFIRE all the same. Freedom loving patriots like YOU – and the more than 74 MILLION Americans who make up our movement – will NEVER SURRENDER our country to the radical Left. | | Thank you, Donald J. name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: BREAKING NEW POLL
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Our message of TRUTH is resonating with voters according to the latest polling.

|
**BREAKING NEWS: TIED FOR SECOND**

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrs42cgpc5umqgom7brsn8gebmi1e16qsl53f1o0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)

Vivek Ramaswamy - 12%
Ron DeSantis - 12%

* * *
Fellow American - people are waking up.

People are hungry for a cause.

People want to hear **COLD HARD TRUTHS**.

People are ready for a REVOLUTION.

_**[Fellow American, are you with me?](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z79h2kmh497gb6s1t9tm041qjenn3o8ra6hascko_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)**_

I am crisscrossing the country, on the trail every day, speaking with voters in Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina.

But we're also going where other Republican presidential candidates haven't been. We're in deep blue areas like South Side Chicago and Kensington.

I am ready to work harder than ever before, but to keep this going, I need YOU.

**[Every dollar we raise in the next 72 hours will help us keep this momentum going. Even just $5 will make a difference to help me secure a center stage spot during the first Presidential Debate next month.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zik7gq7015onbqt8dgbe2b39jkb0beqs7va0ajr0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)**

With our surge in the polls, the Washington insiders are rattled. The knives are coming out - so I am going to need your help now more than ever to support our movement.

**[Please, in the next 72 hours, chip whatever you can.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zkgk9lr1oc1nh040t55nmut6fk9pum8i793lken0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)**

I'll always stand up for the truth and answer the hard questions facing Americans today.

But this gives me hope for our future.

We're the explorers, the pioneers, the unafraid. In God we trust & in government we distrust. That's what makes America great. _That's what makes America itself._

Thanks,

[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6dat12m0pa6e5hlqi3pcrroc1o0fvfju1gpovfo_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)
Vivek Ramaswamy

| [** BE A PART OF OUR MOVEMENT ->**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsmrne92huurclvjusiu1ku28vr40vdjl6m53ddg_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zplbad4cvnaj169hhpcdjf1dfq001ivf13untj8g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1gm1or2c1h2bs)

---

| |
---|---

| Paid for by Vivek 2024
---

Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes.

Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: I checked the numbers...she's going to lose.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LAUREN BOEBERT FOR CONGRESS
body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664644%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iqJdtW3BLoJRTFd7JP0J2g&sysid=1)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664755%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8K9xUgzKyjrAGlEmKZhkhw&sysid=1 "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself -she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664756%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fj1cRMqYbNJ8je0CxzGazg&sysid=1)

| [RUSH $50 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664750%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=0DqymYGNveUIwgD6hgLj6Q&sysid=1 "RUSH $50 ")

| [RUSH $25 >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664751%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MaiXr2bq1va6Bf7r3XagHw&sysid=1 "RUSH $25 ")
---
| [RUSH other >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664752%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZAdOPyucTVJQxNbv74y5pQ&sysid=1 "RUSH other ")
---
| You know the stakes of this election: **the course of America will be decided in 2024**.

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America.** [Now is the time to stand with Lauren before it’s too late!](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664753%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4pIG059tmBTU6TJAITQBiw&sysid=1)**
---
| [DEFEND LAUREN BOEBERT >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c664754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=R7bzVl30ZYhdYrF1Q%2fny8Q&sysid=1 "DEFEND LAUREN BOEBERT")

| My father and I are counting on you.

Thanks,

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: massive victory in Ohio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
This is incredible news, friend! Ohioans came out strong in last week's special election to STOP an anti-democratic amendment and clear special interest power grab – which would’ve made it harder for us to enshrine reproductive rights in our state constitution this November.
Seeing Ohio voters turn out to the polls and decisively reject the GOP's proposal has me feeling more hopeful than ever about our ability to protect women’s health care.
This massive victory also makes clear that momentum is on our side heading into 2024 when I’ll be on the ballot. But we can’t take our foot off the gas. So today, as we celebrate, I'm personally asking you to help me keep up our momentum: Will you split $25 or more between myself and Serve America to defend Ohio's Democratic seat and our pro-choice Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-sherrod]
In solidarity,
Sherrod

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: The hottest month on record
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
July 2023 has officially been confirmed as the hottest month on record globally.
That probably isn’t surprising to any of us who set foot outdoors last month - or kept up with news story after news story of heat waves wreaking havoc on communities all around the world.
This is a reality not up for debate: The climate crisis is real, and it’s happening right now .
The problem is, the Republican Party has woven into its foundational values a complete and total disregard for truth and science. Scores of candidates who will be on the ballot in 2024 - including my opponent! - still insist on calling climate change a hoax.
My opponent thinks climate change is just a “natural trend” - which is, of course, absurd. But what’s scarier is that he actually believes that taking common-sense measures to tackle the climate crisis will only make people’s quality of life worse.
Personally, I would bet that the brutal heat waves, severe droughts, and extreme weather events like wildfires and hurricanes are the things making people’s quality of life worse.
And these things are going to be our new normal - unless we face reality head on, deal with our fossil fuel consumption, and put real, long-term climate solutions into action.
The only way we’re going to be able to do that is to elect more common-sense, science-guided, Democratic leaders in Congress and take back our House majority. Are you in to help us get there?
If so, I hope you’ll add your name to my petition to elect pro-science candidates in 2024! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/kP5hJigiXUyZ_ch9buB89A2]
We’ve seen what a movement of committed, fired-up voters can do - we saw it in 2018 with the incredible nationwide blue wave, and again in 2020. And we saw it in 2022 when we prevented a red wave. Now, we need to get ready to see it again - to be it again.
Thanks for sticking with me.
-Sara
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Congresswoman Sara Jacobs
California’s 51st District

clean_body: Tonight at 7:30 PM, you’re invited to join actress and activist Jane Fonda and environmentalist Bill McKibben for a virtual rally for Aaron Regunberg for Congress! | | | Peter, Aaron is a climate lawyer, community organizer, and former state representative running for Rhode Island’s 1st Congressional District to secure a clean planet, affordable housing, and an economy that works for everyone. If elected, Aaron will grow our Working Families Majority in Congress and help pass the legislation that all of our communities need the most. With his competitive primary election just 26 days away, all hands are on deck — including Jane Fonda and Bill McKibben — to make sure that we keep up the energy and finish strong. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Team Wiley
subject: re: wiley’s note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hi there!
Did you see Wiley’s note from yesterday? We’re trying to make every day of this campaign count, but we need your help. The middle of August may seem a ways away from next year’s election, but if we have to put in the hard work today to ensure it pays off next November.
So, Peter, can you help us make right NOW count by chipping in $5 today? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email&amount=5]
Thank you!
Team Wiley
----- Original Message -----
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email]Hey Peter!
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email]
A few weeks ago, Adeline and I went to the farmers market to pick out some produce. There’s nothing like supporting our local farmers and eating delicious watermelon in the summer.
While I’m trying to soak in all of these days with Caroline and the kids, I’m also thinking about where things stand with our campaign.
The truth is: November 2024 will be here before we know it, and I want to make every single day leading up to the next election count. We can’t afford to wait until the end of this campaign to raise money. We have to put in the work now so we can afford all of our efforts leading up to next year.
So, will you help make today count by chipping in $25 right now? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email&amount=25]
I appreciate your support! I hope the rest of your summer is sweet. 🍉
Wiley Nickel
Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. His 2022 opponent, Bo Hines, has announced he'll run against Wiley in 2024. Support #TeamWiley with a monthly donation today!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn?refcode=230730-email] CONTRIBUTE MONTHLY >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2308-q3-wn-mm?refcode=230814-email&recurring=true]

The middle of August may seem a ways away from next year’s election, but if we have to put in the hard work today to ensure it pays off next November. So, Peter, can you help us make right NOW count by chipping in $5 today? [] Thank you! Team Wiley ----- Original Message ----- [ Peter! [] A few weeks ago, Adeline and I went to the farmers market to pick out some produce. There’s nothing like supporting our local farmers and eating delicious watermelon in the summer. While I’m trying to soak in all of these days with Caroline and the kids, I’m also thinking about where things stand with our campaign. The truth is: November 2024 will be here before we know it, and I want to make every single day leading up to the next election count. We can’t afford to wait until the end of this campaign to raise money. We have to put in the work now so we can afford all of our efforts leading up to next year. So, will you help make today count by chipping in $25 right now? [] I appreciate your support! I hope the rest of your summer is sweet. 🍉 Wiley Nickel Wiley Nickel is the Congressman for NC-13. I hope you don’t misunderstand my message, Peter. This is not a sky-is-falling, desperate plea for money kind of email you may receive from other political candidates.

body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8o2ie9qe0690n9q6ba3g1jhdfm19qhp10253dv8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1im0ob2chh2bs)

| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That’s why this is the hardest email I’ve had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She’s taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a “Toss up.”_**

I’m looking at the numbers... and **Lauren Boebert may lose her seat.** **_We can stop this from happening. I am asking everyone reading this email to join me in contributing whatever they can and save Lauren Boebert from defeat._**
---
| | | [STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN >>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zparn90f8gg6pju1afr2muomu0sgg5ueb66eq53g_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1im0ob2chh2bs "STOP SOROS: SUPPORT LAUREN")
---
| Let’s just start with the facts.

**>** Last year, her opponent **lost by only 546 votes** after a lengthy recount.

**>** This year, he’s **outraised Lauren 3 to 1** , and she’s in danger of falling too far behind.

**>** If this trend continues, Soros will have punished **one of the strongest voices defending my father** and the American way next year. [**_I am begging every Patriot who loves this country to step up and defend Lauren Boebert. Her record speaks for itself–she had our back and now we MUST have her back. _**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znfh1jla0dici0gd2b5t689pa6utcl2kc10vclp8_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1im0ob2chh2bs)

Joe Biden and his crooked cabal have **declared it their mission** to completely **eradicate** **the MAGA Agenda** , and those who support it. Soros is bankrolling their effort.

And it all starts with **wiping out my father and Lauren**.

She’s **stood against the Woke “Squad,”** stood up for my father during the **unlawful persecutions levied against him** , **and never wavered in her commitment** to America First. You couldn’t find a more winsome ally than Lauren.

Which is why I am coming to you and all patriots who love America.** [Now is the time to stand with Lauren before it’s too late!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9te5aipqlho1haltn8qp7uj7ct5sibk84dlgnj0_rp22sh2s8i66p72c1im0ob2chh2bs)**

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: | = | | Hi Peter, it's Joe. = But first, let me share facts about our toss-up House race here in New Jersey’s 7th District. 1. NJ-07 was home to one of the closest House races in the country in 2022. Republicans won this seat by just 8,000 votes last cycle. 2. So now Republicans must hold this seat to keep their House majority. And they’re planning to spend millions of dollars to attack Democrats like me and keep this seat red. 3. But our race isn’t just about beating Republicans. I’m running for Congress to defend democracy, protect reproductive rights, and take action to address the climate crisis. 4. Unfortunately, my opponent Tom Kean is controlled by Washington Republicans. And he’s willing to do or say anything to stay in the good graces of his party’s bosses. 5. So deadlines like the one we’re facing tomorrow could decide this race. We can’t compete with the GOP megadonors boosting Kean’s campaign without your support. Please, Peter:= | | | = | | = We know $5 doesn’t sound like a lot. But in a race this close, the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. So thank you, Peter. —Joe Signorello | | = | | We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m writing with an important request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
Hello Derek, I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — [_**but if you are ready to do your part right now, you can split a donation between Gov. Josh Shapiro and my campaign at this link knowing how grateful I am for your support.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68079032/421864422/-1645383944?refcode=email_081423_Shapiro-casey-split&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGI3YWI0Yi1kMTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKv8BEHEl9nZ6eVc15sDd13H5Jag-Y-Vtl4pfNneQUk=) The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too. It is hard to understate the stakes, Derek: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. We need to be able to fight back against the millions that McConnell and the GOP are going to spend here, which will hinge on our ability to meet each fundraising goal we set. [_**Can I count on you to split a contribution of $20 or more between Josh Shapiro and my re-election campaign today, Derek? I need your help to keep PA blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68079033/421864423/-1645383944?refcode=email_081423_Shapiro-casey-split&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGI3YWI0Yi1kMTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKv8BEHEl9nZ6eVc15sDd13H5Jag-Y-Vtl4pfNneQUk=) | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68079036/421864424/-1645383944?refcode=email_081423_Shapiro-casey-split&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZGI3YWI0Yi1kMTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oKv8BEHEl9nZ6eVc15sDd13H5Jag-Y-Vtl4pfNneQUk=)

Bob Casey

clean_body: Hello Derek, I’m writing to ask if you will make a donation to our campaign. I hope you will give me a minute to explain why this request is important — = The truth is, defending this Senate seat isn’t only about ensuring we can keep fighting for Pennsylvania families in Washington, as important as that is. This is also the race that could decide if Democrats hold our Senate majority. We know that, and Mitch McConnell knows it, too. It is hard to understate the stakes, Derek: Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid, women’s rights, LGBTQ+ equality, the right to vote, and more are on the line if Republicans flip the Senate next year. name: Kevin D. Roberts
subject: Submit Your Socialized Healthcare Ballot
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtMGY1OTQ5YjZlMjg4NDE5MThlOTIxMjRjNGFjZWI0YzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMCIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oZXJpdGFnZS5vcmcvc29jaWFsaXplZC1oZWFsdGhjYXJlLWJhbGxvdC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhlYWx0aGNhcmViYWxsb3QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1JBTk80MjAyNCJ9/f_0_RoGhl9f-Kcjy3qrdkw)

Dear Fellow Conservative,

I’m reaching out today with a quick reminder of a hard-hitting message that my team and I continue to share on news media, on Capitol Hill, and online:

**Socialism is the wrong prescription for Americans who want quality, affordable health care.**

If you believe this as I do, please don’t delay in submitting your opinion to be considered in urgent debates over socialized health care and your medical coverage.

You know the facts: that the Left’s extravagant “Medicare for All” plan would rob Americans of their choices, increase healthcare costs and end Medicare as we know it.

If you are frustrated by politicians who think more government is the answer to every problem, and who want to put your healthcare choices in the hands of Washington bureaucrats instead of your own doctor, we need your help today to stand firm against socialized healthcare.

Please use the link below to submit your opinions in our Ballot on Socialized Healthcare:

**[[Submit Your Ballot]](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtMGY1OTQ5YjZlMjg4NDE5MThlOTIxMjRjNGFjZWI0YzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMSIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oZXJpdGFnZS5vcmcvc29jaWFsaXplZC1oZWFsdGhjYXJlLWJhbGxvdC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhlYWx0aGNhcmViYWxsb3QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1JBTk80MjAyNCJ9/LFVg-Kb-BT_MIMUt_lOs_g)**

The facts make it clear that one-size-fits-all, government-run health care is wrong for America. Heritage is the conscience of conservatives on this key issue — reminding them that they campaigned on promises to fight big government and that they now MUST follow through on their promises to you and all U.S. taxpayers by fighting socialized health care.

To fight socialism, we must expose the costs and dangers of government-rationed health care. So please don’t delay. Submit your ballot today:

**[[Submit Your Ballot]](http://trk.readactnews.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiOTgzNjUxNjA3IiwicnEiOiIwMi1iMjMyMjYtMGY1OTQ5YjZlMjg4NDE5MThlOTIxMjRjNGFjZWI0YzEiLCJwaCI6bnVsbCwibSI6ZmFsc2UsInVpIjoiMiIsInVuIjoiIiwidSI6Imh0dHBzOi8vc2VjdXJlZC5oZXJpdGFnZS5vcmcvc29jaWFsaXplZC1oZWFsdGhjYXJlLWJhbGxvdC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWhlYWx0aGNhcmViYWxsb3QmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFFX1JBTk80MjAyNCJ9/RQUCCu3ZgyN0luAp2ydJTA)**

Best regards,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Teaching Black history and the truth about slavery [signatures needed]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
It’s outrageous that Florida will teach public school students that enslaved Black people benefited from slavery. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvD-yoVeeAs1uA8nOnPxAnY7gMIMswgN8muDgqlwU_BZ9sSE-fQ17Y2wlBa08hTJZwmymCduHh1nl7BijufFiuk_Op8wrNrcbxk1sUUDC0GdG3QyUR_QOsjcKUZcqigedB4r5zzKUMTuJGNCOVe2a5Mnkb-7sgAXnGo1R5Cvj_I5NyxT_eSkfcbojXUPscdTQfaeW-hKHiZ2WTcYokiPqLT72AAm0CD5KhYAdi6Tq1CwC_UFhsWj22nqIf7iNBmYsZ/3yq/2DebwJT_QsOI9zMq-SXwGA/h0/9WeTFFAmBNdTe3ccJbLSjQgyKHaSpjkGykoks9jc8T4)
---
Friend, Florida’s Board of Education just approved new Black history standards to teach public school students that enslaved Black people benefited from slavery. This is disgusting and enables white supremacy. Slavery was a cruel, inhumane, violent practice that denied Black people their basic human dignity. Many of the founding fathers owned human beings, and the legacy of slavery continues today, with discriminatory laws and a widening racial wealth and health gap. I’ve cosponsored two important bills to teach the truth about our nation’s history:**Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s**** _African American History Act_** to support the development of accurate, relevant, and accessible African American history resources, and **Rep. Al Green’s**** _Slavery Remembrance Day Resolution_** to promote education about the history of slavery in America. [**Please sign on today to support the**** _African American History Act_****and the**** _Slavery Remembrance Day Resolution,_****as we face right-wing attempts across the country to whitewash Black history.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARTVA38gG42BunGOxFEJ2wmbOFUDJnrjhZ5CUg9z1NwwFWbBKQIDiNVdjgewdY1c-Vg2CbXh6XHR-xXUBRYG2Yh0eIwNDymfc0i3d-qtD9TyfZ4yfTYV6r0KxA3dKje4uT17qFfZbDshythJVPyJhXlehxNuVitoNxRQt8BtNrHC0p4QKuesN4MCfbwLyrl3IA-08-YZrh7V4T2lfIA7QfVKf1DdeMiRAcjs8uZ9F08uoqX087con6W9e1JAVvwsK0apOM-I9l_fOsgfEN-fpddovs3ztoMFg_A9_CWJV1YiOUC3iAgCxSOtSTB4dBKpNbN3bIdNxSrKAzxsBpnpVhFmCY_aSpkK7eGy5jDUEy_6rdAMkzWsen8lH4_QR3hoC6yDFjY3HDSvhja-s3VrWa-T-aa2rQJvlvKO13oqpP2Do/3yq/2DebwJT_QsOI9zMq-SXwGA/h1/3jbS4_wmGWmB7Mk1AL2L4wjXBcwC6OFcqKEtXZHbQuQ) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARTVA38gG42BunGOxFEJ2wmbOFUDJnrjhZ5CUg9z1NwwFWbBKQIDiNVdjgewdY1c-Vg2CbXh6XHR-xXUBRYG2Yh0eIwNDymfc0i3d-qtD9TyfuW0-3kUAzyl-kDEok6by5Qoa0FqceacG7g7bNslFNJE4ZOHryglsWKe_lOLVyb-5TdelM8VpxHYTPS4Gg-qs39tJ-JfZQzjaAnwq_vEynZ67Qs1bz2s4PBTHSzOluHSaRqV3EA4yN0wDqNyHA2A-Dkjq6V1i0i4GuVlsHeGq92WiLEKKIhTtYuiVyZJyQGHZhXxoA0F0HlHaWO1WGAU-kWiKNbOVyE06VcuwER_uExOS5QUCsaNtDEkzD8d1Zdft-Nvw7n1_p3gmVNO7kVl6sThnj7Boso9TgQUXtfAj0QEvhiln82bRaqCTj6-GWKF0/3yq/2DebwJT_QsOI9zMq-SXwGA/h2/m6z2slL1xX5wLXBFSW4um5epmawY4GCi70N6O8pMhwY)
---
We cannot learn from our past if our past is no longer being taught. But in the past few years, efforts in 44 states have tried to limit education about race and systemic inequities.
We must learn from and teach the truth about our past—and how it informs our present. Centuries of disinvestment in Black communities, and systemic racism in our institutions, have led to continually widening inequities. Today, Black households only have a fraction of the wealth that white households have, which is crucial for surviving and thriving.
In order to build a multiracial democracy where our government protects our equal rights, we must reckon with racism and challenge white supremacy.
**If passed, Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s**** _African American History Act_****would invest $10 million over 5 years in the National Museum of African American History and Culture to support African American history education programs that are voluntarily available for students, parents, and educators.**
When introducing the bill, **Bowman noted:**_“The moment we are in requires a clear-eyed effort to ensure that everyone has access to resources and education that accurately recount African American history – including how the Black struggle for freedom has strengthened our society for all Americans and brought us closer to realizing the potential of our democracy.”_
**Rep. Al Green’s**** _Slavery Remembrance Day Resolution_****denounces the institution of slavery while commemorating the millions of people who were stolen from Africa and sold as property. It calls for an annual Slavery Remembrance Day on August 20, marking the first day that enslaved Africans arrived in the United States in 1619.**
**Green said:** _“It is our moral imperative to ensure future generations understand the full weight of slavery and grasp its modern-day implications... Slavery is the root cause of the current social standing of Black people in the United States.”_
**We must urgently pass these two bills in response to right-wing attempts at censorship. You cannot teach the truth about American history without African American history, and we will not allow anyone to rewrite Black history.**
[**Please sign on today to support the**** _African American History Act_****and the**** _Slavery Remembrance Day Resolution._**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnWJ6WF1TqTbT-FzKAzjyARTVA38gG42BunGOxFEJ2wmbOFUDJnrjhZ5CUg9z1NwwFWbBKQIDiNVdjgewdY1c-Vg2CbXh6XHR-xXUBRYG2Yh0eIwNDymfc0i3d-qtD9TyfKrmpdJC47d6xTZAtSeZ9AUs3zEfFhLtr-qutsbbEbDek62qUeZh09w3CcqZGaXlmjhYwCoIRy19E9xyA9gd3UBqQ6d8gwgRbdglD0Yg7PE0zDLBPR_ZafCtOz-A1CtvT5WXTdFDeOPbEVMFtpW6hEejXrCYLOQGQGcnIFTK4JrsIQhs0oX2vQyFiq_SzB_Rg_KhYgaAtTcNtHK5EereH__gyfS9Zw8is_NzRAItY6XyQPlZCHBxMRWdKnsi_-RJFBzFGy0JNSyywch_SyN4wwjM6lc7Il58f_6wySj1nCNud3xKVfEpSwlJBk_uUqtdk/3yq/2DebwJT_QsOI9zMq-SXwGA/h3/P-ZNnMrSRaGQiVNryJg81UetXSOB5mrWOIkUQgNMY2I)
Together, let’s keep telling the truth and calling for justice.
In solidarity,
Rashida

Many of the founding fathers owned human beings, and the legacy of slavery continues today, with discriminatory laws and a widening racial wealth and health gap. I’ve cosponsored two important bills to teach the truth about our nation’s history:Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s African American History Act to support the development of accurate, relevant, and accessible African American history resources, and Rep. Al Green’s Slavery Remembrance Day Resolution to promote education about the history of slavery in America. | We cannot learn from our past if our past is no longer being taught. But in the past few years, efforts in 44 states have tried to limit education about race and systemic inequities. We must learn from and teach the truth about our past—and how it informs our present. Centuries of disinvestment in Black communities, and systemic racism in our institutions, have led to continually widening inequities. Today, Black households only have a fraction of the wealth that white households have, which is crucial for surviving and thriving. In order to build a multiracial democracy where our government protects our equal rights, we must reckon with racism and challenge white supremacy. If passed, Rep. Jamaal Bowman’s African American History Actwould invest $10 million over 5 years in the National Museum of African American History and Culture to support African American history education programs that are voluntarily available for students, parents, and educators. When introducing the bill, Bowman noted:“The moment we are in requires a clear-eyed effort to ensure that everyone has access to resources and education that accurately recount African American history – including how the Black struggle for freedom has strengthened our society for all Americans and brought us closer to realizing the potential of our democracy.” Rep. Al Green’s Slavery Remembrance Day Resolutiondenounces the institution of slavery while commemorating the millions of people who were stolen from Africa and sold as property. It calls for an annual Slavery Remembrance Day on August 20, marking the first day that enslaved Africans arrived in the United States in 1619. Green said: “It is our moral imperative to ensure future generations understand the full weight of slavery and grasp its modern-day implications... Slavery is the root cause of the current social standing of Black people in the United States.” We must urgently pass these two bills in response to right-wing attempts at censorship. You cannot teach the truth about American history without African American history, and we will not allow anyone to rewrite Black history. Together, let’s keep telling the truth and calling for justice. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . **FIRST** → I ran for Congress to represent my community, but I was seen as the underdog because Indigenous people like myself don't have access to the wealthy establishment donors that get many campaigns off the ground.

_**THEN**_ → We defied the odds, and I WON! I was sworn into Congress as the first ever Alaska Native representative, wearing my traditional Yup'ik mukluks and surrounded by a bipartisan group of women supporters.

_**NOW**_ → I'm fighting for Alaska in Congress, including disaster relief for Alaskans and protecting our natural resources, including our salmon runs.

We have only come this far because of the support of people like you. But with so much on the ballot, _**including the future of reproductive rights**_**,** the work is not done yet, Peter.

| **$23**

More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with **an average gift of $23**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021**.

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $23](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6f9dda1b7b6f4a51ac28551b8f916c64&_e=oCJ-qR04Q2Xw_NOnwGySZtvvhYEaFdXlx7QaK9h7ojFs-JC1NkSEq_zPKZLKGBwBnwDZ4gvpLUjfUhGDcFSR59ab7U1r5uzMtyyr01A4jUkJfrjkdAYfP25PsYbbVZyMcS4S3x1LbGzLEjwH5wvsw1I4PX5oHqhqpxxxTYfDMavIXIH_bFO8ukHbEZ8mx4hvP261Ad7pR22vg6uuMMIGicD2G9P0iCY1lPCCobVmJ0bLMpm_5j5kwXazakSl1qbXVPu6gG5Zb0_sNFLRtDSxOaADGs5AydLJUIZ2me7ZL6bGwGMAh6yNQJdoc6cVcK4Xcc9IfhM1TW_Fg3TnqV1f7rKWaLVztSm1EVhzbPm6mvjvvBopu6FmcD1db3BaANdZsyT9TvAghJifqOJk7Rp4pRgZvpLjZvlo3LLk2jNHisY%3D)** , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=6f9dda1b7b6f4a51ac28551b8f916c64&_e=oCJ-qR04Q2Xw_NOnwGySZtvvhYEaFdXlx7QaK9h7ojFs-JC1NkSEq_zPKZLKGBwBnwDZ4gvpLUjfUhGDcFSR59ab7U1r5uzMtyyr01A4jUkJfrjkdAYfP25PsYbbVZyMcS4S3x1LbGzLEjwH5wvsw1I4PX5oHqhqpxxxTYfDMavIXIH_bFO8ukHbEZ8mx4hvP261Ad7pR22vg6uuMMIGicD2G9P0iCY1lPCCobVmJ0bLMpm_5j5kwXazakSl1qbXVPu6gG5Zb0_sNFLRtDSxOYL9bn7R8kSVi3ZTKkvscUSuvg_9viMwBQgVEB8Lt19AOkAntsyC2tmoqC7X5Ymrpcta1O8K9jAE60nLJn5V_sd5eTuX1j-BDA-ia9xc_EoVSMx1x_AHWEAvHwj-hcntNfiu87hdrUGqr0AzllVdq0w%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

It's been a backbone for seniors for almost a century. **So why are Senate Republicans putting forth a plan that guts Social Security?** Republicans have consistently tried to cut Social Security benefits, breaking a core promise Americans have relied on for generations. Generations of workers have paid into Social Security. We cannot betray their investment; in fact, we need to strengthen it!
My plan to strengthen Social Security is simple:
1. **Require the wealthiest Americans to pay their fair share in taxes.** Most Americans pay Social Security contributions on all of their earnings. But not the wealthy. So let's have people making more than $250,000 pay into the Social Security fund on those earnings. More than 90% of Americans would not see their taxes go up under this plan.

2. **Adopt a cost of living adjustment that includes the rapidly rising costs of health care and prescription drugs.** The annual adjustment to Social Security benefits doesn't reflect the actual costs seniors face. Let's increase the benefits so they keep up with expenses.

**Combined, these reforms will ensure Social Security remains solvent for decades and serves America's seniors better.**
And what's the Republicans' plan?
**They are pushing the idea to end all federal programs, including Social Security, after five years.** Remember when former House Speaker Paul Ryan kept trying to cut Medicare and Social Security? This isn't a new plan. The wealthy CEOs don't rely on Social Security, so the GOP doesn't care about Social Security.
But we do, and we'll fight the MAGA Republicans to make sure we keep the promise of Social Security to hardworking Americans who spend their lives paying in so it's there when they need it.
[**Today, I'm asking you to send $4 to the Blue Wave Project and help us expand our Democratic majority and protect Social Security from MAGA Republicans.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68079874/421866143/-641752998?refcode=2023-08-14-socialsecurity&recurring=&amount=4&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=fae1b685-d23a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWUxYjY4NS1kMjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gM_MBMonx7XHkJshU9SX3ANdaoXvjNz26QgagxtGq0w=)
Onward!

clean_body: | | | | Americans love Social Security. You work your whole life, paying in with the promise that Social Security will be there when you retire or if you become disabled. It's been a backbone for seniors for almost a century. So why are Senate Republicans putting forth a plan that guts Social Security? Republicans have consistently tried to cut Social Security benefits, breaking a core promise Americans have relied on for generations. Democrats are committed to fighting to protect Social Security from Republican cuts. The choice could not be more stark. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Generations of workers have paid into Social Security. We cannot betray their investment; in fact, we need to strengthen it! My plan to strengthen Social Security is simple: 1. Require the wealthiest Americans to pay their fair share in taxes. Most Americans pay Social Security contributions on all of their earnings. But not the wealthy. So let's have people making more than $250,000 pay into the Social Security fund on those earnings. More than 90% of Americans would not see their taxes go up under this plan. 2. Adopt a cost of living adjustment that includes the rapidly rising costs of health care and prescription drugs. The annual adjustment to Social Security benefits doesn't reflect the actual costs seniors face. Let's increase the benefits so they keep up with expenses. Combined, these reforms will ensure Social Security remains solvent for decades and serves America's seniors better. And what's the Republicans' plan? They are pushing the idea to end all federal programs, including Social Security, after five years. Remember when former House Speaker Paul Ryan kept trying to cut Medicare and Social Security? This isn't a new plan. The wealthy CEOs don't rely on Social Security, so the GOP doesn't care about Social Security. But we do, and we'll fight the MAGA Republicans to make sure we keep the promise of Social Security to hardworking Americans who spend their lives paying in so it's there when they need it. = Onward! name: Lucas Kunce
subject: An update on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re nearly halfway through our third fundraising quarter of the year. Here’s where we stand:
#
Hi Peter, it’s Lucas Kunce, and I’ve got an update for you.
On our usual check-in call this morning, my campaign manager flagged that this coming Wednesday marks the halfway point in our third fundraising quarter of 2023 — and that **we’re tracking about 2,500 donations behind** where we need to be.
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35566?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk)**
**Let me be crystal clear: this isn’t some arbitrary fundraising goal.** Staying on track this quarter means we’ll be ready to launch into the next phase of our campaign — opening offices, getting boots on the ground across the state, and regularly reaching voters with our message of fundamentally changing who has power in our country.
Over the next few days, my team and I are going to do everything we can to hit this goal and get our campaign back on track for the quarter — **including asking grassroots supporters like you to chip in $10, $25, or whatever you think is best before Wednesday’s deadline.[So Peter, can I count on your support during this critical moment of our campaign?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35566?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35566?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk)
---
From the moment we got into this race back in January, Josh Hawley and the GOP insiders propping up his campaign have been determined to tear me down. And with the help of grassroots supporters like you — chipping in and sharing our message when you can — we’ve made it clear: **they’re right to be scared.**
Just a few days after we launched this campaign, _National Journal_ said our race “represents one of the Democratic Party’s better offensive targets” in 2024.
And since then, we’ve made that a reality by breaking Missouri fundraising records and building a truly people-powered coalition to take back this Senate seat with support from the Missouri AFL-CIO, the Missouri Fire Fighters, former statewide leaders like Joe Maxwell and Susan Montee, and local elected officials and community leaders all across the state.
That’s why GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors just put more than **$1 MILLION** into a brand new Super PAC to attack me — and it’s why national Republicans are dumping money into Josh Hawley’s campaign.
They know that Hawley is the most vulnerable GOP senator up for re-election next year — with even worse approval ratings than Ted Cruz in Texas and Rick Scott in Florida. And they can tell we’re putting together a powerful grassroots movement that’s capable of winning this race, flipping this U.S. Senate seat, and taking back power for real working people.
**So now, we need to be prepared to launch into the next phase of our campaign AND head off attacks from these GOP insiders every day between now and Election Day** — and that’s why I need your help today, Peter.
**[Can I count on you to add a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you think is best today so we can stay on track this quarter and defeat Josh Hawley next year? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors in this race, so you know I mean it when I say anything you can afford to give makes a big impact.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35566?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=7&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=8&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=9&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=10&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=11&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35567?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=12&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/35566?refcode=em20230814-3557&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=13&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk)
---
**When we defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat, I promise you this: We’re going to shake things up in the U.S. Senate.**
Together, we’ll end the filibuster and secure voting rights, outlaw war profiteering, legalize weed, abolish corporate PACs, and stand up to Big-Brother-style attacks on abortion access from control-obsessed politicians like Josh Hawley.
We’ll stop handing out money for Wall Street and forever wars, and start rebuilding communities in Missouri and all across the country. And we’ll create the next generation of energy jobs right here at home, getting us off fossil fuels forever.
That’s what we’re fighting for in this movement. And I’m glad you’re a part of it.
Now let’s get moving,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230814-3557-footer&t=14&refcode2=3557_614464_uNtMJk&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=3557%2E614464%2EuNtMJk). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.
