Hi team, it’s Greg.

I wanted to reach out personally to make sure you saw my team’s message - forwarded below - about my new opponent.

**Here’s what this means for us:** Just as we expected, Republicans are eyeing this seat, and the election here in OH-01 will be one of the most competitive again in 2024.

I know this will be a tough fight, but it’s the right fight._And our children and families are worth fighting for._

[**From restoring reproductive freedom to protecting our public schools, everything is on the line next November. That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5, $10 (or more!) today to power our grassroots campaign? Every dollar makes a huge difference.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68081898/421867901/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.14_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBlMDJiNC1kNDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdZpmA2VYDvUAKUiXFYVtuDk8eqKz55_7582_ZFgycs=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68081900/421867902/-1207523720?amount=5&express_lane=true&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.14_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBlMDJiNC1kNDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdZpmA2VYDvUAKUiXFYVtuDk8eqKz55_7582_ZFgycs=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68081921/421867908/-1207523720?amount=10&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.14_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBlMDJiNC1kNDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdZpmA2VYDvUAKUiXFYVtuDk8eqKz55_7582_ZFgycs=) **Last night, the first Republican opponent launched his campaign to unseat Greg and flip OH-01 back to red.** _But we’re not going to let that happen._

This opponent is an anti-choice extremist who is all in on one of the most un-Democratic ballot measures in Ohio’s history. He’s more of the same chaos and extremism that we beat back last year.

[**We need your help – a donation right now will help to ensure Greg has the resources to keep Ohio blue so that we can protect the rights of Ohioans >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68081924/421867909/-1207523720?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2023.08.14_b1_gl_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMTBlMDJiNC1kNDNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mdZpmA2VYDvUAKUiXFYVtuDk8eqKz55_7582_ZFgycs=)

We need to show national Republicans that the grassroots team that got Greg elected is still just as strong as it was last year. **But we can’t do it alone.**

I wanted to reach out personally to make sure you saw my team’s message - forwarded below - about my new opponent. Here’s what this means for us: Just as we expected, Republicans are eyeing this seat, and the election here in OH-01 will be one of the most competitive again in 2024. I know this will be a tough fight, but it’s the right fight.And our children and families are worth fighting for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = = Thank you so much for your support. Means the world to me. Appreciate you, Greg On July 12, 2023 Landsman Race Update wrote: = Last night, the first Republican opponent launched his campaign to unseat Greg and flip OH-01 back to red. But we’re not going to let that happen. This opponent is an anti-choice extremist who is all in on one of the most un-Democratic ballot measures in Ohio’s history. He’s more of the same chaos and extremism that we beat back last year. = We need to show national Republicans that the grassroots team that got Greg elected is still just as strong as it was last year. body:
|

[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)

| | Look, I know it’s a Monday and you probably don’t have time to read some long, drawn-out explanation for why I’m sending this email, Peter. **So instead, I’ll just get right to it: Tomorrow is our mid-month fundraising deadline and we’re well off pace to hit our goal.[So, could you do me a favor and chip in $10 to our Senate campaign before deleting this email and going on with the rest of your day?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4728?t=9&amount=10&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)** | | | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4728?t=10&amount=10&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4728?t=11&amount=35&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)
---
The truth is, we’re running against a self-funded, multi-millionaire who has already spent roughly $2 million of his own money on expensive TV ads to boost his campaign.
**So, long story short:** We’re well behind the 8-ball here, Peter.
But that’s OK. Because I truly believe in the ability of _this_ grassroots team to come together and outwork any wealthy millionaire who thinks they can buy their way into the U.S. Senate.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $10 to help our Senate campaign get back on track and spread our message to voters all across Maryland?](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4728?t=12&amount=10&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)**
| | [Donate $10](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4728?t=13&amount=10&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)
---
| | [Other Amount](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4728?t=14&amount=35&akid=354%2E52803%2EeGS_4Z)
---
Thank you!
—Angela

name: Councillor Keith Potts
subject: An OFFICIAL opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keith Potts for Senate
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, let's talk about last week –
The Indiana GOP has officially endorsed extremist Jim Banks in this race.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
That's right – the same Jim Banks who's well-known for leading the fight to cut Social Security and take away one's right to choose.
This is a big deal, Friend. Before I give you more insight, our campaign needs your early support to have any chance of facing Jim next November. Will you chip in any amount you can spare today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
CHIP IN >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Friend, although it's unusual for a party to endorse a candidate this early, it's clear to our team that the GOP is running scared.
Because they're threatened by folks like me, who are clearly committed to serving our people, the GOP has cleared the field for Jim Banks. They will pour resources into this race to make sure his divisive message gets across the state.
To combat this, our team is working around the clock – meeting Hoosiers, getting to know their concerns, and letting them know about my plan to be a strong voice for our community in Washington.
Friend, this is where you come in.
To get our message out to folks, we need a strong coalition of grassroots supporters to help us attend events, keep in touch digitally, and order campaign materials like yard signs and mailers.
But our team really needs your help – will you donate today and show Jim Banks and the GOP the strength of our people-first, people-funded campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Thank you,
Keith Potts
Keith Potts was first elected in 2019 to represent District 2 on the Indianapolis City-County Council.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]
Keith’s political work has been centered on issue-based campaigns and progressive candidates, with a particular focus on protecting women’s rights, LGBTQ+ rights, and the environment.
He is an arts advocate, having graduated in 2012 from the Boston Conservatory of Music with a Bachelor of Fine Arts degree. He works with local non-profit arts organizations, teaching after-school music classes, directing, and performing with organizations like the Phoenix Theatre, Indy Shakes, Indianapolis Chamber Orchestra, Actors Theatre of Indiana, and Civic Theatre. Keith currently lives on the north side of Indianapolis with his husband, Dr. Bryan Dodd, and their rescue dog, Mak.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to
Keith Potts for Senate
PO Box 90103
Indianapolis, IN 46260
SUPPORT KEITH [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/potts-email?refcode=20230814_em_fr_b1_KP_react]

body:
Lauren Boebert is a fighter that stood by my father when it mattered.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | | [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7e3504cce63d464f8fc8827c1659512d&_e=IEjwVp2-llkxX-0eGlvMH6FfD7TTvjBSrGupeXlkqThUVthYOuaz6GKL7iOSNmgr43hURmeTBjCkU-bS58FfceH703nDIagU9UTixV7ixNDg8z3Ps_Q_vRAzk5EVImSmeqBurHCeVjDv9JCVjLZz7tBzoBYsVc_I2NyyGd2ApXTQWPti7Zah0QWDLDp2adUQGsb5FT6PDMHs2v3LAfL0ATWZ-RLi4LReVqmDmWWoNCS7h82Lp18bIqLu9LrGgcnnpj1wHXf_PwpYU7QAIdOjHWkzWp0yvfkPBK2w6ffIkto%3D)
---
| | | Lauren Boebert is a fighter that **stood by my father when it mattered.**

That's why this is the hardest email I've had to write in a long time...

Friend, I know you care about the MAGA agenda. Lauren has been unrelenting in supporting and defending that agenda. She's taken the hits for it, and her Soros-backed challenger has closed the gap so much that **_her race was just declared a "Toss up."_**

| **$23**

More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with **an average gift of $23**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021**.

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $23](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5cf5ebd732074eb991ef4b7944f47afe&_e=LoBSNpoDWdmkFb3-t0wwCDFUaSPtF5d-a9HBInVfoy7sthBrmPAlMrILgVpmC1AkerFpOacUSuukX9dnHcLLD1dvMHRhqbFGuSJgnrE9Xu2U0FjoP01kqWeRsnj7DVkRm2g2EDG42365mDIaXRUHui5MEIPIq7OauFAUUkuQBvTpOTBQ-95VTkiDHYoGPaymajEMzdKMlv40UC4Cdpu6e7ox9828yc8Bi04Vo9DNbn-pyN7aGnFrNln4jPxrqzDwoeulAndbfCm1fg8lbf9T2Swmw-3nnhmDNmPCQsl8KIwMjNQaEWXi4sTCOljZJ77p12fNlswhpAfuVp6VguOmo1oIT_7t3RoeP4hp3pNHmjfnjwg2TeVlIPfJqZeHWX6eZMZjVsTLWGF7PIqZaWVk1U6kphoPSbKrOrh4tG-IZGs%3D)** , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5cf5ebd732074eb991ef4b7944f47afe&_e=LoBSNpoDWdmkFb3-t0wwCDFUaSPtF5d-a9HBInVfoy7sthBrmPAlMrILgVpmC1AkerFpOacUSuukX9dnHcLLD1dvMHRhqbFGuSJgnrE9Xu2U0FjoP01kqWeRsnj7DVkRm2g2EDG42365mDIaXRUHui5MEIPIq7OauFAUUkuQBvTpOTBQ-95VTkiDHYoGPaymajEMzdKMlv40UC4Cdpu6e7ox9828yc8Bi04Vo9DNbn-pyN7aGnFrNln4jPxrqzDwoeulAndbfCm1fg8lbf9T2bAmKmluYaaLeHUlktstmHWLj0LCU9j5VtA9peyqJHtD5nNe0717NGr_LCHs1aeF_7hkMkvOzt2qBlkNyhEUOsOKH7Fv1BeTUOsXsSLxCH1aQXiBvmt45922zjRQ763gub-80IZyFKmEJAVU-fxKSkc%3D)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

_**It may not be the person asking for it**_ The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, **[yet 40% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5cf5ebd732074eb991ef4b7944f47afe&_e=LoBSNpoDWdmkFb3-t0wwCDFUaSPtF5d-a9HBInVfoy7sthBrmPAlMrILgVpmC1AkerFpOacUSuukX9dnHcLLD1dvMHRhqbFGuSJgnrE9Xu2U0FjoP01kqWeRsnj7DVkRm2g2EDG42365mDIaXRUHui5MEIPIq7OauFAUUkuQBvTpOTBQ-95VTkiDHYoGPaymajEMzdKMlv40UC4Cdpu6e7ox9828yc8Bi04Vo9DNbn-pyN7aGnFrNln4jPxrqzDwoeulAndbfCm1fg8lbf9T2SsC3x-lJ7qQ9QkRSQTWJvkDJZGzCQdExa_-m2Nh0PPMym7xWbnh1pRgcE-d5KSbpzVmFS2I27iszeEbmtaegrfw69OMZ5h5TZV26ZEkFeDzlw-lj5IjUxBeeBPnWRsVC2F-U9dGv4rrk1m9lCaheF8%3D)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $23](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5cf5ebd732074eb991ef4b7944f47afe&_e=LoBSNpoDWdmkFb3-t0wwCDFUaSPtF5d-a9HBInVfoy7sthBrmPAlMrILgVpmC1AkerFpOacUSuukX9dnHcLLD1dvMHRhqbFGuSJgnrE9Xu2U0FjoP01kqWeRsnj7DVkRm2g2EDG42365mDIaXRUHui5MEIPIq7OauFAUUkuQBvTpOTBQ-95VTkiDHYoGPaymajEMzdKMlv40UC4Cdpu6e7ox9828yc8Bi04Vo9DNbn-pyN7aGnFrNln4jPxrqzDwoeulAndbfCm1fg8lbf9T2S3m1wjC-OVRbco1p4w0K6sWAJPZk4HqZNX_ipcz6fh_eFLeRvok-pAaYyE0sdp4FUw10qXxaIz7gje4Cg1XZeOO1DjjKQ1EzRoVuhIQ0W0EnHdYtPbM8o7UfGSPtoT1SrxxqzoMCBc4t_tks3covLI%3D)** or another amount today?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=5cf5ebd732074eb991ef4b7944f47afe&_e=LoBSNpoDWdmkFb3-t0wwCDFUaSPtF5d-a9HBInVfoy7sthBrmPAlMrILgVpmC1AkerFpOacUSuukX9dnHcLLD1dvMHRhqbFGuSJgnrE9Xu2U0FjoP01kqWeRsnj7DVkRm2g2EDG42365mDIaXRUHui5MEIPIq7OauFAUUkuQBvTpOTBQ-95VTkiDHYoGPaymajEMzdKMlv40UC4Cdpu6e7ox9828yc8Bi04Vo9DNbn-pyN7aGnFrNln4jPxrqzDwoeulAndbfCm1fg8lbf9T2b5bYMDpYR5azh4Hnh2UqUjGx1Gh5VWVo9usIm-t1PWl-gZ_x5jS-O5MPdVyZhan0BosshIFIEcJ0wCS_5WjVi_lVRS3bDrskhCoU76uHy-UJgztZ8mlhApvCVrxGrHmuYX12xhUyzwlTe1RC93MCAE%3D)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our 5-seat House majority**. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Chloe Cole
subject: Experimenting on children for profit
body:
There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out

| |
---
| | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9f9413e22134b3a8b85beac0cdbb4d9&_e=aov4uLmyyCMXnZxmovUxTqBVRMs99suVF_96CxEAsOxTiBNw6LU4noDekw88X4JiLhDT1Enh3Bg9uLdWimzUuqk6qMr4TCMkGANZQ4cmufxEEwy-eo1jw-Cj7lw4bXV7Nj20sHF4lPbnB-Z0QJUq0qMwcvb8L8njHgf-KrzV10q9JbkAhGJhSVbOWIs-YS_HiOYwH1tw7jVwSRVHjkL1bFA3jhoGMVzZePw5WfynpMwrYZKI2srnu9xUWnzLxot0R-gb9yfubGNtZfiYNRKjDaw2LRWrHgmxS7QuI8TMUV5hF9kAM6XSebGSh5M2W3tN-S5F9leb78S0iE1Fvd2xh9F4I0PY77SxpmESJj1Sgms%3D) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9f9413e22134b3a8b85beac0cdbb4d9&_e=aov4uLmyyCMXnZxmovUxTqBVRMs99suVF_96CxEAsOxTiBNw6LU4noDekw88X4JiLhDT1Enh3Bg9uLdWimzUuqk6qMr4TCMkGANZQ4cmufxEEwy-eo1jw-Cj7lw4bXV7Nj20sHF4lPbnB-Z0QJUq0qMwcvb8L8njHgf-KrzV10q9JbkAhGJhSVbOWIs-YS_HiOYwH1tw7jVwSRVHjkL1bFUB-PRnR1RXHXpLTuDfirNqDnUx1pBQzcoCipe_jF6ZJU9vlnEDmCvKLt2n1IhKLKrF5esBTaYcBq1oQ7BGOGeottkAPcIgEE9J-5ZKJvuiUVwzMNTAucWvrcelDG4KRprWyk00MQFmEJ7yx8CLDT8%3D) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9f9413e22134b3a8b85beac0cdbb4d9&_e=aov4uLmyyCMXnZxmovUxTqBVRMs99suVF_96CxEAsOxTiBNw6LU4noDekw88X4JiLhDT1Enh3Bg9uLdWimzUuqk6qMr4TCMkGANZQ4cmufxEEwy-eo1jw-Cj7lw4bXV7Nj20sHF4lPbnB-Z0QJUq0qMwcvb8L8njHgf-KrzV10q9JbkAhGJhSVbOWIs-YS_HiOYwH1tw7jVwSRVHjkL1bEO3T5ZKNkNSCD17fZ6Qd9U0UCw3tKvD3iqyCARshUUtvwmDxoLad33ajZka02cM-2TZbK-6bTD1VJgVp8Red3Kr-zGDwt58vOyTJwZ4le7RAdjzF9zN5NlR_DNIqoFrhLyNgfaLA5uF3apJOgydh5M%3D) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like:
---
| |
* _Brach v. Newsom_ \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools...
* _Ngo v. Roce City Antifa_ \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING...
* _O 'Handley v. Padilla_ \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with...
* And now my case... _Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente_.

---
The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. [**That 's why I hope you'll consider helping us by rushing back a small tax-deductible donation of $25 or more. **](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9f9413e22134b3a8b85beac0cdbb4d9&_e=aov4uLmyyCMXnZxmovUxTqBVRMs99suVF_96CxEAsOxTiBNw6LU4noDekw88X4JiLhDT1Enh3Bg9uLdWimzUuqk6qMr4TCMkGANZQ4cmufxEEwy-eo1jw-Cj7lw4bXV7Nj20sHF4lPbnB-Z0QJUq0qMwcvb8L8njHgf-KrzV10q9JbkAhGJhSVbOWIs-YS_HiOYwH1tw7jVwSRVHjkL1bJIvTXovN6uJ_bz_4bXEL3b5jn7hkMJZaqFUfFe1E_VCPeDIDie6r_XUt10Quv-HhBVo326Is2v2F1VxEK1bYG8I5KcIzygrfUKHu2JAeASqs3I_O-syD4No-f_pzUiJDydV5UiYnt4xY85IjXdKcFE%3D) There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. [**But if everyone I 'm writing to can contribute just $25, or if you're able, maybe more -- $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9f9413e22134b3a8b85beac0cdbb4d9&_e=aov4uLmyyCMXnZxmovUxTqBVRMs99suVF_96CxEAsOxTiBNw6LU4noDekw88X4JiLhDT1Enh3Bg9uLdWimzUuqk6qMr4TCMkGANZQ4cmufxEEwy-eo1jw-Cj7lw4bXV7Nj20sHF4lPbnB-Z0QJUq0qMwcvb8L8njHgf-KrzV10q9JbkAhGJhSVbOWIs-YS_HiOYwH1tw7jVwSRVHjkL1bA0NH3n95xR6ONP1URvlk7HLd6ogaPBYn2jMYZMCeQAeLfwwU3sdS7BYlTFiNDZSM2Ht2bvpTIDUD66ucHVghVaFqRcJXGULMRhc3gTQIGfYgxJrz90fdDW09YmBJE0I6_ARrUeDWPWnsUf9iIsVVj8%3D), we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: **_" You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist."_** Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. **[Whether it's $25, $35, $50, $75, $100, $200, or even $500 or more...](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d9f9413e22134b3a8b85beac0cdbb4d9&_e=aov4uLmyyCMXnZxmovUxTqBVRMs99suVF_96CxEAsOxTiBNw6LU4noDekw88X4JiLhDT1Enh3Bg9uLdWimzUuqk6qMr4TCMkGANZQ4cmufxEEwy-eo1jw-Cj7lw4bXV7Nj20sHF4lPbnB-Z0QJUq0qMwcvb8L8njHgf-KrzV10q9JbkAhGJhSVbOWIs-YS_HiOYwH1tw7jVwSRVHjkL1bOZjPHxQ9SI86UTkNvUFOGc6ASv7XdhygAcQk_qrXLHJIw0DkA0VFEfZKWKO37013PJyZLY8HzotdP8APxuRQRhbjcl8phh4ia0ZJJle3JLHpyGwtvubpjqMQi9PPNKo97GN6UjK093KIxzTNikTkyg%3D)** every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters.
---
| | Thank you, Chloe Cole
---

clean_body: There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out | | | | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: | | Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." I've even been told de-transitioners like me don't exist. But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. I exist." Thank you for reading this letter from a complete stranger. I hope I can call you a friend now. And thank you for whatever help you can send to the Center for American Liberty. every bit moves us closer to stopping these monsters. | | Thank you, Chloe Cole | | | | P.S. This is a photo of me now. It's been a long, painful road but I'm finding happiness and purpose as I fight to make sure what happened to me NEVER happens to another child. Thank you so much for your help. -Chloe | | The Center for American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Hey Peter, Geoff
Simpson here — Justice Democrats’ Campaigns Director.

Right now, we’re halfway through the month of August and taking stock of
our grassroots fundraising. Unfortunately, we’re not quite where we need
to be, so we’ve set a mid month goal of $43,000 to get back on track.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136967?refcode=em20230814-30373&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30373%2E1203867%2EQXtGLf ]Can you chip in $3 or more right now to help Justice
Democrats reach our goal before tomorrow at midnight?

As we speak, some of our biggest and most powerful opponents are already
preparing for 2024. AIPAC has millions of dollars at their disposal, and
they’re actively recruiting candidates to run against Justice Democrat
incumbents, including members of the Squad like Ilhan Omar and Jamaal
Bowman.

It’s no secret: Justice Democrats is feeling the downturn in grassroots
fundraising during this off-year, and we know opponents like AIPAC see our
numbers and think they can take our movement out for good so they can
maintain the corporate-fueled status quo.

Supporters like you are the only thing standing in their way.

If we’re going to defend our Justice Democrats incumbents AND expand our
progressive movement in Congress for the long-term, we need to catch up
now and be ready to fight back in the days ahead.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136967?refcode=em20230814-30373&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=30373%2E1203867%2EQXtGLf ]It starts with reaching our $43,000 goal by midnight tomorrow. Pitch in
$3 or whatever you can to help us get there!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/136967?refcode=em20230814-30373&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=30373%2E1203867%2EQXtGLf ]Donate $3

Thanks for everything you do to power Justice Democrats forward,

Geoff Simpson, Campaigns Director
Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=30373%2E1203867%2EQXtGLf ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Biden Investigation Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable

| |

| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

### [Biden’s social media court fight could have major election implications ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64601&L=30030&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLXNvY2lhbC1tZWRpYS1jb3VydC1maWdodC1jb3VsZC1oYXZlLW1ham9yLWVsZWN0aW9uLWltcGxpY2F0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7ca7d1e2b73b2aca75f5e468a063be5523d43642b79cacea66cccb90bb21a226) Washington Examiner Conservatives point to the FBI’s role in suppressing the Hunter Biden laptop story in October 2020 that turned out to be accurate as one egregious example of government overreach. They worry the Biden White House could try similar tactics going forward if not restricted.

“[The White House] considers concerns about mail-in balloting and voter ID to be misinformation,” Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton said. “We should be concerned that the Biden administration, given their prior record, will further intervene in elections.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64601&L=30030&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvYmlkZW5zLXNvY2lhbC1tZWRpYS1jb3VydC1maWdodC1jb3VsZC1oYXZlLW1ham9yLWVsZWN0aW9uLWltcGxpY2F0aW9ucy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycw==&hash=7ca7d1e2b73b2aca75f5e468a063be5523d43642b79cacea66cccb90bb21a226)

Mr. Fitton, who consulted with Mr. Trump following the election, said he testified to the grand jury about his concerns in 2020 when it was reported that a group of top government officials, including Democrat John Podesta, participated in a project called the Transition Integrity Project. The participants played out 2020 election scenarios that would keep Mr. Trump out of office. ### [14% of Illinois Counties Have More Voters Than Citizens of Legal Voting Age ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=64601&L=30032&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvMTQtb2YtaWxsaW5vaXMtY291bnRpZXMtaGF2ZS1tb3JlLXZvdGVycy10aGFuLWNpdGl6ZW5zLW9mLWxlZ2FsLXZvdGluZy1hZ2UvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnM=&hash=919b84484f94061cb18cba8f990f41bbcacbdae7a0a92d43570875639d30cbbd) Catholic Vote There are more registered voters than citizens of legal voting age in several Illinois counties, a government watchdog group just found.

On August 6, Judicial Watch, a conservative organization that promotes integrity in government affairs, released the results of a study of voter records which found that 14% of Illinois’ counties have more voters than citizens of legal voting age. In addition, the entire state has close to 800,000 inactive voters still registered, indicating that the counties are failing to keep accurate voter records in accordance with federal law. This week marks the first anniversary of the Inflation Reduction Act, and Madeleine and Team Dean are revisiting the legislation as the rollout continues in our communities. Make sure you check out Mad’s email to see more of the details. This week marks the first anniversary of the _Inflation Reduction Act_ being signed into law, and Madeleine and Team Dean are revisiting the legislation as the rollout continues in our communities. Make sure you check out Mad’s email to see more of the details.

Here are the toplines:
* **Puts money back into the pockets of Americans** through rebates and incentives when you switch to greener, more efficient cars, appliances, and home energy systems
* **Caps the cost of insulin at $35/month for seniors**
* **Creates well-paying, union jobs** across the economy
* **Lowers healthcare costs for millions of Americans** covered under the ACA
* **Helps reduce emissions** in across broad sectors of the economy
* **Allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices** for the first time in history
* **Makes the tax code fairer** by making sure millionaires, billionaires, and corporations pay their fair share. __Important note: for families making less than $400,000, taxes will not increase one single cent!__

**The IRA is proof of Democrats’ commitment to delivering real results for Americans nationwide. > Earlier this year I was appointed to the Regional Leadership Council, an initiative from Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries. We’re tasked with lifting up Democrats’ various legislative successes from the last few years and highlighting the on-the-ground implementation in our communities.
>
> Peter, the legislation we passed in the last two Congresses addresses real needs and challenges faced by Americans nationwide, and I wanted to update you on investments from the _Inflation Reduction Act_ right here in the Keystone State:
> * **$1.16 billion to install high-speed, affordable internet in rural and underserved communities** → This means over 276,000 homes and businesses will be connected – creating new jobs along the way.
>

> * **Capping the cost of insulin at $35 per month for Medicare users → this provision, which passed in the previous Congress and commenced in 2023, is helping millions of Americans save money – including my constituents right here in Montgomery and Berks Counties.**
>
The anniversary of the _Inflation Reduction Act_ becoming law is coming up, and I want to hear from you. Show your support as we continue on-the-ground implementation – **[if you agree with House Democrats that we must invest in our communities and our infrastructure, instantly add your name to support our work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68087478/421873532/-885291906?amount=25&refcode=08142023_md_iraimplementation_en_2&refcode2=90ba59fe-d83a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGJhNTlmZS1kODNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IYGsIDjvC22SRj1cNoyknL7A2WGl5por_55-b-OLRhw=)** | [ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68087482/421873536/-885291906?amount=25&refcode=08142023_md_iraimplementation_en_2&refcode2=90ba59fe-d83a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGJhNTlmZS1kODNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IYGsIDjvC22SRj1cNoyknL7A2WGl5por_55-b-OLRhw=)
> ---
> Thank you for supporting progress and staying engaged with our team,
>
> – Madeleine
> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68087486/421873540/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=08142023_md_iraimplementation_en_2&refcode2=90ba59fe-d83a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGJhNTlmZS1kODNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IYGsIDjvC22SRj1cNoyknL7A2WGl5por_55-b-OLRhw=)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_
_We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. Make sure you check out Mad’s email to see more of the details. This week marks the first anniversary of the Inflation Reduction Act being signed into law, and Madeleine and Team Dean are revisiting the legislation as the rollout continues in our communities. Make sure you check out Mad’s email to see more of the details. Here are the toplines: Puts money back into the pockets of Americans through rebates and incentives when you switch to greener, more efficient cars, appliances, and home energy systems Caps the cost of insulin at $35/month for seniors Creates well-paying, union jobs across the economy Lowers healthcare costs for millions of Americans covered under the ACA Helps reduce emissions in across broad sectors of the economy Allows Medicare to negotiate prescription drug prices for the first time in history Makes the tax code fairer by making sure millionaires, billionaires, and corporations pay their fair share. Important note: for families making less than $400,000, taxes will not increase one single cent! The IRA is proof of Democrats’ commitment to delivering real results for Americans nationwide. name: =?utf-8?Q?Emilia=20Sykes=20for=20Congress?=
subject: College Students: Want to make a difference in our elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
Join SwingLeft’s Crash Course for free training and support to get started! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/emiliasykesforcongress/emilia-sykes-announces-campaign-for-us-congress-17329024?e=7730fa895a)
---
| |
---
| Thanks to folks like you from across Ohio and countless grassroots volunteers, we were able to defeat Issue 1, the Republican-backed effort to strip away our voting power and hand over our democracy to fringe extremists.

This is a cause for celebration, but we cannot take our eyes off the prize. With reproductive rights on the ballot this November, and our Democratic House Majority up for grabs next November, we can’t afford to let our foot off the gas.

**That's why I'm teaming up with SwingLeft with resources for college students who want to organize their campuses.** If you’re looking to get involved to defeat Republican extremism at the ballot box this year and beyond, starting a Swing Left group on your campus is one of the best ways to multiply your impact.

To help you get started, Swing Left is hosting **Crash Course: Organizing Your Campus** this fall, a virtual training program for college students that makes it easy to start a Swing Left group on your campus.
---
| [ ](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=404143d0c7&e=7730fa895a)
---
| During the training, you’ll learn essential organizing skills, including recruiting and retaining volunteers, building a team, hosting events, and more. You’ll also have the chance to connect with Swing Left staff and students on college campuses across the country to support you throughout the program.

[Learn more about Crash Course and register by September 10 to participate!](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=d561fe7b57&e=7730fa895a)

Or, if you know another college student who would make a great group leader, forward them this email and encourage them to apply.

>From Ohio to Georgia to Pennsylvania to Wisconsin, young people have demonstrated that when we write, call, knock, and vote—we win. Together, we can build powerful teams of students and win Democratic majorities in 2023, 2024, & beyond!
---
| [Sign Up Here!](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=a09d91e9f7&e=7730fa895a "Sign Up Here!")
---
|
Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
---
| | | | | | | [](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=c724047a23&e=7730fa895a)
---

---
| Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=1e73cd1d21&e=7730fa895a&c=805b1d1287) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=1e73cd1d21&e=7730fa895a&c=805b1d1287).

name: Jane Kwon
subject: Two Weeks Left to Enter OLCV’s 2023 Photo Contest!
body:
| | | Hi Peter, I hope you’re doing well and enjoying this late stretch of summer! **There’s just about two weeks left until the deadline for our Photo Contest, August 31st.** If you already entered, thank you! We’ve received so many beautiful photos that I wanted to share two of them with you today: Elizabeth Brett submitted this photo of her daughter dancing at a concert, writing “The look on my older daughter’s face captured the summer vibes better than any words could.” And Bob Davidson sent in a photo of Lake Owyhee after hiking up to the edge of the canyon and wrote “It is such a thrill to look down on the vastness.” I hope these stunning photos will inspire you to send in your own soon. Again, **there’s just two weeks left to enter our Photo Contest** , so if you haven’t already, **send us the photos that most resonate with you–whether that be photos of how you like to enjoy the great Oregon outdoors that we're all working together to protect, or how you and your loved ones are staying safe and cool while many parts of our state heat up this week.** [For more details on how to enter, check out our blog post.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68087834/421874710/-1049963969?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM3MGU3NmM4LWRhM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jUFIabhXUZ-cxzaFUzTmCrh6N1kv-WV3QkRU4AoL-eI=&emci=90da4309-d63a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=c70e76c8-da3a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) Don't miss this chance to show your love for Oregon! Best,
Jane Kwon
Communications Coordinator, OLCV |

name: Sean Feucht
subject: Fox News Interview: We're living in a spiritual WAR
body:

Dear Friend,
---
It is incredibly encouraging to see a major news network draw attention to the Spiritual warfare happening around us. The enemy is active in this fallen world, but we know that the march of the Gospel advances toward the already-won victory.

I had the opportunity to sit down with Fox News and discuss the opposition we've faced in recent weeks as we've held revivals in cities across America. The powerful, life-changing testimonies that have reverberated from these revivals do not sit well with the enemy, and even some purported "Christians," who elevate worldly tolerance above eternal Truth.Check out the interview below

Fellow Conservative, Two years ago, far-left billionaire George Soros _– a radical’s radical –_ seeded his political operation with a jaw-dropping infusion of $125 million to defeat Republicans in key races. Now, records reveal he has been bankrolling a secretive new organization in Texas. **He’s provided nearly 100% of funding for the Texas Majority PAC this year.** I’m the Democrats’ #1 target. _And the left is hopeful we’ll be caught by surprise._ That’s why I need your extra help right now. We cannot let these radicals prevail – we need to fight like hell to win. This is a battle for the heart and soul of Texas and America itself. _**[We need your EMERGENCY HELP today >>>](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=a958aaf5d89a449790c7097044b3c9bd&_e=Dp-w65YQC9MJWSXnPAaqQwUjMXxvGNsXSQKPhgWuXbH6zeVlFDjY5Lz-UqrcN9u1UYNQQdQmcuVMq9cTsCqjVUg6UQfE10EDhNnK_GfPbssTVnGPRfcmQVb5B5jGb8D-j5YN879hQW8ydpXTDEBOSwBdhimJVAtMZ0FA8iwNNx-hYuUgSasrTZMPdp4vywiTG9qP2gxJ7BqAzMh4rwzKMTjicq_vWnohTX-gGlcN6bgtVIs7AiSvn3KCm8CMEkSsAxNkOQBaFssWF8wf9HUQq9WL3dpVdsnEzLaeJW7FdYI4a-cjQY6efoF6HNrwvoVFT1ITcCAi3Pk2Mi-FcWTb6Pi2YqpqzvkWS2xsqSYkFunV7sQ3gHYKELjqqrzkeeERwE2pCjqsQaQlhzRbPs4G7kPdoekySj-dRubOVVHngQjnF3UwM7GjneUAtMWyf0K-WuerDRqb8QDqSg1aOB-3dw%3D%3D)**_

Is this Friend? It's Mike Pompeo.

I've been reaching out to patriots who have not completed their 2024 Presidential Survey- **and your name was high on my list.**

Is there a reason you haven't completed your Presidential Survey yet?

Look, there's only a little time left before the 1st debate, so I really need you to complete your 2024 Presidential Survey TODAY.

More than 66 MILLION Americans receive Social Security benefits. They're a lifeline for so many of us, and generations of Americans have grown up knowing they can count on this vital program as they age. **But the GOP wants to defund this program and take away benefits for millions!**

Fellow Conservative,

It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race _**I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat**_.

However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... **(see graphic below)**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=60a80777b8324b81b25660d426054206&_e=xzcJqmdLWjHNmUAOB8KlnmAaRsmpJjX3I7UqZ74rG7sMfr5bBKoB0Sl3-rKGnH-AZ8227PMmFEF4gpqGIy7puH7GBHjOsZnTzuixNGuI8e6vay7Jw9OSggnPCVjRg_UqviCIsfedn993iExI2fc7fdvydZdfLmW_Jb4-jF189n0IEFMOwO_ydz3eLjlbL8pkslDpNHpwO6G2boteXd78ldWOIGHnJY_q5PH641rajr7GnDJRC1LE2VzLa3cW939xwOSVVz9khlIMzn4tJhnqo-PNr3EfxPHL-45BulNL2YyLowFEsaP29k8nYbFDVAgfQvOBwgP7ZytDn6bIhPROIAzj1TWIZ7Ztuk4IAe6NtL1NJN_8rZZfVwdokIoLqAtL_sDFSh1hpc-8Oz9BJMPLwg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: **[Will you donate $2 right now?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=60a80777b8324b81b25660d426054206&_e=xzcJqmdLWjHNmUAOB8KlnmAaRsmpJjX3I7UqZ74rG7sMfr5bBKoB0Sl3-rKGnH-AZ8227PMmFEF4gpqGIy7puH7GBHjOsZnTzuixNGuI8e6vay7Jw9OSggnPCVjRg_UqviCIsfedn993iExI2fc7fdvydZdfLmW_Jb4-jF189n0IEFMOwO_ydz3eLjlbL8pkslDpNHpwO6G2boteXd78ldWOIGHnJY_q5PH641rajr7GnDJRC1LE2VzLa3cW939xoiEHuUS6i7qtealICPRY6bANbAoBMF-UMNQxufJdW5yZmGqnmBGuCW0le9SrmX0FHk2a1v9cyiHREdznSvoj7-3TkmRp2AH44UY2aYGZvU14A6pdEEqj6_wMZVloiaNyLoJlo0RoHzkmmkP5Y7q0Yw%3D%3D)** The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – **who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race** – stays out of the race entirely.

The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised

[**HELP ME KEEP THIS A TWO-WAY RACE
CHIP IN $2 NOW**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=60a80777b8324b81b25660d426054206&_e=xzcJqmdLWjHNmUAOB8KlnmAaRsmpJjX3I7UqZ74rG7sMfr5bBKoB0Sl3-rKGnH-AZ8227PMmFEF4gpqGIy7puH7GBHjOsZnTzuixNGuI8e6vay7Jw9OSggnPCVjRg_UqviCIsfedn993iExI2fc7fdvydZdfLmW_Jb4-jF189n0IEFMOwO_ydz3eLjlbL8pkslDpNHpwO6G2boteXd78ldWOIGHnJY_q5PH641rajr7GnDJRC1LE2VzLa3cW939x-HEFjdq0D6Ee_7gx8aiuyz5VVAErR03LynaQVGPnXJ4zg2-ZdnLRHTZ46GWwcP_iz774sHrKcp4_lP68dRLq8BBlUT-2hNIe_irOHeCeyKACkgO2bRNC5TjVYJ5G4iYaxDmfaTkrF9rLceFnfYYPqA%3D%3D)
We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race.

**Let me be abundantly clear:** that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans.

**[Please chip in $2](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=60a80777b8324b81b25660d426054206&_e=xzcJqmdLWjHNmUAOB8KlnmAaRsmpJjX3I7UqZ74rG7sMfr5bBKoB0Sl3-rKGnH-AZ8227PMmFEF4gpqGIy7puH7GBHjOsZnTzuixNGuI8e6vay7Jw9OSggnPCVjRg_UqviCIsfedn993iExI2fc7fdvydZdfLmW_Jb4-jF189n0IEFMOwO_ydz3eLjlbL8pkslDpNHpwO6G2boteXd78ldWOIGHnJY_q5PH641rajr7GnDJRC1LE2VzLa3cW939xW2pebyga-ls4805djEBLlkQsfpj47xb5OlwS87oaTLiYlIE3F0yF4cmg2Q54WflOm0Q6rxZf_fz7ey7hjJs5VFuwlysdC1zz9vUJWJ7pCZ78L0UEAFtKc9GfxO_zJ8S_WHpnaZZeG7mYMEk3CBNLEQ%3D%3D) **right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today. An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat. However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... (see graphic below) Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race – stays out of the race entirely. The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race. Let me be abundantly clear: that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans. right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. I promise you it will be the best $2 you spend all year. Respectfully, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media | | | ---|---|--- ../../../../../../../Desktop/Desktop/Mark Lamb/Templates/April Pelosi/www.alekfororegon.com Meet Sheriff Lamb: GOD. name: Stop GOP Gerrymandering
subject: Do Alabama Republicans think SCOTUS directives are optional?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
|
---

Team, this June the Supreme Court affirmed a lower court ruling that had struck down Alabama’s congressional map for violating the Voting Rights Act and ordered lawmakers to draw a new map that fairly represented Black voters.

**But despite these clear instructions, Alabama Republicans have _openly refused_ to comply with the Supreme Court’s ruling:** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68088875/421881184/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230814_FR_8C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhOGEwMzQ3LWRmM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vOMXljT1-MKiczg4WYb7dA-sJpOP_g-rMRFgaoXWdvc=)
---
[**_Team, the NDRC will not stop fighting until we’ve secured fair maps for voters in every state. Will you donate now to support our efforts to end gerrymandering?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68088876/421881185/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230814_FR_8C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhOGEwMzQ3LWRmM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vOMXljT1-MKiczg4WYb7dA-sJpOP_g-rMRFgaoXWdvc=)
Republicans know they hold a narrow majority in the House, which is why they’ll go to any lengths to gerrymander – even if it means defying court orders, including from the Supreme Court.

**As A.G. Eric Holder so aptly put it, “Republicans use their minority power to undermine democracy because too many of them fear that they can’t win in a fair electoral system. They’re afraid of the voters.”**

And this isn’t just about Alabama, team. According to experts, the recent SCOTUS ruling could lead to more states like Georgia, Louisiana, and others being required to redraw their racially-discriminatory maps before the next election. **_But if GOP lawmakers continue playing political games, they could keep manipulated maps in place!_**

[**_Voters deserve fair elections. That’s why the NDRC is continuing to fight across the country to strengthen our democracy and defend it from those who seek to weaken it. We’re counting on our grassroots supporters to power our work – will you pitch in today to help us keep going?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68088877/421881186/-1795600110?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230814_FR_8C_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImFhOGEwMzQ3LWRmM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vOMXljT1-MKiczg4WYb7dA-sJpOP_g-rMRFgaoXWdvc=)

But despite these clear instructions, Alabama Republicans have openly refused to comply with the Supreme Court’s ruling: | = = Republicans know they hold a narrow majority in the House, which is why they’ll go to any lengths to gerrymander – even if it means defying court orders, including from the Supreme Court. As A.G. Eric Holder so aptly put it, “Republicans use their minority power to undermine democracy because too many of them fear that they can’t win in a fair electoral system. They’re afraid of the voters.” And this isn’t just about Alabama, team. According to experts, the recent SCOTUS ruling could lead to more states like Georgia, Louisiana, and others being required to redraw their racially-discriminatory maps before the next election. But if GOP lawmakers continue playing political games, they could keep manipulated maps in place! = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 1015 18th Street NW, Suite 1000 Washington, DC 20036 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:
Did you hear, Peter? Vox is calling the Kentucky governor's race "one of the biggest contests of the year." **_Vox:_ "The Kentucky governor’s race is shaping up to be one of the biggest contests of the year."** [RUSH SUPPORT TO ANDY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68089182/421882509/-1760848261?refcode=em23_230814_ddln5_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230814_ddln5_fndd_gq_act___tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=92442a5b-e13a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjQ0MmE1Yi1lMTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nCi3N-M8sMDXvA_bznOiWaC3RBrZsA3BqqDAl9_tllo=) _Vox_ is rightfully calling this year's election **"one of the biggest contests of the year."** And with less than three months to go, this race is still up for grabs.

That's why Andy's opponent and the three super PACs propping him up have announced or spent nearly **$10 million** to try and buy this race! They are flooding the airwaves with attack ads to deceive the public about Andy's record and to drown out Andy's message to Kentuckians.

clean_body: Did you hear, Peter? Vox is calling the Kentucky governor's race "one of the biggest contests of the year." Vox: "The Kentucky governor’s race is shaping up to be one of the biggest contests of the year." = Vox is rightfully calling this year's election "one of the biggest contests of the year." And with less than three months to go, this race is still up for grabs. That's why Andy's opponent and the three super PACs propping him up have announced or spent nearly $10 million to try and buy this race! They are flooding the airwaves with attack ads to deceive the public about Andy's record and to drown out Andy's message to Kentuckians. Peter: As governor, Andy has made huge strides forward for our Commonwealth, and he has a plan to keep making progress for another four years. Jason believes nothing should stand in the way of a dollar earned and better opportunities to stay ahead. As families faced rising costs and certain leaders to our right played political games, **Jason fought to get things done.** Meaningful legislation that Jason helped push across the finish line will continue to bring home great-paying jobs and power our economy for years to come.
Jason’s district is home to Buckley Space Force Base and many of the nation’s largest private aerospace companies – and Colorado is the rightful home for US Space Command. After the Trump administration’s purely political decision to relocate US Space Command to Alabama, Jason got out front of now successful efforts to keep Space Command here where it belongs – delivering job security for our troops and private sector workforce supporting its missions, and taking Colorado’s space leadership to new heights.
Jason works tirelessly to give Coloradans a voice. We can’t lose his representation in the House. And with your support, we won’t.

body:
I refuse to let Biden stop me from winning the FIRST CAUCUS.| | | [](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=c0023b278388441b85f99e6afc3cf975&_e=Gzk1Z53tJTefhyQieMVp0xK3pk7Cunu4EmMKcpALAWLUK5sTbhtW9tQlM5_unU89OooDTNhF_Wrfyjwa5WvtBrAQCVR4Fly54ftP9Ot4Zoj5UIhKR03UxJ9DzxZLsdsAYunaGMxz2Up53caVm236V-0xJjvMEayWJOrM8cVvzeSIhTxktRtwHEqtsbvFJk8Yk3_frpkkgL5l9IUoLaBFC17_NUSOC2Z8mt6_0-m7G5WOMzFGb4yKDuduRwZ03eCTR8KbX3cq0YaHSDf2A6X-kJ3_wjrp7nZy4MrtfFw5naH_j_xKlT1qAJUEOrFaEA625G1xYVUYcJSqtYHHYtux-2jvqrzjGNfKLEPpp7A4sfQPSXPHx2y8H4bPqDv0fdSzf5rxzhp6w3VBTS6mgFOq19Yap7Mru9pAElpsECHPqv_Ila-F02bzz0N3fxWCzLnD3-bpoAVWEeDfWBmdIC7orCLchchTVfJtKqnx0pvXbdREY7r193Dsbvta5IpnN3EC)
---
| | Friend,

---
Crooked Joe’s weaponized Department of Justice is trying to force me to stand trial as the very first votes are cast in the 2024 election – in the Iowa Caucus.

---
But the incompetent Crook in the White House must’ve forgotten who he’s dealing with.

---
_There’s absolutely no attack he can come up with that can keep me off the campaign trail and stop me from fighting for YOU._

---
**_If Biden is going to try and stop me from winning the Iowa Caucus, then I’m going to fly to Iowa to DOUBLE our already insurmountable lead._**

---
And that’s exactly what I did:

---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=c0023b278388441b85f99e6afc3cf975&_e=Gzk1Z53tJTefhyQieMVp0xK3pk7Cunu4EmMKcpALAWLUK5sTbhtW9tQlM5_unU89OooDTNhF_Wrfyjwa5WvtBrAQCVR4Fly54ftP9Ot4Zoj5UIhKR03UxJ9DzxZLsdsAYunaGMxz2Up53caVm236V-0xJjvMEayWJOrM8cVvzeSIhTxktRtwHEqtsbvFJk8Yk3_frpkkgL5l9IUoLaBFC17_NUSOC2Z8mt6_0-m7G5WOMzFGb4yKDuduRwZ03eCTR8KbX3cq0YaHSDf2A6X-kJ3_wjrp7nZy4MrtfFw5naH_j_xKlT1qAJUEOrFaEA625G1xYVUYcJSqtYHHYtux-71HBOB59-V_pjBVMEJehnRX_RinvnELgx4GJcfFQe_8AdSVtrwAMGiPHo4MsuVKLxDabnRUBIonX3kigDAsPTh83C0lEFLdDyk0RkwiDM6ewdSZRg0mmI8jNkDw0RVxdFM_UGYK72pHLyyhgtwwPvObnUU6M8q8H3QAKuZ0tZZs)
---
**_But the best part of the trip was seeing just how many Iowa patriots showed up to support our movement in the midst of the most vicious witch hunt imaginable._**

---
[](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=c0023b278388441b85f99e6afc3cf975&_e=Gzk1Z53tJTefhyQieMVp0xK3pk7Cunu4EmMKcpALAWLUK5sTbhtW9tQlM5_unU89OooDTNhF_Wrfyjwa5WvtBrAQCVR4Fly54ftP9Ot4Zoj5UIhKR03UxJ9DzxZLsdsAYunaGMxz2Up53caVm236V-0xJjvMEayWJOrM8cVvzeSIhTxktRtwHEqtsbvFJk8Yk3_frpkkgL5l9IUoLaBFC17_NUSOC2Z8mt6_0-m7G5WOMzFGb4yKDuduRwZ03eCTR8KbX3cq0YaHSDf2A6X-kJ3_wjrp7nZy4MrtfFw5naH_j_xKlT1qAJUEOrFaEA625G1xYVUYcJSqtYHHYtux-7FDqkF_ahFHVa48b9YIlX1hWhwAoW6wgW8OWEL37nNL0q5wx-tc2SIL6znWWguCVMRa_3B63tWeYSbFSgS2s_UlYgn1eo2FZSHVeNIBVCj_Tf2YgKP8mmtXto3SVflMzz73-2FDBPx0TJqZna99KHmU8IpX5_N844WLpDtfERdK)
---
_There was a record crowd at the Iowa State Fair. They’ve never had anything even close._

---
While the Washington ruling class abuses its power to try and destroy our movement, the __PEOPLE__ of our country are standing united in peaceful defense of our movement.

---

clean_body: I refuse to let Biden stop me from winning the FIRST CAUCUS.| | | | | Friend, Crooked Joe’s weaponized Department of Justice is trying to force me to stand trial as the very first votes are cast in the 2024 election – in the Iowa Caucus. But the incompetent Crook in the White House must’ve forgotten who he’s dealing with. There’s absolutely no attack he can come up with that can keep me off the campaign trail and stop me from fighting for YOU. If Biden is going to try and stop me from winning the Iowa Caucus, then I’m going to fly to Iowa to DOUBLE our already insurmountable lead. And that’s exactly what I did: But the best part of the trip was seeing just how many Iowa patriots showed up to support our movement in the midst of the most vicious witch hunt imaginable. There was a record crowd at the Iowa State Fair. They’ve never had anything even close. While the Washington ruling class abuses its power to try and destroy our movement, the PEOPLE of our country are standing united in peaceful defense of our movement. And on November 5, 2024, we will prove that in America, the people still get to decide the future we want for our country. | | Thank you, Donald J. | | **“Why Virginia Is the State to Watch in the 2023 Elections”**

As they reported, the entire country is looking to Virginia to pave the way for the 2024 elections. I’m troubled, Derek. Experts are saying Hampton Roads is one of the most competitive regions in Virginia. Joe Biden won the region in 2020, but then it turned red and elected a Republican governor just 12 months later. Stories like this are why all eyes are on Virginia this fall. clean_body: We have a responsibility | | | “Why Virginia Is the State to Watch in the 2023 Elections” “All eyes are on Hampton Roads... as Republicans try to claw back Democratic gains in the state.” Derek, I wanted to make sure you saw the latest headline about the Virginia elections from U.S. News and World Report. As they reported, the entire country is looking to Virginia to pave the way for the 2024 elections. I’m troubled, Derek. Experts are saying Hampton Roads is one of the most competitive regions in Virginia. Joe Biden won the region in 2020, but then it turned red and elected a Republican governor just 12 months later. Stories like this are why all eyes are on Virginia this fall. We have a responsibility to do everything we can to fight back and stop a complete GOP takeover. **= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** ****=**** Our fights ahead aren’t just about Hampton Roads. Hi there! I'm so glad you're here.

I know it's been a while since we've spoken, but I just wanted to reach out and see if you'd consider making a donation to my campaign. **As you may know, 2024 is going to be one of the most critical election years we 've had in a while. **

I believe we need to put America First, and if we're going to make that happen, we need someone with a true conservative voice and a record of success leading the way.

If you've been following me on Twitter or reading my posts on Facebook, then you already know how much this campaign means to me--and how much of an impact it could have on our country if we succeed in reelection.

The fact is that right now, there are people who don't have access to good jobs because of our crumbling economy under Biden; people who worry about their kids being brainwashed with CRT at school; people who don't feel safe because of crime rates that are too high; people who worry about America's future.

**_I want to protect this country and I want to protect our conservative values. If we 're going to be successful in 2024, I need your help. _**
