[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)
Dear Friend,

Fourteen years ago, I founded an organization from my parent’s home with the intent of using undercover investigative journalism to expose the corrupt.

You’ve seen my work. Most Americans have.

In February, after releasing a historic investigation on Pfizer, the Board of Directors of the organization I created from scratch, ousted me.

It was a blow, but things happen for a reason. Today, I’m unleashed to do my work through my new organization, OMG, without any obstruction and **no one to stop me.**

Since I was fired, I’ve chosen not to look back. I want to move forward with my work, with happiness and spirit. **And I move forward carrying with me the many lessons I learned.**

Those 14 years were formative.

When I started, my hands would tremble when I confronted a target of my investigations. It took time, but I overcame my fears of confrontation by grounding myself in principle.

I learned about trust, loyalty, and leadership.

Most importantly, I learned the hard way the true depth of Michael Jordan’s quote on leadership: “Winning has a price. **And leadership has a price**.”

I’ve been sued for exposing the truth more times than I can count. And, get this, **yesterday, I was sued in federal court by the very organization I founded.**

In my opinion, their intent is to shut me down now that they no longer have any control over me.

And this lawsuit is going to cost me a fortune! That’s why I’m writing you today to **[ask for your support to my legal defense fund.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)**

My friends with the non-profit, Liberty Guard, have set up **[the fund to pay attorney costs](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)** that will quickly pile up.

As I mentioned, this isn’t my first rodeo so I know that **the cost will exceed $500,000**.

Good attorneys aren’t cheap, and my pockets are not deep.

No one gets wealthy doing the work that I do. Trust me.

That’s where you come in. **[Will you chip in and help me defend myself](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)?**

When you do, I’ll be following up as the case progresses but I’ll also keep you informed of the great work I’m doing at OMG . . . and it’s exciting!

A fresh start, being forced to start over, I’ll admit is thrilling. And I’m starting armed with all of the lessons I’ve learned to avoid the pitfalls I’ve experienced.

Me and my teams are more efficient, we’re more productive, and our work hits like a sledgehammer.

But my work will be silenced if my former employer gets their way. Or the distractions of a court battle and its costs may become overwhelming.

Friend, **[I’m asking you to STAND UP FOR ME, so I can keep working](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)**. And I’ll commit to you that **I will NOT let you down**.

So please, **[make a donation to my legal defense fund through Liberty Guard](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)**. We have a long way to do to hit our goal, so please, donate as much as you can.

Friend, thank you for your direct or indirect support over the years. Your views, donations or simply talking about my work to friends and family has kept me going for 14 years . . . **and we cannot stop now!**

Respectfully,

James O’Keefe

P.S. I have 20 days to file my response to the lawsuit. I have to raise enough money to pay for a retainer and cover the legal work to defend against this lawsuit. This is unfortunately urgent so please, **[donate today](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxsz7GunTAMBuCnMRuIOJCEgaEtolPV6Z61MomB9BBAIaji7SvQVaeuvz_5tynsix-vFvRXQJy9OwAR5BdAPJN80cfHj3jlP186_16_cLqH-A0Q07XzP_m5pOBAfrlT3WWurZDEaDNuhWqwrJTRmM0tmVo1yrhy5Iac0EqrirXiRhohjaTMt1iiLI2oUJRCYNEMtaaBLeFQa20MVOVTVIyROc1-fXN05JersFvIlnZOaT-ew3rA_mB7Ri5oZbelWwD2ix84piufTooOsP9NgY98ezOPnFNKZN95GPItgOzPFH4d2xktg-z-AwHVTQI7fwaQ3V3wJJbCTn5aQXZh-MwSx9uMySlARWE71wSywzqLrdv_-GXxh9JQldPzoN3C3wAAAP__OOiDFw)**.

---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 300
Alexandria, VA 22314

Every month, I work with Chris and the rest of our team to come up with our monthly fundraising goals. _These numbers aren’t random, Derek — in fact it’s just the opposite!_ We work hard to determine the exact amount we need to keep the campaign running strong because we never want to ask you for a penny more than necessary.

That’s why I’m reaching out today: **Tomorrow marks the halfway point of the month, but we’re not halfway toward our August goal.**

clean_body: We’re halfway through the month, but we’re not halfway to our goal. | = Derek, I wanted to pull back the curtain and let you in on part of our campaign strategy: Every month, I work with Chris and the rest of our team to come up with our monthly fundraising goals. We work hard to determine the exact amount we need to keep the campaign running strong because we never want to ask you for a penny more than necessary. Fellow Conservative,

It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race _**I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat**_.

However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... **(see graphic below)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf44389464804bd58707cc01d3aebc55&_e=DHa-6NlwZM0SeCJQkSSojek87EH_HiLqLSGzK9CG3lqAVBNj30aALY5OK8JV0acMCzvaJGn1SNioM4xvyJkNHXcdIs8LrH28haggvRWihWuTyFvCB8hJRWCsHP6GbHPX-MCoWQcCwruwTVuio-qrk78vEg7-zz7jpNLHYpJMVSlQHji7_GaqPk16yM-_xblcT9dQhB0MVrF0B8Eqp1g_mknx1E863r0wa0PaLoxmSdWfk9CBuWMcptvRE9nv5L2mWR64yY2N-6uoCadxTnzQ9znrdnafGrCXqT8nQXtypiJGM7TSnTcY48eCGGGeoCx6WliA8H4HbFPNFqL6Yx8eY_KLZBWksgK-2oBJc9jgNDTBjKeV6s-I_ctqbEuN2AeF6BO5AiygNsl6I08YtoBgjg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: **[Will you donate $2 right now?](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf44389464804bd58707cc01d3aebc55&_e=DHa-6NlwZM0SeCJQkSSojek87EH_HiLqLSGzK9CG3lqAVBNj30aALY5OK8JV0acMCzvaJGn1SNioM4xvyJkNHXcdIs8LrH28haggvRWihWuTyFvCB8hJRWCsHP6GbHPX-MCoWQcCwruwTVuio-qrk78vEg7-zz7jpNLHYpJMVSlQHji7_GaqPk16yM-_xblcT9dQhB0MVrF0B8Eqp1g_mknx1E863r0wa0PaLoxmSdWfk9CBuWMcptvRE9nv5L2mWyiJQ3A_G2H_9lhTJ5akxlhlpPnObo9_bJhDQ_5w-3JhIjksS5FM4YBaz4FlcjwHduViqrJ6qQ8v_kzOEQ9D3fQppjIPoXD6YogQX3nP5DhIbFrl4Gp802C39NZkyPezg15Nd2JN1QKoz7hqK4jUUA%3D%3D)** The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – **who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race** – stays out of the race entirely.

The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised

[**HELP ME KEEP THIS A TWO-WAY RACE
CHIP IN $2 NOW**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf44389464804bd58707cc01d3aebc55&_e=DHa-6NlwZM0SeCJQkSSojek87EH_HiLqLSGzK9CG3lqAVBNj30aALY5OK8JV0acMCzvaJGn1SNioM4xvyJkNHXcdIs8LrH28haggvRWihWuTyFvCB8hJRWCsHP6GbHPX-MCoWQcCwruwTVuio-qrk78vEg7-zz7jpNLHYpJMVSlQHji7_GaqPk16yM-_xblcT9dQhB0MVrF0B8Eqp1g_mknx1E863r0wa0PaLoxmSdWfk9CBuWMcptvRE9nv5L2mJPHUbliEeUcnc21UqxcVNvcnDrefjA7eSRgNdx8ggeSSyXSCKVhmI_oEfp9a4arcUKzFXsIF85rt97CUBSWcSVNAhbLFx53BIThS7ibWYSnjVlfgEZBcI6YTdY8X7u_zG9hG1bYvxmcFRbZG5jgfwQ%3D%3D)
We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race.

**Let me be abundantly clear:** that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans.

**[Please chip in $2](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=bf44389464804bd58707cc01d3aebc55&_e=DHa-6NlwZM0SeCJQkSSojek87EH_HiLqLSGzK9CG3lqAVBNj30aALY5OK8JV0acMCzvaJGn1SNioM4xvyJkNHXcdIs8LrH28haggvRWihWuTyFvCB8hJRWCsHP6GbHPX-MCoWQcCwruwTVuio-qrk78vEg7-zz7jpNLHYpJMVSlQHji7_GaqPk16yM-_xblcT9dQhB0MVrF0B8Eqp1g_mknx1E863r0wa0PaLoxmSdWfk9CBuWMcptvRE9nv5L2m8ZNSu7bnO2tDoF-GlqjxqPcuttdlEbwasTENc8ZfvBpU8qsO6PF2m5N4QDe_chMzYS3YtAGkTPgKzkMpRX2k56rV2oQBcX-Cwvlbp9dCHmRrvys5pKus2IYcSJinVYeSndLEbAMbSnD5p10jEZjRow%3D%3D) **right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. **Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat | | Fellow Conservative, It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today. An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat. However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... (see graphic below) Fellow Conservative, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race – stays out of the race entirely. The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race. Let me be abundantly clear: that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans. right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. I promise you it will be the best $2 you spend all year. They've pushed plans to raise the retirement age, to privatize Social Security and leave it subject to the whims of Wall Street, or to simply slash the monthly payments that folks depend on. For too long, Utah's delegation (including Chris Stewart, the 2nd District's last representative) has failed to quit their dangerous political games and be responsible advocates for seniors and retirees. **It's time we changed that. In recent years, extremists in Congress have tried – over and over – to make Social Security less accessible and to cut benefits for millions of people. They've pushed plans to raise the retirement age, to privatize Social Security and leave it subject to the whims of Wall Street, or to simply slash the monthly payments that folks depend on. With a fight over government funding looming this fall, we're once again about to go through the wringer as hard-liners in the House will demand cuts to Social Security and threaten a government shutdown if they don't get their way. We need sensible representatives in office who will spend their time trying to improve Social Security, not cut it. For too long, Utah's delegation (including Chris Stewart, the 2nd District's last representative) has failed to quit their dangerous political games and be responsible advocates for seniors and retirees. It's time we changed that. And it starts with sending a clear message that Utahns strongly oppose any cuts to Social Security. More soon, Team Riebe | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for and authorized by Riebe for Congress. |

name: CaucusRoom
subject: A Pardon for Hunter?
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-awlhjd-trhiujldw-e/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Monday! A Representative from Florida jumped ahead of his colleagues and[introduced articles of impeachment against Biden.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-y/)**
**Violation of the Constitution** A member of the WH press corps has**[filed a lawsuit against White House press secretary Karine Jean-Pierre and the Secret Service](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-j/), **alleging they wrongfully revoked his press badge. **Pardon for Hunter?** Yikes! GOP candidate Vivek Ramaswamy says he is **[open to a Hunter Biden pardon](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-t/). **He also appears to be a**[rapper](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-i/).** **Goodbye, Best Buy** **[Another company has found itself on the boycott list](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-d/)** after news of their hiring practices have leaked. **Could This Be True?** Joe **[Biden's failed Afghanistan exit](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-h/)** and hearing with Gold Star families would cause him to lose the presidency._We can only hope._

**A Miracle** A stunning video shows a**[historic Catholic church in Lahaina miraculously still standing and unscathed](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-k/) **after devastating wildfires ripped through Maui -- while the rest of the historic town was turned into an apocalyptical nightmare. **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-u/)!**
* A **[new name](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-p/)** for the White House
* I love this **[billboard](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-x/)**!
* Helpful **[translations](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-m/).**
* We don't**[trust him](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-c/).**
* That's a**[bad bug bite](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-awlhjd-trhiujldw-q/).**

Peter, our 2024 campaign has been heating up all summer, so we wanted to take a moment to catch you up to speed.

**First:** Multiple non-partisan elections experts rated our race as a **pure toss-up.**

**Then:** Grassroots volunteers and Ohioans from all walks of life came together to stop Issue 1 and **defeat the radical politicians and dark money outside groups that were threatening our democracy.**

**Now: Our team wants to use that same grassroots momentum to tilt this toss-up race into Emilia’s favor, [but we can’t do it without your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68091478/421891557/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.08.14_b2_eshq_all-nd&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTNmNDZjMS1lOTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OBt1438wIyKPZVdNQfoSXj-atMj4s-UQHH1CmgLoTpI=)**

**Peter, with all eyes on Ohio, and with the other side watching OH-13 closely as a possible pick-up opportunity, we need your help to prove that the same people-powered team that supported Emilia in 2022 is here to power her to victory in 2024.**

[**We’ve set a goal of raising $4,500 before Thursday night. clean_body: = Peter, our 2024 campaign has been heating up all summer, so we wanted to take a moment to catch you up to speed. First: Multiple non-partisan elections experts rated our race as a pure toss-up. Then: Grassroots volunteers and Ohioans from all walks of life came together to stop Issue 1 and defeat the radical politicians and dark money outside groups that were threatening our democracy. Now: Our team wants to use that same grassroots momentum to tilt this toss-up race into Emilia’s favor, = Peter, with all eyes on Ohio, and with the other side watching OH-13 closely as a possible pick-up opportunity, we need your help to prove that the same people-powered team that supported Emilia in 2022 is here to power her to victory in 2024. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Last week proved that when working folks come together, they can achieve the impossible. | **$23**

More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with **an average gift of $23**. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.**In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021**.

This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, **[would you be able to make a contribution of $23](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dffe689498a41e893bae9b004e584e3&_e=vuMgBNz2zu92C7ARDPHI7swqdwRt27-tx5Q31dvq-9r9v75SDn_XdHJ-1lIC6d9o_pnrHYwV13lVoIlcIscFhAxCTW3n29bl3hCyhfX4oNUwaeUKSHz-EshoTMPyIKYC5CvJWn3iu9cOoxhMxWsISgmsPCkq1Ub0pTomgo66MP-V78TNBnUbKwKbz1mKmeMeSYonQ03swNx_X9tAwWUXBNWBBDmFLyiFfRjKIil5vaviPteZj8y0VQjhaGfMvsDryvM0zBG28nzxTsO273KA-k2-tbQONP_vTS7k32NNmo0a_jiZ1x5DVNew-37wssglykl67S_8yToYecujCFzwX1DN7JlsVclagWWLkK5LjX0Ic7NRQDnDsf4V9sorVYYAEFpLVkRLh2hJ2fX7Y5Z2n8vn4VxWZJGjSTWHtf_aBITddfIf8S55u9JK8sAiTM35)** , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising?

[**CHIP IN $23
**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dffe689498a41e893bae9b004e584e3&_e=vuMgBNz2zu92C7ARDPHI7swqdwRt27-tx5Q31dvq-9r9v75SDn_XdHJ-1lIC6d9o_pnrHYwV13lVoIlcIscFhAxCTW3n29bl3hCyhfX4oNUwaeUKSHz-EshoTMPyIKYC5CvJWn3iu9cOoxhMxWsISgmsPCkq1Ub0pTomgo66MP-V78TNBnUbKwKbz1mKmeMeSYonQ03swNx_X9tAwWUXBNWBBDmFLyiFfRjKIil5vaviPteZj8y0VQjhaGfMvsDryvM0zBG28nzxTsO273KA-k2-tbQONP_vTS7k32NNmo1ZaA4Idrm2SuFrI3SMDsPxcfrgsSEkmvq8BuWSG8Qx6rj5qkMisOUIY5yust9ft9az5wvj3MeLA8_FqPo0EnuNkMzX-EEsTQTFZWoJ61XFhHzPhCVtM3Z1Ye7q4-YhZjmcdyWB3wvBo9fGSkT4uvE_)
Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and **not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to.**

Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. **Not me. Not now, not ever.**

I know a couple of things to be true:
* We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it

* **Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1**

_**It may not be the person asking for it**_ The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, **[yet 40% of our supporters who gave then aren’t giving now](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dffe689498a41e893bae9b004e584e3&_e=vuMgBNz2zu92C7ARDPHI7swqdwRt27-tx5Q31dvq-9r9v75SDn_XdHJ-1lIC6d9o_pnrHYwV13lVoIlcIscFhAxCTW3n29bl3hCyhfX4oNUwaeUKSHz-EshoTMPyIKYC5CvJWn3iu9cOoxhMxWsISgmsPCkq1Ub0pTomgo66MP-V78TNBnUbKwKbz1mKmeMeSYonQ03swNx_X9tAwWUXBNWBBDmFLyiFfRjKIil5vaviPteZj8y0VQjhaGfMvsDryvM0zBG28nzxTsO273KA-k2-tbQONP_vTS7k32NNmo3cXxutheKHwBliqBjgzI7anmiJ_lMEc4LLAVAPZg16TUTwO5jeRdIu4Id_zEq7sJoAuWYmn_Fs2or7V4Dp8q4RVp0_FFJ5gitsd4rLen9oozX9lBXiCi6Lptw0CaUMI9nAZT7iHHn2sdaDAqT5nnGO)**. If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by **[chipping in $23](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dffe689498a41e893bae9b004e584e3&_e=vuMgBNz2zu92C7ARDPHI7swqdwRt27-tx5Q31dvq-9r9v75SDn_XdHJ-1lIC6d9o_pnrHYwV13lVoIlcIscFhAxCTW3n29bl3hCyhfX4oNUwaeUKSHz-EshoTMPyIKYC5CvJWn3iu9cOoxhMxWsISgmsPCkq1Ub0pTomgo66MP-V78TNBnUbKwKbz1mKmeMeSYonQ03swNx_X9tAwWUXBNWBBDmFLyiFfRjKIil5vaviPteZj8y0VQjhaGfMvsDryvM0zBG28nzxTsO273KA-k2-tbQONP_vTS7k32NNmo2gTTakfXhJPp1Gs3_R74ZkMuDYZ4qDtNwoco3p3YL8GhwcKmeN2MQk6Y6yylqMDZBi3AN32h60NliGiW5epBy-Yte9A8GjjYqahYTbqesmhGnwHbQ6MYOPs-iJhHC6nUOFaOzaXJiiHZ5fczPrgZIx)** or another amount today?

**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dffe689498a41e893bae9b004e584e3&_e=vuMgBNz2zu92C7ARDPHI7swqdwRt27-tx5Q31dvq-9r9v75SDn_XdHJ-1lIC6d9o_pnrHYwV13lVoIlcIscFhAxCTW3n29bl3hCyhfX4oNUwaeUKSHz-EshoTMPyIKYC5CvJWn3iu9cOoxhMxWsISgmsPCkq1Ub0pTomgo66MP-V78TNBnUbKwKbz1mKmeMeSYonQ03swNx_X9tAwWUXBNWBBDmFLyiFfRjKIil5vaviPteZj8y0VQjhaGfMvsDryvM0zBG28nzxTsO273KA-k2-tbQONP_vTS7k32NNmo2ulAVy5izgxCzDmHgIijxouAJ2ltPxZC1_Q41UdoXwb8DMiHY2HEf6zqkULfoGCkrrIf-XzgDpD2eL5sK5QOZ9WUi_18GWzuY2xV1jn7Ig36M6Hzv6XED1w8JjUndAMYPLGMA6UbwwSB1Trcj5fRbg)
When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. _**Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it**_.

With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, **putting a damper on our efforts to keep our 5-seat House majority**. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? **[Whether it’s $5, $15, or the July average of $23, every contribution counts](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=8dffe689498a41e893bae9b004e584e3&_e=vuMgBNz2zu92C7ARDPHI7swqdwRt27-tx5Q31dvq-9r9v75SDn_XdHJ-1lIC6d9o_pnrHYwV13lVoIlcIscFhAxCTW3n29bl3hCyhfX4oNUwaeUKSHz-EshoTMPyIKYC5CvJWn3iu9cOoxhMxWsISgmsPCkq1Ub0pTomgo66MP-V78TNBnUbKwKbz1mKmeMeSYonQ03swNx_X9tAwWUXBNWBBDmFLyiFfRjKIil5vaviPteZj8y0VQjhaGfMvsDryvM0zBG28nzxTsO273KA-k2-tbQONP_vTS7k32NNmo1iQGNykksA3Tg6-f2pMS9atuI223_QWPguQhmeDCg0S4TsNbti5shFVGpCff_-ltILGbgxaCDbUiUcgP3C9CX3lAXP_1AC4EpQEqTNTgkCNbFThlchaTR6vtMxeoM-Yq5R8B-gDjVy7xtwCM1la8jh)** - every single contribution matters.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

clean_body: Please treat it as such. Our operation relies on small-dollar donations and right now, they're down more than 40% | | $23 More than 10,119 donations were made to my campaign in July with an average gift of $23. And let me tell you that while $23 goes a long way in helping us to reach the voters we need to continue winning elections - not as many people are donating to campaigns like mine as they once did.In fact, our fundraising numbers have dropped 40% from this time in August 2021. This email is on the longer side, so if you don't want to read to the end, , our average July donation, to help us get a head start on our August fundraising? Some political pundits have written articles that spell doom for Republican candidates, opining that conservative candidates/causes have inundated you with too many texts and too much email to sift through in a day. While It’s true that nearly every congressional campaign in the 2024 cycle will attempt to utilize online fundraising to propel them into the House/Senate, not every email or text is created equal; and not every email or text will deliver the entirety of your donation to the candidate you think you’re donating to. Bad actors and political grifters have figured out that online fundraising is a good way to make a quick buck off your generosity. Not me. Not now, not ever. I know a couple of things to be true: We must do everything within our power to hold onto the U.S. House – the future of our country absolutely depends on it Democrats are outraising Republicans 2-1 most months, sometimes it can even be as high as 3-1 It may not be the person asking for it The stakes are as high now as they were in 2021, . If you can, would you please help us close the donation gap by or another amount today? When considering whether to donate to campaign contribution requests like this one, I urge you to look at the paid for language at the bottom of the email. Do you know who you’re giving money to? It may not be the person asking for it. With so much competition for your hard-earned dollars, campaigns like mine have seen a dramatic shift in the donations we’re able to bring in every month, putting a damper on our efforts to keep our 5-seat House majority. So, if you’re able to at this time, would you please consider my request for a donation today? - every single contribution matters. name: Conservatives Give
subject: The greatest Christian apologist of the 20th century
body:
C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9384a2057f4146c78b2684ff4577e54b&_e=MpjRP47bSAbhJ7l3SZ4eCc4Jhl8iKCU8gZoc4UguBU97gzrmNjmhlDopdMvCGqzcSa8ABox-cCroZFaDUlBu2MO3wPEy5gpfc8d414PEQr-FYphRHzpkD1xJITUlSzYzm8ezwKtHrB75ZGL0QmOGwd2boi7ZCp7Ksrev8CooIOoVkzyrVFJG-037a-TOWmYeF4FFad03JEJnFTFQ3DK2zsXfyNgrFkgv9NZHEfBQ_h17u_g10wtaZRq1QUbM-WoVRWKxRLL48lNLqECWXLa9VkqWn_9WyAZBlDxH86pcMIkT3pgIzzN3ZhdTV12SLRXB5oyNUZZvTS1o0MLbzxqqbxHr6uCmoRc_Oqgsnrhn19hKfhVuznYhWY7WBVjiO7sAmxCOImZJO2zIyc_uWke70NsbhtTAu9pPXWivUW25xr_A5JY1i2b-TtFtjZ601X0n)
---
| | Dear friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9384a2057f4146c78b2684ff4577e54b&_e=MpjRP47bSAbhJ7l3SZ4eCc4Jhl8iKCU8gZoc4UguBU97gzrmNjmhlDopdMvCGqzcSa8ABox-cCroZFaDUlBu2MO3wPEy5gpfc8d414PEQr-FYphRHzpkD1xJITUlSzYzm8ezwKtHrB75ZGL0QmOGwd2boi7ZCp7Ksrev8CooIOoVkzyrVFJG-037a-TOWmYeF4FFad03JEJnFTFQ3DK2zsXfyNgrFkgv9NZHEfBQ_h17u_g10wtaZRq1QUbM-WoVRWKxRLL48lNLqECWXLa9VhfODJZYscZddvTa2gOGavjjTxxTH1-15Tm3qyq5k5lj8CUfYKRxFLtj99c7Fpd4QI_iPxvdn4ChbDG5y91gOPdGeIjf_ehmLjyqwitUNIAY0R2plhUAzUrg-UJDuEHBny_rELfDyETXqqOresluQOabJ-iq9zrcWsExuC8EdK6h)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9384a2057f4146c78b2684ff4577e54b&_e=MpjRP47bSAbhJ7l3SZ4eCc4Jhl8iKCU8gZoc4UguBU97gzrmNjmhlDopdMvCGqzcSa8ABox-cCroZFaDUlBu2MO3wPEy5gpfc8d414PEQr-FYphRHzpkD1xJITUlSzYzm8ezwKtHrB75ZGL0QmOGwd2boi7ZCp7Ksrev8CooIOoVkzyrVFJG-037a-TOWmYeF4FFad03JEJnFTFQ3DK2zsXfyNgrFkgv9NZHEfBQ_h17u_g10wtaZRq1QUbM-WoVRWKxRLL48lNLqECWXLa9VtC0suEN8juNMvLQGSAtcyx5uOtYFGyiweySZ0bLaOUppaap0pYx6skitjQCmPQ8r_iM48ANM2sBMdQBzeaMYvjoX_TKFndz6rswVdmRZ_M6fj-Ka84WEuzb5L4w3g-WD8oAFoA-kmryqG97ea-lNQ7elnUPRWhnKfKM89gD2yUU)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful new DVD box set](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9384a2057f4146c78b2684ff4577e54b&_e=MpjRP47bSAbhJ7l3SZ4eCc4Jhl8iKCU8gZoc4UguBU97gzrmNjmhlDopdMvCGqzcSa8ABox-cCroZFaDUlBu2MO3wPEy5gpfc8d414PEQr-FYphRHzpkD1xJITUlSzYzm8ezwKtHrB75ZGL0QmOGwd2boi7ZCp7Ksrev8CooIOoVkzyrVFJG-037a-TOWmYeF4FFad03JEJnFTFQ3DK2zsXfyNgrFkgv9NZHEfBQ_h17u_g10wtaZRq1QUbM-WoVRWKxRLL48lNLqECWXLa9Vq0JLzkgJHBB_tMva_n5KTywcrZnrLvpTBbdNaiUvIBuBgLK-nz8z-aJsihkFZCZFIeOAjIHoUo1_j8mM7ftmHHuujAGLQEbQ_ufEWY2PEmFfTsznIJQydAG3ME4XbF6fo3UvmHBOT5uTjIil6Zx-06ofMUMCB3Na7Rn64Jnc1VT).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=9384a2057f4146c78b2684ff4577e54b&_t=Sx5N99cs7pWjImQJI5GvZCn_U57C71Fwzteq-n6PRY-eAS9Pj257Z8iIu3cQbkfkLBrSNaM_7C5Mye6hWhCPgX7VnZ6Ng2BLslNfsWBF1hOH4GPQH0e6uZ8GWSqKVeBBGm24bFyOdJSageFDb2zzfHE4cnOTKgpso01kiIAbdLM%3D)

body:
| Your donations make all the difference.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=932%2E35263%2EUG8YAy)
Peter: The halfway point to our next Federal Election Commission fundraising deadline is just around the corner, so we’re counting on a surge of grassroots support to show everyone keeping an eye on Wisconsin that our campaign is picking up steam. We’ll explain why that matters in a moment, but if you’d rather we cut to the chase, **[you can click here to rush a donation of any amount to Tammy’s reelection campaign.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230814_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=932%2E35263%2EUG8YAy)** We’ve said it before, and we’ll say it again: **Your donations make all the difference.** After Tammy launched her reelection campaign, this team responded with such an incredible surge of grassroots support that _two_ of the GOP’s preferred candidates announced they wouldn’t be challenging Tammy for this competitive Senate seat. But we’re not out of the woods yet — not when we have two mega-millionaires with the ability to bankroll their Senate campaigns considering jumping into this race. Peter, we need your help to prepare to go up against virtually unlimited campaign war chests. It’s a tall task but it’s possible so long as we can count on folks like you to chip in what you can, when you can. **[Will you pitch in $5 or more before our mid-quarter fundraising deadline to keep up our momentum and prepare for potential self-funding GOP opponents to enter the race?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ECUt09&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230814_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=932%2E35263%2EUG8YAy)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-aug23.ePE894&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MQG_AC_20230814_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=932%2E35263%2EUG8YAy)

name: Colin Allred
subject: Help me defeat Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Be Gone, Inc
body:
Will you help me win in Texas?
| [](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21493?t=6&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2) Friend, I’m Colin Allred, and I’m running for U.S. Senate to defeat Ted Cruz and deliver better, stronger leadership for the people of Texas.

Winning in Texas will all but guarantee Democrats are able to defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and CNN is already calling Ted Cruz one of the most vulnerable Senators in the country!

**That’s why I need you with me from day one: Please, will you split $3 or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Ron Be Gone to help reach my ambitious goal of $500,000?**[**Every dollar you can spare will help us build a people-powered movement to defeat Ted Cruz, flip Texas blue and defend our Senate majority. Please donate now →**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21494?t=8&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Ron Be Gone and Colin Allred will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21501?t=15&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21502?t=16&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21503?t=17&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2)
I’m a 4th generation Texan, born and raised in Dallas by a single mom. My mom was a public school teacher and sometimes worked two jobs to make ends meet. Thanks to my family and a strong support system of teachers, coaches, and the good folks at the YMCA, I earned a full ride football scholarship to Baylor University and then went on to play in the NFL.

But playing football was never my only dream – from a young age I knew I wanted to help people. So I became a civil rights attorney to defend what I believe is our most fundamental right: the right to vote. I proudly served in President Obama’s administration before I came home to Dallas, where I’m now raising my family.

I ran for Congress because I wanted more kids in North Texas to have the opportunity to achieve their version of the American dream and protect the fundamental values of our democracy – and I beat the odds to defeat an 11-term Republican incumbent, helping Democrats flip the House blue in 2018.

Now, I’m ready for my next challenge: taking on Ted Cruz. I know it won’t be easy, but I also know that Texans deserve so much better than Ted Cruz’s cynical partisan politics. Everything Ted Cruz does is for Ted Cruz – when I’m in the Senate, everything I do will be to help people like you. But I can’t get there alone:

[**We need to raise $4,000 by MIDNIGHT to fund our crucial work. Will you chip in $1, $3, or anything you can afford today? »**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21494?t=19&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2)

Thank you so much for helping me launch this campaign. We have a long way to go, but together, I know we’ve got what it takes to win this thing.

Let’s do this,

_Colin Allred_
[DONATE »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/21494?t=21&akid=1947%2E564421%2EyG1Zl2)

He MUST be defeated in the next election. subject: This is actually unprecedented

body:
Today, the Chief of Naval Operations mustered out with no replacement.
#
[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august23.WcYsFQ&refcode=em230814-1-15&t=1&akid=15619%2E3013755%2EU53zY2)
In politics, people throw around the word “unprecedented” all the time.
But today, something really unprecedented actually happened.
For the first time in the history of the United States, THREE of our Military branches are going without a confirmed commander.
First, it was the Marine Corps Commandant.
Then, it was the Army Chief of Staff.
And today, the Chief of Naval Operations retired with no replacement.
Tuberville is doing great harm to our Armed Forces. And the GOP is standing by, doing nothing.
We continue to fight. We need you with us. This blockade of promotions won’t stop unless we do everything we can to make it stop.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=446%2E552475%2E_7bnH0)
Peter, on this day in 1935, Franklin Delano Roosevelt signed the Social Security Act into law, building the foundation for our country's social safety net.
**But national Republicans have made no secret of their plans to put Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid on the chopping block.**
Hundreds of millions of Americans have relied on these programs for decades -- and we can't let national Republicans get away with raising the retirement age, ripping away seniors' hard-earned benefits, and chipping away at these vital programs.
[**We need as many folks as possible to add their name in defense of Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Will you take action and sign our petition today?**](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230814-socialsecurity/?t=2&akid=446%2E552475%2E_7bnH0)
**[Sign Now ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230814-socialsecurity/?t=3&akid=446%2E552475%2E_7bnH0)**
National Republicans act like they have no choice but to rip away benefits from seniors and people with disabilities... yet their budget plans manage to preserve tax breaks for billionaires? It doesn't add up.
**Let's get real:** the only reason to support cutting, instead of strengthening, Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid benefits is to protect the wealthy from paying their fair share. Far too many working Americans will suffer the consequences if national Republicans get their way.
**And we won't stand for it.[We need as many folks as possible to add their name in defense of Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. Will you take action and sign our petition today?](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230814-socialsecurity/?t=4&akid=446%2E552475%2E_7bnH0)**
**[Sign Now ››](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/casey-em-20230814-socialsecurity/?t=5&akid=446%2E552475%2E_7bnH0)**
Thanks for adding your name,
Team Casey

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: I have to be honest with you | = Peter, I have to be 100% honest with you. The summer months make fundraising difficult. Many grassroots donors like you spend more time with family, and unplug from reading emails like these. And while candidates who call rich donors for their campaign cash have no trouble sustaining fundraising through this time, candidates who rely on their grassroots team – like me – have a tougher time. I won’t compromise the integrity of our campaign by becoming beholden to wealthy mega-donors. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Not afraid
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
MAGA extremists are getting louder.
#
From the Trump town hall on CNN to dozens of far-right candidates filing to run for Congress, MAGA extremists are growing increasingly louder as the 2024 election cycle heats up.
Lies about the 2020 election, abortion, and immigration are dominating the airwaves. **Without a concerted effort to combat these lies, the hatred and disinformation of right-wing extremists will continue to spread, endangering marginalized communities and our democracy itself.**
Our movement is fighting to directly combat this disinformation. Alexandria is not afraid to take on right-wing extremists — and she will never let their lies go unanswered.
[Will you contribute $5 today to power our progressive movement and combat MAGA talking points with the truth? Every dollar goes to our campaign for progress.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-2023814-2.pI35sS&refcode=em20230814-4809-P_FND_EGR_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4809%2E2526796%2EJK2P_h)

subject: learning should not be shameful
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Team,

**How can students learn if they are being shamed out of asking questions?**

Day in and day out, children are being conditioned to believe learning has limits. They are being manipulated by extremists to think asking critical questions is shameful. They are being taught that knowledge is _not_ power.

Censorship has reared its ugly head in our school systems, reminding the nation that no one, not even our children, is safe from the wrath of right-wing extremists.

[Banning books is a direct attack on our children and their right to education. Students deserve to learn uninhibited in an environment free of partisan culture wars. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: It actually happened.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:

clean_body: I refuse to let Biden stop me from winning the FIRST CAUCUS. I refuse to let Biden stop me from winning the FIRST CAUCUS. | | | | | Friend, Crooked Joe's weaponized Department of Justice is trying to force me to stand trial as the very first votes are cast in the 2024 election - in the Iowa Caucus. But the incompetent Crook in the White House must've forgotten who he's dealing with. There 's absolutely no attack he can come up with that can keep me off the campaign trail and stop me from fighting for YOU. If Biden is going to try and stop me from winning the Iowa Caucus, then I 'm going to fly to Iowa to DOUBLE our already insurmountable lead. And that's exactly what I did: But the best part of the trip was seeing just how many Iowa patriots showed up to support our movement in the midst of the most vicious witch hunt imaginable. There was a record crowd at the Iowa State Fair. They 've never had anything even close. While the Washington ruling class abuses its power to try and destroy our movement, the PEOPLE of our country are standing united in peaceful defense of our movement. And on November 5, 2024, we will prove that in America, the people still get to decide the future we want for our country. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. subject: I have some INCREDIBLE NEWS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat
[Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_t=UnauV7FgyAW7PL-lQfJRpG_2RaqvmhwfI9zR68VJRY6v45OWkABMgqA45k95k0TbP3HFjxKn2elP5t4bXfbEFWWUBZ2jSLERIW5ZbZUwLVo%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_t=UnauV7FgyAW7PL-lQfJRpG_2RaqvmhwfI9zR68VJRY6v45OWkABMgqA45k95k0TbP3HFjxKn2elP5t4bXfbEFWWUBZ2jSLERIW5ZbZUwLVo%3D)

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-bsbPWap7cpL-P6_tV98B2LPvJYH_jmMlCRWkelimtixmxDnR0QB_Q-voi3l43H9Vnmd0LIxaXj418aixFotFO6ufBJPtbp4fZQXLsLFcY5are1nnJWUPcXNj7_4h88_2oa1QAIq4VyOiOPIkNozzPQ%3D%3D)
|
Peter,

It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today.

An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race _**I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat**_.

However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... **(see graphic below)**

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-WL9Ue0ki4IUHfgP5zQwoqxaW9A0UrK0uWtCm1kXK6pkUPSxEvGYqsTRBrgMpgQYlXv0x0fgsCq0ZbLMUsz2RBJRHW0FKcCEG7517sGVw1UphkuM6ntX6TJXB4PwxGivDL-rX1PAWd5x6C4ykhbtRFQ%3D%3D)

Peter, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: **[Will you donate $2 right now?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-7xDiGqzbB0rWqvJc29hPgIF_USWKrEIDUwbaDQCzkmsor9z612Rb-zbBGvoZCTFnd6Xl4nLzB_txpUYJJJrzOLNV_lNa1HrOpxLrm9zsULeFOsXyomPxzcFEC6hFyk-kCxpSPntqnPMXuWsgUmvhaw%3D%3D)** The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – **who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race** – stays out of the race entirely.

The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised

[**HELP ME KEEP THIS A TWO-WAY RACE
CHIP IN $2 NOW**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-42Qj04BxH7wv2DYdExCeySZvxCS0CtSJUbZvQgBEsKZREXjqojhmv_FKjhuAmFr8GgIn8RCGYky0zV37psTmLIsici0NZtX6ndxeqc99vShG4futV1xfgiSywogsqERnXvvRKcj6g5ax_MmnTRQlHg%3D%3D)
We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race.

**Let me be abundantly clear:** that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans.

**[Please chip in $2](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-GWcyhMZtGb8vkf9NlM1F3EYxFpxNTqPzPcYgrzwlZI-7tHymOBTkDPe7HStig1-PrvFrYY4ILbvei6I3J-pQl_0kLB62aAKZ-yujMBCT0mQEnDcjpp2Bla7brcdUt5-jivEZkmV8i3JxStnc68qF_g%3D%3D) **right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. I promise you it will be the best $2 you spend all year.
[**CHIP IN $2 TODAY**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-ajmk5AQHArABmRIr79r2ve74rWZ1E-TxuzJ9uOCiOir8cQj5udhdcqVvsnvyGxLVzUd7IixeyyPXjzdcFNDtbfbIH0Pyu2oyJ46g--cdxnkUFxHuvMqExB5rWJDdlOgWp_3LQviMTTvDSZh_ioKxtQ%3D%3D)

Respectfully,
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=30270ec9f98b470a8f8855ceaa430ee3&_e=aE0dwttji6jdlkj8jJYy6b-laHqpEuKfFUTVuC1Sa_SK25HrNhCVLZePo_kPJhxXl6ROPP_aEDZJJFfwnVS5MMAnazMjJJ5MkQgnksnSUbgEMSC0SgdAW-IvfJibCUqDVtY69tZXsgeNAUPev8_-JJ66a88kRZuSX71yVdfZjYXdUyCG_pMBRtIQbomV1WudAeiQGxl6fI__61A9zulpFAK2XLQwb7RNPHDR4K2UciqX7DooXCZ7ZlQA5PeoSnC-T2nX-3j_4WXIBqKuoxp_t3CMFtUAIRgopl8tIK0RfCgD4fuqgEtBUxW_w78KECkDTqIB2wRIFavY8RM6uf4qqzNo-gI8-WgNy7O6bLY5MR_QAgRw_7gXCVfu9fUWIjuX10v9zM_nIYO8e3YEOoEPCA%3D%3D)

clean_body: I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat | | Peter, It’s Arizona Senate candidate Sheriff Mark Lamb with some incredible news to share with you today. An Emerson College poll was published last week showing that in a two-way race I’m polling at 42%, TIED with one of the TWO Democrats I’m running against for this CRITICAL SENATE seat. However, at this moment in time, it’s likely ANOTHER well-known Democrat is going to toss their hat into the contest, too. Along with releasing poll numbers for what a two-way race would look like, Emerson also released a snapshot of what the race would look like with me running against TWO Democrats – the results are not good for me or Republican prospects of flipping this critical Senate seat ... (see graphic below) Peter, I’m coming to you with a humble – yet urgent request: The most surefire way to win this race for our Party is by making sure that a third candidate – who would take away votes from the Republican nominee and cost us the race – stays out of the race entirely. The best way I know how to keep politically ambitious politicians out of a race they cannot win is by raising as MUCH money as humanly possible. There is strength in numbers, both literally and figuratively – in this case, our strength will be showcased in total dollars raised We really don’t have the luxury of time presently. Every day and month that we’re not continuously growing the base of support for this campaign, the more likely it becomes that the Arizona Senate race will be a 3-way race. Let me be abundantly clear: that would be the worst possible outcome for Republicans. right now if you have a genuine interest in flipping the Senate and taking back our country. I promise you it will be the best $2 you spend all year. With only 9 days till the FIRST Presidential Debate, it is important that we ask ourselves those two questions Governor Christie presented.
1) Is Trump really the guy? Do we think a 77-year-old facing multiple indictments can actually beat Joe Biden in 2024? Trump lost to Biden in 2020, he cost us the House in 2018 and even lost us the Senate in 2021.
2) When are we going to stop pretending this is normal? This is not normal to have a Presidential candidate under as many as four different indictments.

In 9 days when Chris Christie takes the debate stage, remember to ask yourself those two questions.

name: Ruben Gallego (AZ)
subject: we've fallen behind
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The sky isn't falling. But we do need your help today.
#

Peter -
This is a short message to let you know we've gotten off to a very slow start in August and have fallen behind on our fundraising goals.
Now, there's no reason to panic. The sky isn't falling. But we do need to make it up to keep us on track to win this race. And as we get close to the halfway point on our next FEC deadline, the timing isn’t great.
So I am asking you to contribute $3 tonight. Yes, $3.
$3 to help us catch up on our fundraising goals.
$3 to do it with lots and lots of individual donations — the way we fund this campaign.
$3 because replacing Kyrsten Sinema and keeping Kari Lake out of the Senate is an all-hands-on-deck effort.
As you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their $3. Now they're hoping you'll do the same. So please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $3, or whatever you can afford today to help Ruben Gallego flip this seat for Democrats and get to the U.S. Senate?**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug23.NWxa9e&refcode=em230814-2-f&t=1&akid=933%2E734936%2E76xepB)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-aug23.91DAaM&amount=3&refcode=em230814-2-f&t=2&akid=933%2E734936%2E76xepB)**

Thank you,
Ruben

name: Tim Sheehy, U.S. Navy SEAL
subject: This is concerning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $9](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fed97ad6675d4fdd8e6fdc08393d5207&_e=dhjhaZQ2WHUt2mtMN6r8h3aYVGQVbJqzzXRPrKH3G318p_x5N21RPPrfI3OgV9jQApFP-5JStY0tgCyQvmM4TryPKtxjNlk6SNJn4cLwV7lT_Xo5k3rEZzi3fMRAZ9q1AuTwRty4jXddSJ3ZH434bTpHela959BfzQlFsXDygVQY7WElkzTjc-N73NYji657HSHLy98mqdHgb_fWaNjddpfhsE_GiB1fOBxOdbg2obRYf3uEeXRd3Q7KyhycvnZqUnr3bM_p333pZcmyK2T8xvG5BF8UjLh4VARjgt9rKrw0gXvQ6f_aBVwPaH18Fz8lOhmT8TknP3r1vgjMkT9rOQMGG7BfbD4jO3IULtl4zVmnQg4dLmehd5bLSNGpCMYf)** to help me hit my goal today of **raising $886** , but please continue reading to find out why I’m asking and why it’s important conservatives like you who care about this country get engaged in my race.**[{link to donate}](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fed97ad6675d4fdd8e6fdc08393d5207&_e=dhjhaZQ2WHUt2mtMN6r8h3aYVGQVbJqzzXRPrKH3G318p_x5N21RPPrfI3OgV9jQApFP-5JStY0tgCyQvmM4TryPKtxjNlk6SNJn4cLwV7lT_Xo5k3rEZzi3fMRAZ9q1AuTwRty4jXddSJ3ZH434bTpHela959BfzQlFsXDygVQY7WElkzTjc-N73NYji657HSHLy98mqdHgb_fWaNjddpfhsE_GiB1fOBxOdbg2obSILiNqr1umrEIiPrCPnjfwinQoIApMzVifDWdp3RZiHNc4q1LYTpTAlpnZbHiB55x8YIUg7rpzIw6BgrjdkdFPe--N-uYFkILrL_URc7-T6XV9v4AsbAsgbC3JsRsnbjQZd53lFrfe7WuGdni-1BcI)**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. **[[link to donate]](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fed97ad6675d4fdd8e6fdc08393d5207&_e=dhjhaZQ2WHUt2mtMN6r8h3aYVGQVbJqzzXRPrKH3G318p_x5N21RPPrfI3OgV9jQApFP-5JStY0tgCyQvmM4TryPKtxjNlk6SNJn4cLwV7lT_Xo5k3rEZzi3fMRAZ9q1AuTwRty4jXddSJ3ZH434bTpHela959BfzQlFsXDygVQY7WElkzTjc-N73NYji657HSHLy98mqdHgb_fWaNjddpfhsE_GiB1fOBxOdbg2obSxvK5kZ2GkXhlv_euXWDMs9mtbOXv7rZ8EUCbYmcnj4OAtmvrCH-RIAhZ8-SKbSUQF6FkYg675w1hKk3F2U-n0oGruTZATi7ZQa4Eyrq_nw3l4GnzRer8WhRK5Bkc4LTKvvEHaF27I4qo70D30wJEy)**

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fed97ad6675d4fdd8e6fdc08393d5207&_e=dhjhaZQ2WHUt2mtMN6r8h3aYVGQVbJqzzXRPrKH3G318p_x5N21RPPrfI3OgV9jQApFP-5JStY0tgCyQvmM4TryPKtxjNlk6SNJn4cLwV7lT_Xo5k3rEZzi3fMRAZ9q1AuTwRty4jXddSJ3ZH434bTpHela959BfzQlFsXDygVQY7WElkzTjc-N73NYji657HSHLy98mqdHgb_fWaNjddpfhsE_GiB1fOBxOdbg2obS0qNDzuFqDRW21KYfSHMLGVgm4kYe7ARSQxflW2NbYimcBTTFF1vET3r9mqlgRjogt9bU-fQvdiKL8g5Zymiy6rfGRr715Z5bioYq02NUccqu-fsWf6oeJMNsBUjczo5L55tdtzdFB-Sqppg9zpvkW)**.

[**CHIP IN $9
HELP ME HIT MY GOAL TODAY ->
**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=fed97ad6675d4fdd8e6fdc08393d5207&_e=dhjhaZQ2WHUt2mtMN6r8h3aYVGQVbJqzzXRPrKH3G318p_x5N21RPPrfI3OgV9jQApFP-5JStY0tgCyQvmM4TryPKtxjNlk6SNJn4cLwV7lT_Xo5k3rEZzi3fMRAZ9q1AuTwRty4jXddSJ3ZH434bTpHela959BfzQlFsXDygVQY7WElkzTjc-N73NYji657HSHLy98mqdHgb_fWaNjddpfhsE_GiB1fOBxOdbg2obQlrcsJX5zlsfyHw6dfnpAnr58WXu6crkrNEumjXRy7i4fahFsBIWsOUZOV01ddzOf6xrK7OtH65gRBYIbW8VoBz546BoeNNT7vS8o5fVmta8ayxM_QuvMlq5yk3m5TfMUOMVdReN56Vt1PfzX7ykFn)

Tim Sheehy

name: Jon Tester
subject: Can I be honest?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
| Peter—

I’ll keep this quick.

I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. **And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow.**

National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you.

[**That’s why I’m asking if you can split just $10 between my campaign and UNITEDemocrats to help us win this ultra-competitive race—because the number of donors we have is just as important as the total amount of money we raise. Can you chip in today? »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68093199/421897122/-890498101?amount=10&refcode=UD_20230814_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0M2VhNTBhLWYwM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q697IIdljB3Ea79qkChU77129ksTcmxoq7wDlYEu2mw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/68093210/421897133/-890498101?amount=10&amounts=10,15,20&express_lane=true&refcode=UD_20230814_EMSPL_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk0M2VhNTBhLWYwM2EtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=q697IIdljB3Ea79qkChU77129ksTcmxoq7wDlYEu2mw=)

clean_body: | Peter— I’ll keep this quick. I’m the most vulnerable Senator running for reelection in the country. And I’ll be honest—we’re not where we want to be ahead of our August mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow. National Republicans may have special interests and wealthy donors on their side, but this is a grassroots team, and I’ve got people like you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and UNITEDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = Thanks for everything you do. —Jon Tester | | Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC (www.unitedemocrats.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 514 Daniels St., #286, Raleigh, NC 27605 Please, consider making a =. name: Hillary Clinton Alert (via DLCC.org)
subject: Hillary Clinton is calling on YOU!
body:
Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | |
---
| | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. **That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference:** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOjfeJwXrCL8FE5QLo7JAUZswaF37mA6nO-i2yU92FJn2vsjVUdyaKSO2Rc92n2tHvod8yQvxkI6nQBGv4Po9bUrr26f4YUVyzECy5moIE7LQa5ACfNkIjCueCrxYFsBX9nrGghGW0M-VKQxJC23x1KNt2_dwju2mtWpPDkWACWY3ZCs4vRo697vrUZIFzRJR-rntpphayew3xBzfWJLcrjx_GpXV_dQNRpcDoSsU8ZoIsfeKXukXuQNu2xIZwMB48QRQ_fOA5_kDj4WrKELxDLCNLBpiH5k9fmFvdI_ZXlT_pP5mBNvmWgfHH-EpvLCdDVJKCvo8hccavLvKCLyxEp53FiphJTbAY-QlYR7IKzoe/3yq/vusH6RZGQtSKLWMlsgvVzg/h0/QLt85_sxkic5ZmV98LYvQHY23dJNkovSxBcSJKHZGaM)

Will you rush $7 right now to stand with Hillary Clinton and build Democratic power in Virginia and beyond?](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZ4znX1V30AzyoPQGNX0DNOjfeJwXrCL8FE5QLo7JAUZswaF37mA6nO-i2yU92FJn2vsjVUdyaKSO2Rc92n2tHvod8yQvxkI6nQBGv4Po9bUrr26f4YUVyzECy5moIE7LQa5ACfNkIjCueCrxYFsBX9jcqeodehHRwZSp5BNs6kn3OK34fFUrCU9lhknOE4gVWHu0y4pWkRt4g22ibxRLG1XfhMdT0S8NtQM62oqZJznT-hM_p4_GCWARPpW1qG--x-6Es1bQxdz75omoXw-h-bhkFkdErpn-kD3h1DN90WADA64lpV78jxK3j8Hs4Px2s4fKS6x4hhdkanlXOea_SFAJruhDXBVxVizFdfRDqDLKhZeYeqi9hUH8xE8OZxpUW/3yq/vusH6RZGQtSKLWMlsgvVzg/h2/AmZYzib_3DuKnL_JXOsMXIkUpr0ip9UC_6ryqIxqCVs) For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. **Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy.** If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – _it's horrible._ **The stakes are high, and we _cannot_ afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too.** [Chip in $7 to heed Hillary Clinton's call to action and support Democrats in critical states like Virginia. clean_body: Republicans across the nation are working tirelessly to keep control of the Virginia House. We’re calling on all of our grassroots donors to help Democrats flip control. | | | | | The results of this November's elections in Virginia will determine the path our country takes for years to come. That’s why Hillary Clinton is calling on grassroots Democrats, including you, to make a difference: For the past two years, our Democratic majority in the state Senate has acted as a barrier against Virginia Republicans' dangerous agenda. But we risk losing this essential check on GOP power if Democrats are defeated this November. Virginia Republicans have already rolled back voting rights, and their proposed budget favors tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. If the GOP flips the state Senate and keeps control of the House, abortion rights could be first up on the chopping block. Their far-right governor has already endorsed plans to threaten abortion doctors with jail time – it's horrible. The stakes are high, and we cannot afford to lose. This team has stepped up time and time again to help drive our mission forward, so we know you'll come through this year, too. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for everything. Peter,

Last week the Supreme Court reinstated the Biden Administrations' regulation of ghost guns. This type of gun can be made privately from individual parts, from at-home kits, or from 3D printers and without serial numbers, making them impossible to track.

The gun violence epidemic has already been taking thousands of lives across our country. Regulations like those upheld by the Court have an immediate impact. Our communities deserve to be safe at schools, places of worship, public spaces and in their homes. There is still much work to be done to stop this epidemic. In fact, this session marks the fewest bills signed into law since 2009. clean_body: | | | = | | = | Friend, Rep. Oscar De Los Santos here. We just wrapped up the longest session in the Arizona Legislature’s history and, thanks to the right-wing Republican majority, we have very little to show for it... | | Plenty of thoughtful, pragmatic bills sponsored by Democrats went unheard, while the far right’s extreme, short-sighted, and sometimes outright cruel bills took their place. In fact, this session marks the fewest bills signed into law since 2009. That’s why I’m counting down the minutes until we flip the legislature in 2024. But we can win only with your help. = = Far too much of this session was a waste of taxpayer time and money—including useless hearings focused on unhinged bills that were the product of Donald Trump and Kari Lake’s lies and conspiracy theories. Because of the Republican fixation on extreme legislation, we did not even get close to addressing our state’s top issues like restoring abortion access, ending the gun violence epidemic, giving our teachers a raise, or securing Arizona's future water supply. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the ADLCC will go through immediately: | | = = = | = = = | | Thanks, Rep. Oscar De Los Santos, LD-11 | | = = | The Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee is the only organization in the state of Arizona whose sole purpose is to elect Democrats to the State House and Senate. We recruit and train candidates for legislative office and equip their campaigns with the infrastructure and resources to win. = | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by the Arizona Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee, a project of the Arizona Democratic Party. name: Nikki HQ
subject: This is where you come in, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Hi folks — our team just wrapped up a quick meeting to check in on our progress toward tomorrow's mid-quarter goal, and it looks like we’re coming up a little short of our fundraising target. With the race for IL-13 heating up and Republican opponents already vying for Nikki’s seat, now is not the time to give up and become complacent. We must continue building our grassroots movement so we're prepared to overcome the inevitable dark-money spending and attacks that will come our way. **Friend, we’ve got our work cut out for us, but we’re no strangers to tough fights.** We proved this when we stood tall to help Nikki overcome the flood of outside spending in her race last year — and with National Republicans already looking to flip her seat, we can only expect to see more of the same this cycle. **[This is where you come in, friend. Will you be one of just 250 grassroots supporters we need to chip in $5 to help close the gap to reach our mid-quarter goal? name: Team Jayapal
subject: Supporters like you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
All of this necessary progress has been made because supporters and activists like you truly believe in our fight.
#
Peter,
The end of the summer is coming quicker than we could have ever imagined, but we're not slowing down our movement any time soon.
Pramila has remained hard at work for our progressive movement. From connecting with voters in Washington and canvassing on behalf of local and state Democratic candidates, to standing with striking workers as they fight for better working conditions and the right to organize, to amplifying our values in the halls of Congress.
All of our necessary progress has been made because of supporters and activists like you who truly believe in our fight.
**So we're reaching out to you today to ask if you can further support our movement by making a contribution of $5, $10, $50, or whatever you are able to give to help us reach our mid-month fundraising goal of $12,725 before midnight tomorrow.[Can we count on you to chip in a donation of any amount to help us reach our goal and maintain our movement's hard work and momentum? ](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44307?refcode=em20230814-2813&t=1&akid=2813%2E420207%2E28rGae)**
**[Chip in ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44307?refcode=em20230814-2813&t=20&akid=2813%2E420207%2E28rGae)**
There's too much at stake for us to slow down, Peter. With an unhinged and extremist far-right party willing to do anything to further disenfranchise and harm their constituents, to insidious political interest groups like Moms for Liberty and No Labels working to undermine our progressive values — we need to be all hands on deck for our Democratic cause.
We need the tools and resources to show up for our communities, protect our neighborhoods, and put the pressure on those with the power to make real change. And as a grassroots funded movement that doesn't rely on billionaires and corporate PACs to bankroll our campaign, _we need supporters like you on our side._
Your contributions to our campaign will directly power our outreach and impact while allowing Pramila to continue focusing 100% of her time on legislating for a better democracy.**So no matter what you're able to give, your support will make a massive difference in our ability to continue working at full power.**
**[Chip in today to help us kick off our mid-month fundraising efforts and power our movement for true change.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/44307?refcode=em20230814-2813&t=21&akid=2813%2E420207%2E28rGae)**
Together,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20230814-2813-footer&t=22&refcode2=2813_420207_28rGae&akid=2813%2E420207%2E28rGae)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=2813%2E420207%2E28rGae)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=2813%2E420207%2E28rGae)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

Well, after 3 unjust INDICTMENTS _of yours truly backfired beautifully (and news reports indicating a FOURTH could come very soon), we’ve also expanded our LEAD over Biden in the all-important battleground state of Arizona! Kevin McCarthy and his allies at the NRCC are strapping their frontline candidates with cash ahead of the 2024 elections.

We can't afford to fall behind if we're going to take back the House next November.

They're trying to outraise Democrats across the country in these early days to sway off Democratic challengers – **freeing up their cash to flip frontline districts like Marcy Kaptur's.**

_The Republican frontrunner in this race outraised us last quarter._ But we're not backing down without a fight.

Last election, the GOP spent millions in special interests and dark money to defeat Marcy and we came out on top. They're trying to outraise Democrats across the country in these early days to sway off Democratic challengers – freeing up their cash to flip frontline districts like Marcy Kaptur's. The Republican frontrunner in this race outraised us last quarter. But we're not backing down without a fight. Last election, the GOP spent millions in special interests and dark money to defeat Marcy and we came out on top. With your help, we can do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = We can do this, Team Kaptur | | Congresswoman Marcy Kaptur is a champion for the Midwest in Congress. She is focused on getting big money out of politics, holding Wall Street accountable, fighting against bad trade deals that harm workers, ensuring access to health care for all, and restoring our Great Lakes. Can you help Marcy by giving any amount today? = Paid for by Kaptur for Congress Kaptur for Congress PO Box 899 Toledo, OH 43697 United States We believe that emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. However, if you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, please . If you would like to stay subscribed but receive fewer emails, fill out this form .
