body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68093903/421899885/-1207006173?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU2OGM3ODAtZjQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fLXNc__8eq5uk-tw4EqVFZME_nHGYK2kGpe0fvf_ufw=&emci=c1d52299-d136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e68c780-f43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312) Hey — since the day I entered this race for Senate, I’ve talked about building a campaign guided by the principle of joy through service. So much of politics is divisive, but we’re focused on the positive change we can make if we come together to build something new. I’ve always believed that music unites us all — which is why my growing team and I are building a campaign playlist! [_**So my question for you, friend, is: what music brings you joy? Use this link to submit a song and we’ll add it to our official Lexi Reese for Senate playlist!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68093904/421899886/169799394?refcode=email_081423_Playlist-survey&source=email_081423_Playlist-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU2OGM3ODAtZjQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fLXNc__8eq5uk-tw4EqVFZME_nHGYK2kGpe0fvf_ufw=&emci=c1d52299-d136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e68c780-f43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312) | | [ADD YOUR SONG →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68093905/421899887/169799394?refcode=email_081423_Playlist-survey&source=email_081423_Playlist-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU2OGM3ODAtZjQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fLXNc__8eq5uk-tw4EqVFZME_nHGYK2kGpe0fvf_ufw=&emci=c1d52299-d136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e68c780-f43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312)

We can do anything if we work together — in joy and in harmony — and that’s what I think politics should be about.
(I also believe politics should be fun, and that staying in touch with my supporters should be more than just an endless stream of requests for money.)
[_**So I’d love to know what piece of music brings some joy into your life — because there’s a good chance it’ll bring some joy to the campaign trail too!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68093906/421899888/-2060711525?refcode=email_081423_Playlist-survey&source=email_081423_Playlist-survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYyOTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGU2OGM3ODAtZjQzYS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fLXNc__8eq5uk-tw4EqVFZME_nHGYK2kGpe0fvf_ufw=&emci=c1d52299-d136-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=0e68c780-f43a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=7307312)
Thanks, and have a great rest of your day.
-Lexi

name: Adam Schiff
subject: They’ll go after me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
| We’re just days away from the first Republican presidential debate of this election season.
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=3389%2E5257348%2E1CelJc)
Hi Derek — Before I ask you to **[pitch in to my campaign ahead of our mid-quarter fundraising deadline tomorrow](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20230814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=3389%2E5257348%2E1CelJc)** , I want to explain why this deadline is so important.
We’re just days away from the first Republican presidential debate of this election season.
On _Fox News_ during the primetime hour, the stage will be full of MAGA extremist candidates trying to out-Trump each other to appeal to the far-right voting base.
They’ll tout lies and misleading claims.
They’ll stomp on the meaningful, progressive policies President Biden has passed and the truth and accountability delivered by the Select Committee on the January 6 Attack.
_And Derek, it’s very likely that they’ll go after me and all the members of that committee._
It remains to be seen whether the thrice-indicted, twice-impeached former president will show up to the debate (he’s not happy with having to sign a ‘unity pledge’).
But regardless of whether Trump is there or not, the debate stage will be a cacophony of MAGA talking points. They’ll defend Trump as they try to defeat him. And they’ll tear down the people who have held him accountable — people like me.
**That’s why this deadline is so important.** It’s a key opportunity to show the strength and momentum of our campaign for the U.S. Senate.
And it’s the last chance to build up our defenses before the MAGA presidential candidates throw attacks my way.
**[With this in mind, I’m personally asking you to pitch in $5 or anything you can spare ahead of our upcoming deadline.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=aug2023_abs_em.dpa5x5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20230814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=3389%2E5257348%2E1CelJc)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=aug2023_abs_em.G4DTRv&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_MQG_AC90_20230814_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=11&akid=3389%2E5257348%2E1CelJc)

Thank you for continuing to stand by me.
— Adam

name: =?utf-8?Q?Becky=20Edwards?=
subject: Ballots Arrive Tomorrow!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BECKY EDWARDS FOR CONGRESS
body:
Team Becky, tomorrow is the day! Ballots begin to arrive in mailboxes across CD2. | | | | |
---
|
---
Team Becky,
Tomorrow is the day! Ballots begin to arrive in mailboxes across CD2.
We are feeling confident, but we are in an all-out push to reach every voter in this district between now and election day. Will you help get us across the finish line?
Here are some ways you can help:
1. **Return Your Ballot Right Away:** Return your ballot the day that you receive it. If you’re unable to do it right away, make a plan to vote before September 5th!
2. **Text 5 Friends:** Do you know registered Republican voters in CD2? Send them a text encouraging them to make a plan and turn in their ballot early.
3. **Volunteer to Help:** Once you’ve returned your ballot, help us reach even more voters by volunteering. Even five minutes of calls will connect you with voters!
4. [**Donate to Help Us Reach Our Goals:** ](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=b4ab0d4fa0&e=6484bb6dd5)I have been so overwhelmed by the generous support of donors. From $1 to $1,000 donations, seeing how many people are willing to invest in me and this campaign has been humbling. During this campaign, we have received donations from _**over 500**_ individual donors. [**Can I count on you to help us continue that momentum?** ](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=18bd545baa&e=6484bb6dd5)

| [PITCH IN TODAY](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=f8d3ec26bc&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
With Election Day approaching, I am asking for your continued support,
Becky
|
---

Friend,
As you know, in Washington, D.C., it’s hard to find opportunities where Republicans and Democrats agree to work together to better our nation.
Late last year, we did just that – passing a critical piece of legislation to protect pregnant workers.

Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

clean_body: | | | | This is wrong... Friend, As you know, in Washington, D.C., it’s hard to find opportunities where Republicans and Democrats agree to work together to better our nation. Late last year, we did just that – passing a critical piece of legislation to protect pregnant workers. Now the Biden Administration has decided to completely disregard our original legislative intent and inject a political abortion agenda into the law. This is wrong, Friend. | | | | | | The Biden Administration is tasked with enforcing the laws Congress passes, NOT the laws they wish were passed. Thanks for your support, | | Bill Cassidy United States Senator, Louisiana | | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" | "LinkedIn" ---|---|---|--- Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act. body:
Social Security is America’s support net.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68094526/421901602/-849735382?refcode=EM_PET_230814SocialSecurity_SB_30DO_4_NG_N&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTg1Y2M1NC1mNjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hONJhqevx0Rm9jMMSG67VCW-wzKiuUmxpcsObFT-DMo=) Peter,

As we celebrate the **88th anniversary of Social Security** becoming law, I'm reminded of Democrats' work putting people over politics.

Just one week into the 2023 Congress, Kevin McCarthy and his allies threatened to cut Social Security benefits in budget negotiations. They've used our most vulnerable people, seniors and disabled Americans, as a bargaining chip to cut spending.

**Cuts to Social Security would be devastating for the more than 66 million Americans who rely on its vital services.** With so many Americans relying on Social Security, Democrats won't stand down in its defense.

[**_Will you join me and Democrats in Congress in celebrating the 88th anniversary of Social Security by signing my petition today? Together, we can tell McCarthy and his allies to keep their hands off America's support network._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68094527/421901603/-1237483619?refcode=EM_PET_230814SocialSecurity_SB_30DO_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTg1Y2M1NC1mNjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hONJhqevx0Rm9jMMSG67VCW-wzKiuUmxpcsObFT-DMo=&emci=1a5f674c-f23a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6185cc54-f63a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68094528/421901604/-1237483619?refcode=EM_PET_230814SocialSecurity_SB_30DO_4_NG_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTg1Y2M1NC1mNjNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hONJhqevx0Rm9jMMSG67VCW-wzKiuUmxpcsObFT-DMo=&emci=1a5f674c-f23a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=6185cc54-f63a-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Gratefully,

Fellow Conservative,

**$98 PER PERSON**
**As a former Navy SEAL** , I’m not intimidated by much. I’ve been around the world and fought on battlefields against enemy soldiers in hand-to-hand combat. As an aerial firefighter, **I’ve piloted planes through some of the most intense wildfires imaginable**.

While I’ve had some thrilling experiences, I’ve never feared the challenges that have been put before me - I assess each situation and determine how best to achieve the desired outcome with minimal harm to myself or to my team.

On June 27th I declared my candidacy to be the next U.S. Senator for Montana - it was the first time in longer than I can remember that my new day job didn’t involve the risk of serious injury or even death. But just because I’m not putting myself in harm’s way at present,**I’m still in the line of fire.**

In just a moment I’m going to ask you to **[chip in $9](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be8280e56efe4514ad87032f8f852b73&_e=teCjY-0XA57sk7kM-9kqrdW3PB1e7anBhJEgsN8GrWX_ecaWmdQEONoy3EVjaT2mq6Hn8l8RqjpXqFwersDXCalGlhTIfx-CYsw1n5Cr3UOia7t-_UoFXhF2Ip4FpxAIbA5EoQKwRr91eZ2ZZ_9mrh8-d9wUYibljHdn-6fJUJhxbMykssJeQiAmtR460L9sG0ow0MH0KktxmwjYgUmlZGwBhGkddOEvUZjCfAXF0vuo7TkELSCUpgAxWebz21PQ6TRgQZaM1aLvvxQ9OQWmqsEsmcmB30lJsLVMsWThfiWoiCqwvApO_8dJbNS4u4f9bc4U4X0Rv1b6wtOAeo6djaGXJRmhkQxP6UZrdS8cOAvFrH88PLSjLP-Ywv8kXHVR)** to help me hit my goal today of **raising $886** , but please continue reading to find out why I’m asking and why it’s important conservatives like you who care about this country get engaged in my race.**[{link to donate}](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be8280e56efe4514ad87032f8f852b73&_e=teCjY-0XA57sk7kM-9kqrdW3PB1e7anBhJEgsN8GrWX_ecaWmdQEONoy3EVjaT2mq6Hn8l8RqjpXqFwersDXCalGlhTIfx-CYsw1n5Cr3UOia7t-_UoFXhF2Ip4FpxAIbA5EoQKwRr91eZ2ZZ_9mrh8-d9wUYibljHdn-6fJUJhxbMykssJeQiAmtR460L9sG0ow0MH0KktxmwjYgUmlZGwBhGkddOEvUZjCfAXF0vu3EVZZ8GvzGQfS9C8Q01TXNsMaxG1CGhD3mWJz9Mtp_xnxA79iZCfcIl0IBDR1BlHXX5u1hdu-z7ph7R1ughasVBUqk-MeQlS5lIMdzDzIUEw7EUwTG9O3KomTJ8ftCVS28nv28ABYLlHIfN1YnQTq)**

When I was deciding whether to challenge Jon Tester this spring, I did some digging to find out how much a U.S. Senate campaign costs and what I’d have to raise to be competitive against the last statewide elected Democrat. _**What I discovered shocked me. **_

**_OVER $70 MILLION WAS SPENT IN 2018 - AT THE TIME THE COSTLIEST FEDERAL RACE IN MONTANA’S HISTORY. CAMPAIGNS AND OUTSIDE SUPER PACS SPENT MORE THAN $98 PER PERSON TO INFLUENCE THEIR VOTE._ **
Given that my opponent has already raised $10 million this year,**the 2018 record won’t stand.**

While I’m not scared of the task ahead of me, **it is daunting to imagine raising the money I’ll need to successfully win this election.** By some estimates that sum will be more than $100 million dollars. **[[link to donate]](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be8280e56efe4514ad87032f8f852b73&_e=teCjY-0XA57sk7kM-9kqrdW3PB1e7anBhJEgsN8GrWX_ecaWmdQEONoy3EVjaT2mq6Hn8l8RqjpXqFwersDXCalGlhTIfx-CYsw1n5Cr3UOia7t-_UoFXhF2Ip4FpxAIbA5EoQKwRr91eZ2ZZ_9mrh8-d9wUYibljHdn-6fJUJhxbMykssJeQiAmtR460L9sG0ow0MH0KktxmwjYgUmlZGwBhGkddOEvUZjCfAXF0vuYqon9MfAhbWn11zKimSxQ3n6ZaUjCVuUHBjC-wcswzScQTtTDgcWXk07rEX8GtlM1aohHhy43YFi5tSt2HFYvuZhn05DntpOdWs28A1M7fohNfhVnQtAOIHJgFJtKPt57YhWbButy8AKL2MdYCyUv)**

I know we’re not going to raise the money we need all at once - or even in a year’s time. What I do know is that we will raise it. We’re setting goals each day - and **[if we continue to hit them, we’ll eventually get to where we need to be](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=be8280e56efe4514ad87032f8f852b73&_e=teCjY-0XA57sk7kM-9kqrdW3PB1e7anBhJEgsN8GrWX_ecaWmdQEONoy3EVjaT2mq6Hn8l8RqjpXqFwersDXCalGlhTIfx-CYsw1n5Cr3UOia7t-_UoFXhF2Ip4FpxAIbA5EoQKwRr91eZ2ZZ_9mrh8-d9wUYibljHdn-6fJUJhxbMykssJeQiAmtR460L9sG0ow0MH0KktxmwjYgUmlZGwBhGkddOEvUZjCfAXF0vt2GtGo-4gy3-Hi0Unzl7OvgtCNmOE2KkW-35GwrGqL0_CCcrxwyiCGkjvaIpAzaDCr_Ad4sAC14SMwIbwV9uGpVq9-l7Tv2yDjt0uouWOXaOc6biwsqA9i_UoKMkna3K21ki_fpcght88Wtnf9qFuW)**.

name: Kirsten Engel
subject: veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Engel for Arizona
body:
https://www.engelforarizona.com/ [https://www.engelforarizona.com/]
More than half a million veterans live in Arizona.
These men and women deserve the best that we have to offer.
In the Arizona legislature, I fought to make sure that we were investing in services and benefits for our veterans — so no one had to struggle to find a job, pay for health care, or feed their families. In Congress, I'll do the same.
Unfortunately, people like Juan Ciscomani have no problem cutting funding for our veterans if it means serving a political agenda.
Last weekend, my team sent around a petition calling on Republicans like Ciscomani to support funding for veterans services. I wanted to make sure you saw it.
Will you take a moment to sign our petition? The best way to honor the sacrifice made by veterans in this country is giving them the support they need after they finish their service. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-m9LO7HdYkSckjCUksiLFA2]
Thank you!
— Kirsten

---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Engel HQ <info@kirstenengel.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 11, 2023 at 1:59 PM
Subject: Protecting our veterans
This week was the one year anniversary of the passage of the PACT Act. This legislation was the biggest expansion of benefits and services for toxic exposed veterans in over thirty years, and Kirsten was thrilled to see it become law.
Veterans who are exposed to toxic chemicals while in service often don't see the negative impacts until years down the line — in illnesses like asthma, cancer, and more. The PACT Act ensures that these brave men and women are getting the care and treatment they deserve.
Veterans are heroes who have dedicated their lives to protecting our country. We owe them everything — but too often, our political leaders let them down.
Since he took office, Juan Ciscomani, Kirsten's opponent, has repeatedly voted against the best interests of our nation's service members.
He voted in lockstep with MAGA Republicans to approve a budget that would have meant 31 million fewer veteran outpatient visits and 81,000 layoffs across the Veterans Health Administration. He voted yes on banning diversity and inclusion initiatives in the Department of Defense. And he voted yes on an amendment that would make it even harder for active service members to receive reproductive care.
We should be giving the people who sacrifice so much for our country more support, not less.
In Congress, Kirsten will fight to uplift and support our veterans. Their needs will always come before culture war antics and political agendas.
On the anniversary of the PACT Act, we're calling on Republicans in Congress to stand up for veterans, not cut funding to crucial services and benefits. Will you join us by adding your name now? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-m9LO7HdYkSckjCUksiLFA2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-m9LO7HdYkSckjCUksiLFA2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/-m9LO7HdYkSckjCUksiLFA2]
Thank you so much!
— Team Engel

She’s ready to take that fight to Washington to find common-sense solutions to the challenges we’re facing here in Arizona's Sixth Congressional District.

name: Katie Porter
subject: “young voters are getting less likely to identify as Dems”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=28194%2E3422442%2ERvLmJ4)
**Young voters:** Democrats can’t win in 2024 without them, but recent polling shows warning signs:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230814-1?refcode=EMAK14_1_YOU_20230814_V1_F&refcode2=28194_3422442_RvLmJ4&akid=28194%2E3422442%2ERvLmJ4)
When it comes to engaging young voters, **we as Democrats need to show everyone that our government and our democracy can work for them.** That means having elected officials who are responsive and represent their voters, not special interests. It means having an economy that actually works for working people. And it means successfully communicating when we pass meaningful legislation—it’s my job as an elected official to tell my constituents how I can help—not the other way around! **A strong economy, that doesn’t leave people behind, will help us have a strong democracy.**
In the House I represent the UC Irvine community, and reaching students through everything from Snapchat ads and Tiktoks to campus organizers has been a key part of our three victories.
Thanks to your support, our campaign will be able to show young voters from all walks of life what’s at stake and remind them to vote. **That’s important here in California, where we have several Republican-held House seats that have a strong chance of flipping blue and allowing Democrats to take back control of the House.** The chance to campaign and communicate with voters statewide is one of the reasons I’m running for the U.S. Senate: [**Can you chip in today to help me continue reaching voters?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230814-1?refcode=EMAK14_1_YOU_20230814_V1_F&refcode2=28194_3422442_RvLmJ4&akid=28194%2E3422442%2ERvLmJ4)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230814-1?refcode=EMAK14_1_YOU_20230814_V1_F&refcode2=28194_3422442_RvLmJ4&akid=28194%2E3422442%2ERvLmJ4)
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAK14_1_YOU_20230814_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=28194_3422442_RvLmJ4&akid=28194%2E3422442%2ERvLmJ4)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=28194%2E3422442%2ERvLmJ4)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

It's unprecedented to have a former United States president, who is now the leading GOP nominee for the White House in 2024, facing multiple criminal indictments over their efforts to _overturn_ a free and fair election.
But this isn’t just about one person. We need to expose the far-right extremists like Ken Calvert who violated their oath and joined Trump’s efforts to stop a peaceful transition of power.
Calvert voted to decertify the 2020 election based on Trump's lies. When the Mar-a-Lago investigation was first announced, Calvert attacked law enforcement, claiming that "rot" had infiltrated the FBI.
Peter, I believe the rule of law is the bedrock of our country, but Republicans like Calvert remind us that the threats to our democracy haven’t gone anywhere.
**[I'm running for Congress to fight for our democracy and hold extremists like Calvert accountable. If you’re with us, send in a donation to power our work today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/68095120/421904071/-1669222325?refcode=em-8.14.23-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzcxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWE0MDAzMS1mYTNhLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uoZIadTU3rQjat3QO7_Yfi2Fn4RPSGXBA7L48N0-um4=)**

[](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=5846dfc81c8944dfa49f4529646b4525&_e=iuQZ7N9JHHqQ4J_v9Tvrqu9ZynVNrBpPtMn7MQyPpGA0qt6mcA7XDzx05s9cjhD9YolVGg_luh6N3LCzOBjpjmTCuQkH4i3x_GojuQ60Tq8T4aGAUJYIEgk_FxG-bWUqA9HYKKQowL1K2Whj4OHepvJMb3le7d4LTGwN_FhJnLvd2_PgGwFtNtPtZDJK3qNjJpHg9aHivQcHXoiRDou_PtyTeu2-ksf-U3ZyRD5wvQAYgEpMV4FDmg5O5v9kwJ2qLnBGcswtktFxSFuMa7pD4zpEI3D-ncuE7IWSRzFP3K1n59kdyQZRXKzlpJY2dAeIqB_FLYldnjI64d_Wf3q76CiRSs5cNGJY8_-mSH6aE1Ryr8z157vY5bUG7QqJusTM64Mj_JC48eCHzbM28SKxwQ%3D%3D)

clean_body: I refuse to let Biden stop me from winning the FIRST CAUCUS. I refuse to let Biden stop me from winning the FIRST CAUCUS. | | | | | Friend, Crooked Joe's weaponized Department of Justice is trying to force me to stand trial as the very first votes are cast in the 2024 election - in the Iowa Caucus. But the incompetent Crook in the White House must've forgotten who he's dealing with. There 's absolutely no attack he can come up with that can keep me off the campaign trail and stop me from fighting for YOU. If Biden is going to try and stop me from winning the Iowa Caucus, then I 'm going to fly to Iowa to DOUBLE our already insurmountable lead. And that's exactly what I did: But the best part of the trip was seeing just how many Iowa patriots showed up to support our movement in the midst of the most vicious witch hunt imaginable. There was a record crowd at the Iowa State Fair. They 've never had anything even close. While the Washington ruling class abuses its power to try and destroy our movement, the PEOPLE of our country are standing united in peaceful defense of our movement. And on November 5, 2024, we will prove that in America, the people still get to decide the future we want for our country. | Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: =?utf-8?Q?Nathaniel=20Moran?=
subject: Congressman Nathaniel Moran Re-Election Campaign Launch
body:
I would like to invite you to join me as I announce my campaign for re-election. | | |
---
| |
## Peter,

I would like to invite you to join me as I announce my re-election campaign! I will be stopping in Tyler, Longview, Henderson, Mount Pleasant, Texarkana, Marshall, Center, Carthage, and Jefferson. Please join me at which location is closest to you. **I can't think of a better way to announce my campaign than being surrounded by the people I am dedicated to representing.** Your continued support has been the driving force behind my time in Congress, and I am eager to continue fighting for the values and principles of our District. I look forward to seeing you there!
---
|
## Thursday August 17
* [**10 a.m. Tyler Square**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=ca1a573e2d&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 W. Ferguson St. Tyler, TX 75702
* [**1 p.m. Gregg County Courthouse**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=f77de30fa0&e=bbce4dd6ad)
101 E. Methvin St. Longview, TX 75601
* [**4 p.m. Henderson Area Chamber of Commerce**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=95417f6341&e=bbce4dd6ad)
201 N. Main St. Henderson, TX 75652

## Monday, August 21
* [**10 a.m. Titus County Courthouse**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=da5fc83e7b&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 W. 1st St. Mount Pleasant, TX 75455
* [**1 p.m. Texarkana Square**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=13a54e747b&e=bbce4dd6ad)
500 N. State Line Ave. Texarkana, TX 75501
* [**4 p.m. Synergy Park**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=18df8fdff9&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 N. Bolivar St. Marshall, TX 75671

## Tuesday, August 22
* [**10 a.m. Shelby County Historic Courthouse**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=58722dbd73&e=bbce4dd6ad)
100 Historic Courthouse Square Center, TX 75935
* [**1 p.m. Panola County Chamber of Commerce**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=a52be78ec6&e=bbce4dd6ad)
300 W. Panola St. Carthage, TX 75633
* [**4 p.m. The Jeffersonian Institute**](https://nathanielmoran.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0775eb7c3a967d340caf4e913&id=01d7ce3398&e=bbce4dd6ad)
120 E. Austin St. #100 Jefferson, TX 75657

---
| Gratefully,

|

| Nathaniel Moran
Congressman, First District of Texas

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Help our Colorado Dems
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act]
Hi folks, Senator Bennet here.
I’ve got an important ask for you, but first, let me explain why I’m emailing you.
When I was first elected in 2010, I won my race by less than 2 points. Colorado was a true battleground state.
Thanks to your hard work, we’ve made huge gains across our state over the past couple of election cycles. Today, we have two Democratic senators, five Democratic Congresspeople, a Democratic governor and a majority in the Colorado General Assembly.
This wouldn’t have been possible without the community of organizers, advocates, and volunteers who stepped up – and we can’t take this progress for granted.
There’s still so much work to do. Republicans have a lock on local offices across the state, including school boards and town councils.
By electing and re-electing Democrats statewide, we’ll continue making strides to protect our public lands; secure reproductive rights; and build an economy that works for everyone, not just a few at the top. We can protect our democracy and leave it stronger for the next generation.
That’s why I’m asking you to split a donation between my campaign and the Colorado Democratic Party. Even $5, $10, or $15 can make a difference >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to the Colorado Democratic Party and Michael Bennet will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act_5] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act_10]

DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act_15] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act_other]
The Colorado Democratic Party’s work is indispensable for our mission to elect and re-elect Democrats. We’re laying the groundwork for 2024 to protect the gains we’ve made, defeat MAGA Republicans, and flip local seats blue.
We’re going to need you on this team, friend, to get it done. Split a donation between my campaign and the Colorado Democratic Party today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-bennet?refcode=X_081423_CDPBennet_act]
Thanks,
Senator Michael Bennet

Bennet for Colorado
PO Box 3078
Denver, CO 80201
United States
